title: Breckenridge, CO — 4-Bed Cabin With Mountain Views
description:
A quick walk from the restaurants and shops of Main Street, this large downtown home is the perfect launching pad for everything Breckenridge has to offer, plus it’s directly adjacent to the BreckConnect gondola.
 
With two entertainment areas inside and a big mountain-facing deck with hot tub outside, this 4-bedroom, 5-bathroom retreat is an ideal getaway for family and friends. The living room features warm wood beams, high ceilings and a stone fireplace. 
 
The bright kitchen has beautiful wood cabinets, stainless steel appliances and loads of counter space, including an island for prep and eating.
 
The primary suite is a relaxing haven, with a spa-like bathroom that includes double sinks, a large tub and a glass-walled shower. Three guest bedrooms, including a bunkroom, provide plenty of room for everyone. 
 
Appropriately enough, this Mountain Modern home has dedicated space for skis and other outdoor gear, is close to recreational trails and offers postcard views to area ski runs. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Park City, UT — 4-Bed Cabin With Sauna
description:
Historic charm meets modern living in Timberline, a 4-bedroom, 5-bath home in the heart of Park City’s coveted Old Town. Close to skiing, restaurants and shops, the renovated home’s modern addition takes the mountain lifestyle to new heights.

The spacious open floor plan great room combines vaulted ceilings, wide-plank oak floors and a custom fireplace to create the perfect gathering spot. The gourmet kitchen features a custom island, Sub-Zero and Wolf appliances and a dining area that seats 8. The backsplash is decorated with handcrafted Moroccan tile and the custom range hood has reclaimed wood trim.

The primary suite exudes spa-like luxury, with vaulted ceilings, built-in cabinets and an en suite bath featuring a soaking tub, dual vanity, walk-in shower and backlit mirrors. Each guest room — including one with built-in bunk beds — has an en suite bathroom. Plus, there’s a custom hybrid 2-in-1 infra-red/traditional Finnish sauna and backyard hot tub.

A spiral staircase leads to a private open-air roof deck with panoramic views and a cozy fire pit. And a lower-level family room with a wet bar makes entertaining easy. The heated garage includes an EV charging station. Timberline has been fully furnished and professionally redesigned, and has been featured in Harpers Bazaar.

title: Sullivans Island, SC — 5-Bed Cabin With Infinity Pool
description:
Casual elegance flows through this modern island compound with a main home and a detached 2-bed, 2-bath guest house. The home, on the north end of Sullivan’s Island, offers a mix of relaxing indoor and outdoor spaces. 
 
On the home’s second level, telescoping Loewen impact glass doors in the open plan great room reveal an elevated deck and infinity pool, plus a spiral staircase leading to panoramic marsh and ocean views from a rooftop deck. The luxurious primary suite opens to the pool area and includes a spacious en suite bathroom with a tiled double shower and dual-sink vanity. 
 
The bright kitchen has stainless steel Jenn-Air appliances, custom cabinets and an oversized granite island. The home features a wet bar and a glass-doored wine room, and beautifully appointed guest bedrooms and bathrooms, some with soaking tubs. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Avalon, NJ — 6-Bed Villa
description:
Avalon is a casual yet elegant new construction home on a corner lot just a block from the beach and a short walk to the heart of town. The home has a private pool with a cabana, two outdoor showers and covered decks. 

The ground level features three spacious bedrooms with en suite bathrooms and a family room with a wet bar, and doors to a covered deck, the pool and cabana. A mudroom, powder room and laundry complete the first floor. 
 
The bright second-floor great room has vaulted ceilings, a wet bar with a beverage fridge, and multiple glass doors that open to a deep wraparound deck with ocean views. The chef’s kitchen features Sub-Zero and Wolf appliances, and quartz countertops, backsplash and a waterfall island. Completing the second floor are two guest bedrooms with en suite bathrooms, a powder room and a walk-in pantry. 
 
The third floor is a private enclave. A seating area with a beverage fridge adjoins the spacious primary bedroom. The luxurious en suite bathroom has a two-sink vanity, a lighted makeup area, a toilet closet and an indoor shower with a door to an outdoor shower. This level also has a separate flex area with an internal window that has a view down to the living room. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Palm Springs, CA — 5-Bed Villa With Fireplace
description:
Bacana is a reimagined Palm Springs micro-resort where outdoor gathering meets private retreat living. This one-of-a-kind property comprises five individual casita-style guest suites, each thoughtfully appointed with its own kitchen, bathroom, and dining nook—offering the perfect blend of communal enjoyment and personal space. Designed for groups who love alfresco living, the heart of the home is the expansive outdoor courtyard, anchored by a sparkling saltwater pool, spa, and mountain panoramas.

Your group’s social hub is the spacious cabana: an entertainer’s dream featuring a 10-person dining and seating area, a professional culinary demonstration kitchen with BBQ, burner cooktop, dishwasher, and sink, plus an outdoor fireplace, industrial fans, ambient lighting, and a recessed flat-screen TV. Whether hosting sunset dinners or cooking shows poolside, this setup is ideal for friends, families, or festival cohorts who treasure shared experiences without sacrificing privacy.

Every suite is fully furnished and professionally decorated, providing comfort and autonomy for each guest. With flexible indoor-outdoor flow, mountain views from every vantage point, and ’s full-service property management, owners enjoy seamless, low-maintenance ownership in a vibrant desert setting. Bacana is perfect for groups that value both gathering and retreat—and want to embrace the Palm Springs lifestyle with ease.

title: Incline Village, NV — 5-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
Set amid towering pines on just under a half-acre, Wood Creek offers the best of modern mountain living near Lake Tahoe. Incline Village amenities include boating, fishing and tubing on local lakes; walking, hiking and biking on nearby trails; and premium skiing and golf.
 
The completely remodeled home includes a massive great room with a soaring, wood-beamed ceiling, skylights, a stunning slate-clad fireplace and glass doors to the wraparound deck. The sophisticated kitchen has an island with a hammered copper sink, a wine fridge and high-end stainless steel appliances. The adjoining dining room opens to the deck with a fireplace and seating. 
 
The elegant primary bedroom offers a stunning fireplace wall, deck access and an en suite bathroom with a dual-sink vanity, a soaking tub and tiled shower. The home’s lower level features a family room with fireplace and wetbar, an office and a bunk room. Three more guest rooms provide plenty of room for family and friends. The home, which has a 2-car garage, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Tahoma, CA — 4-Bed Cabin
description:
Beautiful lake and mountain vistas take center stage in Lakeridge. This inviting 4-bedroom, 3-bath home — perched on a private cul de sac on Lake Tahoe’s west shore — is all about amazing views and awesome spaces to relax and entertain.

Wood beams and floors fill the entire mountain contemporary home with comfort and warmth. An expansive deck has plenty of room for dining, lounging and taking in serene Lake Tahoe.

Inside, the vast living room is bookended by stone fireplaces and a wall of glass doors opening to the deck. One of the fireplaces is double-sided, sharing its glow with the formal dining room. The warmth continues in the kitchen, with wood cabinets and a breakfast bar open to the dining room.

Another stone hearth anchors the primary bedroom, with a tiled en suite bathroom and a sliding glass door to the deck and, of course, more panoramic lake views.

Add more bedrooms and the game room, and you have the ultimate base camp for year-round fun and adventure. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: La Quinta, CA — 4-Bed Cabin With Hot Tub
description:
Lose yourself at Desert Ridge. This new construction desert retreat welcomes you with massive living spaces where you can relax by the pool, host gatherings on the private courtyard and play rounds on the bocce court. Plus, liven up your weekends with a farmers market, art walk, new restaurant or a putt on the course just five minutes away in Old Town La Quinta.

The sleek home has three bedrooms with calming en suite bathrooms, plus an attached casita and bath for hosting friends and family. Two sets of La Cantina folding sliders connect living spaces inside and out. The front courtyard includes the pool, spa and tanning ledge as well as a dual misting system, while the rear yard is home to an outdoor kitchen and the bocce court. 

The gourmet kitchen features custom cabinets, Brazilian quartzite countertops, backsplash and waterfall edge island, and KitchenAid stainless steel appliances. The dining area includes a wine fridge. This solar-powered home also has a 3-car garage.

title: Palm Springs, CA — 3-Bed Cabin With Mountain Views
description:
This 3-bedroom, 3.5 bathroom home is the epitome of desert modernism, with inside spaces flowing seamlessly to the outside. With crisp, bold lines and a sculptural facade, Palm Canyon is an inviting balance of minimalism and warmth. 
 
As you enter the L-shaped home, you are greeted by warm wood details on the floors and ceilings, and staggering mountain views through glass walls stretching across the back. The open plan living space includes a nearly invisible, but highly functional, kitchen. Forgoing upper cabinets, the kitchen has a recessed stainless steel refrigerator, a gas range and hard-to-spot vent hood, and a long stretch of counter atop rich, wood cabinets. 
 
The lines between interior and exterior continue to blur in the oversized primary bedroom and bath with dual sink vanity and oval soaking tub. All three bedrooms have en suite bathrooms and their own private patios. Simplicity, planning and attention to detail are also evident in the outdoor space: vibrant artificial turf lawn, broad pavers and architectural stone, a glass fire pit, and a pool with a fountain and spa. 
 
The property, gated and hedged for privacy, was on the cover of Palm Springs Home & Design magazine and has been part of modern home tours. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Palm Desert, CA — 4-Bed Villa
description:
Set high above the valley floor in the prestigious South Palm Desert hills, this sleek modern retreat on Bel Air Road is a striking blend of indoor-outdoor living and laid-back luxury. Framed by panoramic Santa Rosa mountain views, it is the perfect base for exploring the vibrant desert lifestyle. Spend your days teeing off at top-rated courses like Bighorn and The Reserve, strolling the designer shops and galleries of El Paseo, or lounging poolside in total privacy. Whether you’re enjoying a morning hike in the canyons or a sunset cocktail under the palms, Bel Air is your desert home away from home.

Inside, the light-filled interiors are crisp, curated, and ready for connection. Four bedrooms, including a detached casita, offer room for the entire family, while the open-concept kitchen and living area invite casual entertaining with a seamless flow to the outdoors. Custom finishes like a waterfall-edge marble island, wine fridge, and sliding glass walls create a polished yet welcoming atmosphere. Step outside to a private resort-style yard complete with a pool and spa, firepit, shaded dining area, all designed to frame the dramatic desert views.

As a fully managed home, Bel Air offers a turnkey ownership experience with every detail handled — from high-end furnishings and smart home tech to maintenance, management, and 24/7 support. Spend more time enjoying the desert and less time worrying about upkeep. Families will love the spacious layout, proximity to hiking and biking trails, and access to nearby clubs. With iconic Palm Springs just a short drive away, Bel Air is a private sanctuary with access to the best of the Coachella Valley.

title: La Quinta, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
Nestled in the mountains in the private enclave of Flores Montanas, this modern home has a walled courtyard for the ultimate privacy. And for privacy inside, each of the four bedrooms has its own en suite bathroom. 

Enter the gate and you’ll see two in-ground fire troughs placed in the artificial turf lawn, surrounded by lush landscaping. The custom glass front door leads to an open-plan living space with 14-foot ceilings, plank tile floors, Cambria quartz counters, gold-toned hardware and fixtures, and custom lighting. The home has multiple La Cantina pocket doors that open up for indoor/outdoor living. 

The generous zero-edge pool with custom tile work and the large Baja shelf are perfect for enjoying the mountain views. Two BBQ counters and a fire pit await just outside the primary bedroom. The primary suite features a dressing area and soaking tub. 

In addition to the bedrooms, the home includes a homework/media station in the hall, a butlers pantry/laundry area with barn door, a coffee bar and floating shelves. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Truckee, CA — 5-Bed Villa
description:
With stunning views of Northstar and the Sierra Crest, this mountain modern home offers relaxed living in a luxury setting: the private, gated community of Lahontan. The community offers hiking trails, streams and a private world-class golf course. 

Sierra’s great room has tall wood ceilings, a dramatic stone fireplace and glass doors opening to a broad deck that’s perfect for entertaining. The gourmet kitchen features stainless steel appliances, a wine fridge, center island, striking backsplash and cozy dining nook just steps from the formal dining space. 

The secluded primary suite is a rustic chic retreat, with high ceilings, a fireplace and doors to the deck. The sleek en suite bathroom features a dual-sink vanity, soaking tub and steam shower. The home has 4 guest bedrooms with en suite bathrooms. 

A downstairs family room, with a wet bar and wine fridge, opens to a patio with a gas fire pit. A protected hot tub is surrounded by natural stone for private relaxation. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Miami Beach, FL — 5-Bed Villa
description:
Sleek and sophisticated, this modern 5-bedroom, 6-bathroom home occupies a west-facing corner lot on coveted Di Lido Island in Biscayne Bay. 
 
With simple lines and a neutral color palette, this view home is all about ease and elegance: brushed European oak flooring, Italian porcelain tiles and a marble-topped kitchen island. The open plan great room is perfect for both daily living and entertaining, with easy access to cozy outdoor spaces. 
 
A calming primary bedroom has its own balcony, spacious closet and a spa-like bathroom with dual-sink vanity and soaking tub. Four more bedrooms offer plenty of space for family and friends.
 
The two-story home features multiple terraces, a 50-foot lap pool and outdoor shower, and lush, landscaped gardens for privacy. The fully fenced property includes a carport with e-charging station. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Incline Village, NV — 4-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
Sleek and modern, this 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom home features two levels of luxury. On the upper level, the open-concept living space has a vaulted ceiling, a sleek fireplace and glass doors to a cozy balcony. Doors in the adjoining dining area open to a deck overlooking the wooded lot, plus spiral stairs leading to a rooftop deck with mountain and tree-top views — perfect for stargazing or sunbathing. 
 
The modern kitchen is as beautiful as it is efficient, with Viking appliances, a large island with leathered waterfall quartz and custom cabinets. 
 
The bright, elegant primary suite has an en suite bathroom with double vanity, tiled shower and a soaking tub. Three more bedrooms and a family room mean there’s plenty of space for family and friends. 

Homeowners and their guests have access to Incline Village amenities: boating, fishing and tubing on the lake; and three private beaches; walking, hiking and biking on nearby trails. The two-car garage includes an EV charging station. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Palm Springs, CA — 5-Bed Estate With Hot Tub
description:
Picture yourself doing laps in the new waterfall pool, serving for the set on your own court, or sinking a putt on the private four-hole green – this private, walled one-acre Old Las Palmas estate has it all. 
 
Old Las Palmas was a playground for Hollywood stars, starting in the 1920s. Homes once owned by Elizabeth Taylor, Judy Garland and Cary Grant dot the landscape, which now includes chic galleries, bars and design stores. 

Enter this just-renovated 5-bedroom, 7-bath stucco home through a picturesque garden, the calming sounds of a limestone fountain burbling nearby. Open the steel and glass doors and you’ll discover an open floor plan living space that has it all. The living room features a soaring, beamed wood ceiling and sleek gas fireplace, with an adjoining game space and a stylish bar. Hand-troweled matte concrete floors run throughout, as do wood and welded steel accents. 

The gourmet kitchen has top-of-the-line appliances and a massive island for food prep and casual dining. The kitchen is separated from the formal dining space by a floating glass wine wall. 

All the bedrooms have room for king beds and the ensuite bathrooms include walk-in showers, matte black fixtures and white quartz counters. The home also has a private office.

Take in views of the stunning San Jacinto Mountains from this completely walled corner property. In addition to the tennis court, putting green, and pool, you can enjoy a grand veranda with a spa, swimmable waterfall, two fire pits, a covered pergola, and a fully equipped outdoor kitchen with bar seating. Everything you could want in a private compound.

The glass-doored, three-car garage offers an electric charger, air conditioning, and a bonus room above.

The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Napa, CA — 4-Bed Estate
description:
Set on more than 30 acres in Napa’s coveted Atlas Peak region, this modern estate offers the ultimate wine country escape. The property includes a 3-bedroom main residence and a separate 1-bedroom guest house, creating flexibility for hosting family, friends, or extended stays.

The main home showcases vaulted beam ceilings, open living spaces, and walls of glass that frame sweeping vineyard and mountain views. A chef’s kitchen with a large island and wine storage flows seamlessly into the dining and great room, where a stone fireplace anchors the space. Outdoors, expansive patios, a built-in barbecue, and a fire pit make entertaining effortless, while seasonal streams and oak-studded hillsides provide a serene natural backdrop.

Everyday comforts—like radiant heating, central air, and a 2-car garage—are paired with exceptional design and craftsmanship. Just minutes from downtown Napa yet surrounded by privacy, this estate offers the perfect balance of retreat and accessibility. Fully furnished and professionally managed by, it’s a turnkey way to experience the best of Napa Valley living.

title: Park City, UT — 6-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
Perched on top of the world, this professionally managed, turnkey seven-bedroom, five-and-a-half-bath home backs to a trail system and conserved land, yet remains just minutes from Park City and Deer Valley. The home has been thoughtfully updated and meticulously maintained, featuring refreshed exterior stonework and a heated driveway for convenient year-round access. Located near Park City’s Main Street and the world-class skiing of Deer Valley, this is a rare opportunity to enjoy luxury living with exceptional privacy, protected land on two sides, and breathtaking views.

This exceptional residence is defined by long, unobstructed mountain views across acres of protected land. Oversized windows throughout the home frame the surrounding landscape, capturing sweeping scenery, changing light, and frequent wildlife sightings, including moose, while offering privacy with no neighbors to the back or one side.

Outdoor living includes a spacious patio overlooking the natural surroundings, complete with a large hot tub that provides an ideal space to unwind and take in the views. Inside, clear hickory hardwood floors highlight the main and upper levels, complementing the bright, open interior. A dramatic double-story living room with a gas fireplace flows into the formal dining room, both positioned to take full advantage of the oversized windows and views beyond.

The chef’s kitchen is equipped with top-tier Miele appliances and an oversized waterfall island, making it well suited for both entertaining and everyday use.

The primary suite is located on the main level, along with a flexible office featuring an en suite bathroom and Murphy bed, allowing it to function as an additional guest suite. Upstairs are three bedrooms and two bathrooms, including one en suite. The walk-out lower level offers two additional bedrooms with direct access to the patio and surrounding landscape.

title: Cabo San Lucas, Mexico — 4-Bed Cabin With Pool
description:
Set within the prestigious gated community of Punta Ballena, this resort-style retreat blends ocean-view living with effortless comfort. Recently remodeled, the residence offers four en suite bedrooms and expansive indoor-outdoor spaces designed for relaxation and entertaining. A golf cart makes it easy to access the neighborhood amenities, including Cabo’s only private beach club, as well as a gym, restaurant, pool, and jacuzzi just minutes away.

The main level features a serene primary suite with a spa-like bath, alongside three guest suites that open to private terraces leading directly to the pool and spa. Upstairs, a soaring great room with exposed rafters and abundant natural light connects to shaded decks through sliding glass doors, creating seamless flow for gatherings. The sleek kitchen, appointed with stone countertops, custom cabinetry, and Café appliances, pairs elegance with everyday functionality.

Outdoors, a sun-splashed terrace with a grill, pool, spa, and lounge seating offers a private escape, while professional interior design and luxury furnishings elevate every detail inside. With its coveted location, refined finishes, and access to world-class amenities, Esperanza delivers the ultimate Cabo lifestyle.

title: Napa, CA — 5-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
Set on 1.4 acres just minutes from downtown Napa, The Palm is a private wine country retreat defined by award-winning design and an effortless connection to the landscape. With sweeping vineyard and mountain views as its backdrop, the home embodies the best of indoor-outdoor living in the heart of Napa Valley.

The residence balances architectural intention with relaxed sophistication. At its center, a state-of-the-art kitchen flows seamlessly into expansive dining and living spaces designed for gathering. Walls of folding glass NanaWalls open on both sides, welcoming in golden afternoon light, fresh air, and uninterrupted views that stretch across the valley.

The primary suite is a serene sanctuary, generously scaled and thoughtfully appointed. Three additional en suite bedrooms provide refined accommodations for family and friends, ensuring comfort and privacy for every stay.
Outdoors, the experience continues. A broad deck unfolds to a resort-style setting with a sparkling pool, hot tub, bocce court, and dedicated home gym. A detached guesthouse offers flexible space for extended visits, creative pursuits, or remote work with a view.

Fully furnished and professionally managed, The Palm is turnkey and ready to enjoy from day one. It is a place to savor long evenings, harvest season sunsets, and the easy rhythm of life in Napa.

title: Park City, UT — 5-Bed Villa Ski-in/Ski-out
description:
In the heart of the Canyons ski resort, this spacious new construction townhouse offers direct ski access and the best of modern mountain living. 
 
The open plan main floor features a striking fireplace wall, sliding glass doors to the balcony, a generous dining room and a sleek gourmet kitchen. Upstairs, the luxurious primary suite has its own fireplace, plus an en suite bathroom with soaking tub, tiled shower and dual vanities. The home includes four guest rooms, a cozy office space and a hot tub. 
 
The lower level includes a large mud room and bathroom, and a back door leading to skiing, hiking and biking. The home is just a short walk to golf, trails, shops and restaurants in Canyons Village, and a 10-minute drive to Park City’s historic Main Street. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Nantucket, MA — 7-Bed Cabin With Hot Tub
description:
Combining classic design with modern finishes, Cedar Isle truly offers the best of both worlds. The home includes an elegant 3-story main house and a guest house. Along with unbeatable space, you’ll also enjoy access to bike paths, beaches, and an exciting yet relaxed downtown waterfront scene.

The main home’s open plan living space is bright and welcoming, with a wall of glass doors opening to the pool, spa and beautifully landscaped backyard. The gleaming gourmet kitchen has a large island for prep and eating, stainless steel high-end appliances and custom cabinets. The adjoining dining space features a custom banquette. The main floor also has a suite with a king bed and a spa-like bathroom. Upstairs are three more king-size bedrooms with en suite bathrooms and the lower level features two queen-size bedrooms. The lower level is also home to a theater room.

Outside, you’ll find inviting vast entertaining spaces and an infinity-edge gunite swimming pool. Located on a quiet cul de sac near Caton Circle, the home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

Purchaser is responsible for a 2% transfer fee at the time of purchase

title: San Jose Cabo, Corredor Turistico, Mexico — 5-Bed Cabin With Pool
description:
Blue skies, azure waters and an aqua infinity pool await in Palmilla, a new construction contemporary with views of Palmilla Bay, Punta Gorda and the San Jose coastline. The home, in the hilltop community of Caleta Loma, has full beach access and is close to golf courses, restaurants and shops. 
 
The single-level home features a stone entryway over water and stone walls with native vegetation. The great room has a wall of sliding glass doors leading to the pool, sunken spa, recessed fire pit and covered deck. The sleek chef’s kitchen offers high-end appliances, a stunning waterfall island and custom cabinetry. A covered outdoor kitchen includes a BBQ and sink. 
 
All five bedrooms include spa-like en suite bathrooms; three suites have stunning ocean views over Palmilla Point. Photos are renderings; the home is currently under construction and will be professionally decorated and fully furnished upon completion. 

Palmilla has been featured in Robb Report.

title: Napa, CA — 6-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
An exceptional opportunity for buyers, this home includes a 3.5% assumable interest-only loan—offering a rare and compelling financing advantage.

Set on 10 acres in Napa Valley, Infinite Road is a 6,800-square-foot residence with expansive vineyard and valley views and refined modern finishes throughout. Located approximately 50 minutes from San Francisco and just eight minutes from downtown Napa, the property offers both privacy and convenience.

The great room features a beamed wood ceiling, folding glass doors, and an open layout designed for effortless gathering and entertaining. The kitchen is equipped with a waterfall-edge island, professional-grade stainless steel appliances, and an informal dining area, while the formal dining room includes a tray ceiling, oversized table, and direct garden access.

The grounds are dotted with fig and pomegranate trees, creating a serene outdoor setting. The primary suite offers a sitting area, direct outdoor access, and a spacious en suite bathroom. Five additional bedrooms, along with a home office, fitness room, media room, and recreation space, provide ample room for hosting and relaxation.

The three-level home is offered fully furnished and professionally designed.

title: Isle Of Palms, SC — 5-Bed Cabin
description:
Located on the quiet side of the island, this beautifully updated home is an easy walk to the beach and a quick ride by bike or golf cart to shops and restaurants. The elegant three-story home has spacious double front and side porches, a rooftop deck, pool and covered hot tub — all perfect for outdoor entertaining. 
 
A 3-stop elevator opens to the second-floor family room, kitchen and dining area. The bright space features Australian cypress floors, wainscotting, 12-foot ceilings, tall windows, a gas fireplace and full-light French doors leading to an expansive deck. The updated chef’s kitchen features custom cabinets, new stone countertops, stainless steel appliances and an L-shaped breakfast bar that seats 8. 
 
The relaxing primary suite has classic plantation shutters and French doors to the porch, an updated en suite bathroom with a shiplap accent wall, custom double-sink vanity and an inviting soaking tub. 
 
The first floor includes a laundry room, powder room, four bedrooms (three with en suite bathrooms) and an office with large windows and French doors to the side porch. The home, which has a two-car garage, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: St. Helena, CA — 3-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
This 3-bedroom, 2-bath home is all about contrasts. The newly built home has a modern sensibility but sits easily in historic St. Helena. Its white vertical siding contrasts beautifully with the black roof and black-clad windows and doors. The striking scheme continues inside, with clean white walls highlighted as a backdrop for matte black fixtures. 
 
The bright open-plan dining room and kitchen space is a show-stopper, with a soaring ceiling and gas fireplace. The gourmet kitchen includes an eating and prep island with waterfall sides. A few steps down reveals an elegant living room with a fireplace and doors to the back patio and garden. The backyard space includes a covered area for grilling and plenty of places to lounge by the pool. 
 
The cool, contemporary styling continues into the master suite and two guest rooms, with black windows framing garden views. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Healdsburg, CA — 4-Bed Villa
description:
This Healdsburg retreat is perfect for enjoying the fruits of nearby Sonoma Valley wineries and the productive fruit and olive trees on 3-plus acres. The renovated compound includes a single-story main home with 3 bedrooms and 3 baths, a detached bedroom room with full bath and a detached office/gym. 
 
Follow the gently winding private driveway past the ancient trees to this modern hillside home. Inside, the massive open plan living space features a dramatic wood-plank vaulted ceiling, an oversized gas fireplace and walls of glass that deliver views of the private orchard and the hilltops of West Dry Creek valley.
 
Slide open the doors to soak in the property’s privacy and the new pool and hot tub. Cook up a meal in the outdoor kitchen on one of the home’s broad decks, or dish up a delight inside: The chef’s kitchen includes an 11-foot-long island which is lit by two weathered zinc hanging pendants. 
 
The primary suite has a walk-in closet and spa-like bathroom with dual vanity and soaking tub. The suite has an attached terrace with access to the yard. Two other bedrooms and baths provide plenty of room for guests. 
 
The property is just a short drive from picturesque downtown Healdsburg. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Breckenridge, CO — 5-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
This modern mountain home sits on a half-acre near Breckenridge’s Peak 8 and spans three levels of inviting gathering spaces, with sweeping views from every room.

The bright, open main level features a fireplace, a generous dining area, and a gourmet kitchen designed for effortless entertaining. From the dining room, doors open to a cozy deck that showcases the surrounding scenery. The primary suite on this level includes a sleek fireplace, an en suite bathroom with a double shower and dual vanities, and a spacious walk-in closet.

The lower level offers a large family room with a fireplace, pool table, and kitchenette, along with additional bedrooms ideal for hosting guests. At the top of the home, a rooftop deck provides a true mountain retreat with a hot tub, fire table, lounge seating, and snow-melting heated floors.

Located close to world-class downhill and Nordic skiing, the home is offered fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Newport Beach, CA — 4-Bed Cabin With Fireplace
description:
Set on the tranquil waters of Newport Beach, Waterside combines coastal sophistication with modern comfort. This newly built retreat includes a private dock and Duffy boat, offering effortless access to the bay. Expansive glass doors blur the line between indoors and out, opening the home to breezes and views across Balboa Cove.

The open-concept main level features a spacious great room with a fireplace, a dining area, and a seamless connection to the waterfront patio—complete with a gas fire pit, grill, and outdoor dining. The chef’s kitchen blends timeless design and functionality, showcasing white Shaker cabinetry, quartz countertops, a large island with bar seating, a wine refrigerator, and top-tier stainless appliances.

A private elevator serves all three levels, culminating in a rooftop lounge with a fireplace, outdoor kitchen, and panoramic water views. Four en suite bedrooms, including a serene primary suite with a fireplace, soaking tub, rain shower, and balcony overlooking the bay, offer quiet comfort. With white oak flooring, designer tile, and professional furnishings throughout, Waterside reflects the best of Newport living—steps from beaches, Channel Park, Balboa Island, and Fashion Island’s shops and dining.

title: Indian Wells, CA — 4-Bed Cabin With Mountain Views
description:
Set against the Santa Rosa Mountains, this Indian Wells retreat is designed for easy indoor and outdoor living. Sunlight fills the open living spaces, where contemporary furnishings and sliding glass doors create a relaxed desert atmosphere.

A separate family room provides space for fun and entertainment, with a pool table, fireplace and plenty of seating for movies or game nights. The adjoining kitchen features a dramatic waterfall island, wood cabinetry, high-end appliances and a full-size beverage refrigerator. A formal dining room and a covered patio offer multiple options for gathering and hosting.

Outside, the backyard feels like a private resort. A large pool and spa are surrounded by palm trees and mountain views. Multiple seating areas with a fire table and a full outdoor kitchen with a stainless grill and ceramic charcoal cooker make desert evenings unforgettable.

The primary suite opens directly to the yard and includes a sitting area with a fireplace, a spacious walk-in closet and a spa-style bath with dual vanities, a soaking tub and a tiled shower. With a single-level layout, Spanish tile roof, mature landscaping and fully furnished interiors, this home captures the comfort and luxury of Indian Wells living.

title: Cave Creek, AZ — 4-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
When you come up the winding driveway to Desert Haven, you’ll be transported to your own paradise. This secluded mountaintop retreat has all the things to make the desert feel like home: glass walls, wraparound balconies, a gourmet kitchen and an Instagram-worthy infinity pool. 

Sleek, contemporary architecture creates seamless indoor-outdoor living, starting in the spacious great room. The gourmet kitchen has stainless steel appliances and a quartz waterfall island. The dining table and executive bar make entertaining easy, as does the cooled whiskey and wine room.

The primary suite features a fireplace, wine fridge and doors to the patio. The en suite bathroom has a soaking tub, tiled shower, dual sinks and a makeup vanity. An office and game room opens to the infinity pool and patio. The home, which includes an elevator, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Olympic Valley, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Fireplace
description:
No matter the season, this Tahoe home offers the ultimate in modern mountain living. The two-story home is part of The Palisades community near the Truckee River, and offers an open floor plan perfect for relaxed living and entertaining.
 
The great room features a fireplace and plenty of spaces to relax and dine, and opens to an expansive deck. The open plan also includes the gourmet kitchen with an adjoining mudroom and laundry room. The main floor also has a guest bedroom and bath, and a powder room. 
 
The upstairs primary suite is made for relaxing, with a full en-suite and doors to an upper deck with a hot tub. Two more bedrooms and a spacious flex room make it easy to host family and friends. 
 
You’ll never run out of things to do near this retreat: epic skiing on 3,600 skiable acres across multiple peaks; fishing, riding, hiking and boating, plus shopping, music and other events throughout the year in nearby Olympic Valley Village. And Lake Tahoe is just 10 minutes away. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Malibu, CA — 3-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description:
Allure appeals to the senses: See this tasteful home’s compelling modern lines, touch its beautiful interior elements, smell and hear the ocean breezes — all designed for relaxation just steps from the beach. The home, on gated West Sea Level Drive, offers ocean views, a home movie theater and an infinity pool. 
 
The elegant living room has a gas fireplace, beamed ceilings and sliding glass pocket doors framing the view. The sleek gourmet kitchen has high-end appliances, an island and breakfast bar, and access to a deck for grilling and dining. Doors in the formal dining room reveal the pool deck, hot tub and lounge area with a gas fire pit. 
 
The primary suite features a fireplace and sliding glass pocket doors to a lush private garden. The suite has a spacious dressing room with built-in storage, and the en suite bathroom includes an elegant dual-sink vanity and steam shower.
 
Downstairs is the state-of-the-art home theater with projection screen, two guest rooms with en suite bathrooms, and an office/flex space. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Olympic Valley, CA — 5-Bed Cabin With Hot Tub
description:
Majestic is the apex of luxury mountain living, with an open floor plan, 3 decks and 5 bedrooms with spa-inspired en suite bathrooms. Located just 5 minutes from the Palisades Tahoe resort, this retreat is perfect for families looking for year-round mountain excitement. 

The striking, open great room is bookended by glass walls and doors leading to spacious outdoor entertaining areas overlooking pine trees and seasonal creeks. The gourmet kitchen features custom wood cabinets, high-end appliances and an oversized chef’s island with waterfall ends.

Upstairs, the spacious primary suite is the perfect sanctuary, with a fireplace and a zen-like bathroom that includes a soaking tub and dual-sink vanity. A bonus game room has a cozy fireplace and doors to a covered patio. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Carmel, CA — 5-Bed Cabin With Sauna
description:
Stunning unobstructed whitewater Point Lobos views from three levels. Prime Carmel Highlands location. Close to picturesque Carmel-by-the-Sea, beautiful beaches, and the Big Sur coast. Fully furnished. Professionally managed. Exceptionally rare.

Perched above the Pacific in the iconic Carmel Highlands, Hillside is a true showpiece—where architecture, light, and ocean meet. Designed by Studio Schicketanz, the home’s bold cantilevered design and walls of glass frame sweeping whitewater views from nearly every room.

Enjoy effortless coastal luxury: 5 bedrooms, 5 full baths, and 3 half baths across three levels. The main level is anchored by a stunning chef’s kitchen with Boffi cabinetry and a Mugnaini wood-fired oven, flowing into open living spaces and expansive terraces above the sea.

The primary suite is a retreat unto itself—panoramic views, spa-like bath, private office, fireplace, and direct access to an extraordinary infinity pool and sauna overlooking the coastline.

Multiple indoor and outdoor living spaces—including a hot tub, fireplace lounge, gym, and pool-level lanai—create a private resort experience, with well-appointed en suite bedrooms offering comfort and privacy for family and guests.

Own one-eighth of this exceptional home with ’s professionally managed co-ownership model—featuring curated scheduling and full-service home care, making luxury coastal living in coveted Carmel Highlands both effortless and accessible.

title: Vail, CO — 4-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
Experience the wonder of Colorado’s iconic mountain destination in this newly renovated Townhome end unit, complete with updated amenities like all new hardwood floors and a heated driveway pad. Relax on the wrap-around deck to unobstructed views of lush greenery or snow-laden pines and entertain guests in the large living area featuring a built-in bar. In the warmer months, take a dip in the Fallridge Community Pool and visit the Vail Golf Club, designated a "Top 100 Resort Course” by Golf Digest.
 
A short bus ride away is Vail Village where you can enjoy the laid-back leisure of mountain living with a variety of boutiques, art galleries and restaurants, set against the backdrop of Colorado’s Rocky Mountains. From skiing and snow sports in the winter, to world-class golf and fly fishing in the summer months, Vail is an idyllic destination for outdoor enthusiasts with refined tastes.

title: Santa Barbara, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
Set in the hills above Santa Barbara, this contemporary retreat captures sweeping views of the Pacific Ocean and surrounding mountains, offering a rare sense of privacy paired with refined design. Positioned to take in both sunrise and sunset light, the four-bedroom, five-bath residence is a serene escape just minutes from the coastline and downtown.

Designed with a focus on scale and flow, the open-concept main level unfolds into a grand great room anchored by a sleek gourmet kitchen, dining area, and lounge. Expansive glass doors open to two distinct outdoor settings: a Pacific-facing terrace with a pool, and a walled garden framed by mature landscaping and mountain views. Each space is thoughtfully composed for elevated entertaining and quiet moments alike.

A striking architectural staircase of wood, steel, and glass connects the home’s levels, serving as both a design centerpiece and a transition between private retreats. The main-level primary suite offers a tranquil, spa-like experience with a zen-inspired bath and direct access to the pool terrace. Additional bedrooms are positioned for privacy and flexibility, including a suite ideal for guests or a home office, and a lower-level bedroom with its own fireplace and garden terrace.
Upstairs, a secondary primary suite opens to a rooftop terrace complete with a wet bar, creating a dramatic vantage point for taking in the surrounding landscape.

Fully furnished and professionally managed, the home is turnkey and ready to enjoy from day one. It is a refined expression of Santa Barbara living, where architecture, setting, and atmosphere come together effortlessly.

title: Jackson, WY — 3-Bed Cabin With Mountain Views
description:
Experience contemporary mountain living in the heart of Jackson, Wyoming. This brand-new, three-story townhome masterfully combines sleek, modern design with a warm, inviting atmosphere, ideal for both relaxation and entertaining. Upon entering, you’re greeted by soaring 12-foot ceilings and dramatic floor-to-ceiling windows that flood the open-concept living space with natural light. A large fireplace serves as the focal point of the living area, creating the perfect setting to unwind with a good book or share an evening with friends.

The gourmet kitchen is complete with custom cabinetry and top-of-the-line Wolf and Sub-Zero appliances as well as a fully stocked wet bar, ensuring culinary perfection. Outside, the private rooftop deck is a personal oasis outfitted with a hot tub, firepit and comfortable seating to soak in the panoramic views of Jackson’s rugged landscape. Thoughtfully designed with convenience and comfort in mind, this home boasts a private elevator, secure underground parking and a central location just moments from award-winning dining and endless outdoor adventures.

title: Aspen, CO — 4-Bed Villa Ski-in/Ski-out
description:
Experience premier mountain living at this remarkable year-round retreat on Snowmass Mountain. From the privacy of your corner-unit balcony, savor breathtaking vistas of snow-capped peaks and alpine forests, or take the shuttle to explore the charming Snowmass Village. 

In winter, the home’s coveted ski-in/ski-out access makes hitting the slopes a breeze, and with three lifts—including the brand-new Coney Express—just steps from your door, you can expect easy access to the variety of terrain that Snowmass Mountain has to offer. After a thrilling day of snow sports, relax by the warmth of the crackling wood-burning fireplace, rejuvenate in the exclusive community hot tub and sauna, or enjoy the fitness room and pool. Other amenities include complimentary transportation to and from the Aspen Airport and around Snowmass Village.

During the summer months, the mountain transforms into an outdoor adventure haven, with a variety of activities from scenic hiking and mountain biking to thrilling ropes courses and ziplining, fit for the whole family. 

From sunrise ski runs to sunset balcony views, Alpine Ridge delivers the ultimate mountain lifestyle. With world-class amenities and year-round adventure at your doorstep, every stay becomes a memorable escape in Snowmass.

title: San Diego, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description:
Discover elevated seaside living at Pacific Shores, a refined coastal home just moments from the sand and surf of La Jolla Shores. This beautifully designed residence combines modern comfort with effortless access to one of Southern California’s most sought-after neighborhoods. Owners can explore the coastline, shops, and dining of La Jolla Village, just a short walk away. Pacific Shores also includes custom surfboards for owner use, as well as a personal golf cart for an easy ride to the beach.

Inside, sunlight pours through expansive glass walls, connecting open living spaces to wide decks with ocean and park views. The updated interiors feature custom tiling and wallpaper, elevated furnishings, and fresh finishes inspired by the home’s natural coastal setting. A chef’s kitchen with premium appliances, a large island, and stylish open shelving makes entertaining effortless, while the spacious primary suite offers serene views and modern coastal elegance. 

Evenings extend outdoors, where multiple terraces and decks invite you to enjoy sunsets and sea breezes. An EV charger, two-car garage, and smart home features add convenience to the luxury. Professionally managed and fully furnished, Pacific Shores offers a turnkey way to experience La Jolla’s lifestyle like a local.

title: San Jose Corridor, Mexico — 5-Bed Home With Pool
description:
Located in the exclusive gated community of Palmilla Norte, Playa Linda offers 5 bedrooms and 6 bathrooms in a light-filled, single-level floor plan. The open-concept living, dining, and chef’s kitchen spaces flow seamlessly to expansive terraces with panoramic Sea of Cortez views. Each bedroom includes an en-suite bath, while features like air conditioning and custom finishes ensure comfort in every season.

Designed for outdoor living, the home boasts an infinity pool, jacuzzi, palapa-shaded lounge, and a fire pit overlooking the water. A short stroll takes you to one of Cabo’s most swimmable beaches, with championship golf, fine dining, and boutique shopping nearby.

As part of ownership, buyers will enjoy a complimentary first-year membership to the exclusive Palmilla Dunes Beach Club—featuring resort-style pools, a state-of-the-art fitness center, spa, tennis and pickleball courts, and oceanfront dining. Fully furnished and professionally managed by, Playa Linda is your turnkey escape for Baja’s finest coastal lifestyle.

title: Kiawah Island, SC — 5-Bed Villa With Fireplace
description:
Set within Kiawah Island’s sought-after Ocean Park community, Oak House offers modern coastal living surrounded by lagoon views and native Lowcountry landscape. The property’s main house and guesthouse lie amid native trees, creating a sense of privacy and connection to nature. Built in 2023, the home features an airy, open layout with floor-to-ceiling glass, wide-plank flooring and vaulted ceilings that draw natural light into every room.

Designed for effortless entertaining, the main living spaces open to a private outdoor oasis with a heated saltwater pool and spa, firepit lounge, outdoor fireplace and a full summer kitchen. Picture yourself beginning the day with coffee overlooking the lagoon or ending evenings gathered around the fire as the sun sets through the oaks. Inside, the chef’s kitchen features a waterfall island, Sub-Zero and Wolf appliances, a butler’s pantry and a seamless flow to the dining and living areas. The serene primary suite opens directly to the pool, while additional guest suites and a separate studio space provide space and comfort for hosting.

Ownership at Oak House includes access to the Sandcastle Club, which offers oceanfront pools, fitness facilities, tennis and pickleball courts, beachfront dining and a full calendar of owner events. With miles of trails, pristine beaches, championship golf and Freshfields Village nearby, this retreat captures the elevated ease and natural beauty of life on Kiawah Island.

title: Steamboat Springs, CO — 3-Bed Villa Near Ski Resort
description:
Located in one of the most desirable spots in Steamboat Springs, Morningside is a three-level mountain-modern retreat designed for comfort, gathering, and effortless access to the slopes. Just a short walk from the Wildhorse Gondola, the home offers a seamless connection to Steamboat Ski Area while placing owners within easy reach of dining, shopping, and year-round mountain adventure.

Expansive windows fill the interiors with natural light and frame views of the surrounding peaks. On the main level, an open living and dining area centers around a striking double-sided stone fireplace that anchors the space and creates a warm gathering point after a day on the mountain. The adjacent kitchen features Thermador appliances, generous prep space, and a layout designed for hosting family and friends. Just beyond, a covered deck extends the living area outdoors, offering the perfect setting for grilling, dining, and taking in the alpine scenery.

The thoughtfully designed layout provides both connection and privacy across three levels. Upstairs, the primary suite is a peaceful retreat complete with a spa-style bath and a private deck overlooking the Flat Tops and Emerald Mountain. The lower level includes two additional bedrooms, including a second suite with patio access and a private hot tub. A bunk room and secondary living space create a welcoming zone for guests, kids, or movie nights.

Owners also enjoy full access to the amenities at Trailhead Lodge, including a heated pool, hot tubs, fitness center, and game room, along with convenient on-site shuttle service.

Offered fully furnished and professionally managed, Morningside is turnkey and ready to enjoy from day one. It is a home designed for powder mornings, long summer evenings, and everything that makes life in Steamboat exceptional.

title: Park City, UT — 5-Bed Cabin With Mountain Views
description:
Rothwell is a spacious, modern home geared for active individuals. The three-level, 5-bedroom home is at the top of the King’s Crown development at Park City Resort, with direct access to biking and hiking trails and ski runs. 

The open plan great room includes a sleek black fireplace, beamed ceilings, European white oak floors, a mirrored wet bar and glass doors to a deck with mountain views. The gourmet kitchen has rich wood cabinets, a walk-in pantry, quartz countertops and a waterfall island with seating. 

Privacy awaits in the top-floor primary bedroom features a balcony with panoramic views, a fireplace and skylights, while the en suite offers a soaking tub and dual-sink vanity. Each of the four guest rooms includes an en suite bathroom and access to outdoor decks. The home also has an elevator, a terrace on the mountain side with a private hot tub, and a storage building with a fire pit on the roof. 

The home’s location in Old Town Park City means it’s close to historic Main Street shops and restaurants. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Islamorada, FL — 5-Bed Cabin
description:
Tucked within the coveted White Marlin Beach enclave, this canal-front retreat captures the essence of refined Florida Keys living. Framed by swaying palms and a gracious front entry, the 5-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom residence offers a seamless blend of comfort and coastal elegance.

The open-concept main level is bathed in natural light, with soaring ceilings, oversized windows, and glass doors that connect the living area to the private pool and tranquil canal beyond. A bright, gourmet kitchen anchors the space with JennAir appliances, dual sinks, and generous cabinetry—ideal for effortless entertaining. A bay window in the dining area frames serene views of the pool.

The main-floor primary suite features a custom walk-in closet and direct access to the patio and pool. Upstairs, a second spacious bedroom offers a large closet and a Jack-and-Jill bath shared with an adjoining guest room. Two additional bedrooms provide ample accommodations for family and guests.The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Truckee, CA — 4-Bed Villa Near Ski Resort
description:
Martis Landing offers the best of mountain living with contemporary design and thoughtful amenities. Expansive windows and vaulted ceilings fill the home with natural light and showcase wooded views that shift beautifully with the seasons. Inside, a flowing layout connects open gathering spaces with quiet retreats, creating a home base ideal for family and friends.

The great room centers on a stone fireplace and opens to a spacious deck designed for outdoor entertaining, complete with a grill, covered seating, and sunset views over the treetops. The gourmet kitchen features a large island, high-end appliances, a wine fridge, and custom cabinetry, while the adjacent dining area sets the stage for memorable meals. Two elegant primary suites include private balconies, fireplaces, and spa-like baths, while additional guest bedrooms, including a bunk room, offer comfort and flexibility. A lower-level lounge with wet bar and ski storage makes après-ski gatherings effortless, and radiant heated floors keep the interiors warm and inviting. Modern additions such as solar panels, an EV charger, and a 2-car garage further enhance convenience.

Ownership includes access to the Northstar HOA recreation center, with pools, hot tubs, a fitness center, tennis and pickleball courts. Just minutes away, The Village at Northstar offers ski lift access, ice skating, shops, and dining, while surrounding biking, hiking, and snowmobiling trails connect you to Tahoe’s year-round adventure. Golfers can enjoy nearby championship courses, and Lake Tahoe itself is a short drive for boating and lakeside dining.

Professionally designed and fully furnished, this Martis Landing retreat combines new construction, modern comforts, and unrivaled proximity to Tahoe’s best mountain and lake experiences.

title: Newport Beach, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
Just minutes from Balboa Pier Beach, this completely renovated and redesigned 4-bedroom, 4.5-bath home makes a perfect coastal retreat. Perched on a corner lot, the three-story home is filled with light, relaxing spaces to enjoy with family and friends. Topping it off is an expansive rooftop deck with stunning ocean views. 
 
Large windows, glass doors and wood floors make this modern home feel fresh and inviting. The great room, complete with gas fireplace, flows easily to the paved front patio for easy indoor/outdoor living. The sleek kitchen has Viking appliances, a generous island and a huge pantry. Just around the corner are a powder room and laundry room. 
 
On the second floor, the primary bedroom has a private balcony, spacious closet and en suite bathroom with dual vanity, tiled shower and oval soaking tub. This level also has two guest bedrooms and bathrooms and access to a deck with a peek-a-boo ocean view. 
 
In addition to a fourth bedroom with a balcony and a nearby bathroom, the home’s top level offers access to the spectacular rooftop entertaining area, complete with outdoor kitchen, fire pit and ocean views. 
 
Or opt to dine at one of the many nearby restaurants, enjoy a sunset stroll on the beach and stop by one of the fire rings to warm yourself on a cool evening. The home, close to the body surfing hot-spot called the Wedge, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Fort Lauderdale, FL — 4-Bed Villa
description:
Within walking distance to famous Las Olas Blvd, this completely renovated Las Olas Isles home has its own dock, canal-side pool and spa, and luxury touches throughout. The open plan living space has a cozy fireplace, Lutron lighting and sliding glass doors to the pool and a full outdoor kitchen and bar with refrigerator drawers and ice maker. Inside, the gourmet kitchen features a striking island with breakfast bar and appliances by Wolf and Miele. 
 
The primary bedroom is a haven of calm and includes a private balcony, an enormous closet and an en suite bathroom with a soaking tub, dual-sink vanity and tiled shower with two rain heads. The home has a theater room and is close to some of the best restaurants in Fort Lauderdale. It comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Park City, UT — 5-Bed Apartment With Mountain Views
description: It’s clear to see why this stone-and-steel stunner was named home of the year by Mountain Living Magazine. Curved roof lines and a wall of windows welcome astonishing views of mountains and meadows. The recently remodeled multi-level home has timeless finishes of stone and wood, an open-concept living space with a two-story stone fireplace and curved ceiling, and a gourmet kitchen. The main floor master suite opens to a private deck. A loft with seating, mini-bar and game space overlooks the great room. The lower level has a bathroom, guest rooms and an entertaining area that opens to a deck. Above the garage is a 1-bedroom apartment with its own entry. The home is professionally managed and turnkey ready. Fresh interior design touches will be added prior to closing.

title: Park City, UT — 5-Bed Cottage
description:
Don’t be fooled by the modest cottage you see from the street — this new construction home has been transformed from this historic Old Town home into a luxurious 21st century retreat. With 5 bedrooms and 6 bathrooms, this expansive home is easily walkable to Main Street and Park City Ski Resort.
 
The inviting great room has soaring ceilings and one of the home’s three gas fireplaces. The living space flows into a sleek gourmet kitchen and butler’s pantry, and a cozy dining space. The main floor also features a spacious primary bedroom with a spa-like en suite bathroom and a large closet. 
 
There is plenty of room for family and friends, with a second primary suite, private guest suites, a family room and a loft area. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Aspen, CO — 5-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
With rooflines that echo the nearby peaks, this impeccably remodeled Aspen home has vaulted ceilings with grand views of Shadow Mountain. An open floor plan and seamless indoor-outdoor living create an idyllic mountain retreat. 
 
Warm, wide-plank wood floors and box beams provide a contrast to the iron banisters of the open staircase and black-framed windows and exterior doors. Stone is used throughout the interior, including a sleek wet bar at the top of the stairs. Just past the bar is the main living space, sophisticated dining area and gorgeous gourmet kitchen. The kitchen has top-of-the-line appliances, a striking stone backsplash wall and matching waterfall-edge islands. The kitchen and dining room doors lead to an outdoor entertaining space. 
 
The primary bedroom features an en suite bathroom that’s nothing short of luxurious, with two vanities, a soaking tub and glass-enclosed steam shower. The guest bedrooms and bathrooms are beautifully appointed, and a private office is the perfect place to read or work. 
 
The home is located in Aspen’s West End, close to the gondola, golf course, music tent, opera house, the Aspen Institute, shops and restaurants. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Fort Lauderdale, FL — 4-Bed Villa
description:
Just steps from the sand, this new 4-bedroom, 4-bathroom home is perfect for year-round relaxation. The open concept main floor includes a dramatic 20-foot ceiling in the great room, a charming gourmet kitchen with brass accents, a welcoming dining room table and sliding doors to the pool. 
 
The spacious primary bedroom is bright and inviting, with sliding glass doors to a balcony and a custom closet. The spa-like en suite bathroom features a double vanity and a serene, tiled wet room with a soaking tub and shower. Three other inviting bedrooms also offer en suite bathrooms.
 
On a nicely landscaped corner lot just a block from the beach, the home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: La Jolla, CA — 3-Bed Villa With Sauna
description:
This is multi-tasking, La Jolla style. You can relax in the rooftop saltwater pool, bask in the 8-person spa or sip a cool drink from the wet bar — all with the backdrop of the Pacific Ocean.
Every part of this 3-bedroom, 4½-bathroom contemporary is designed to make the most of ocean views. Vanishing window walls transform indoor spaces into open-air living at its finest. 

The open plan living space has a gas fireplace and a sleek kitchen with a curved island and a space for formal dining. Exotic materials and touchable textures are used throughout the home, including a back-lit Brazilian granite steam room. Restock the bar from the home’s wine room. There’s even a hydraulic driveway and a turntable garage floor that ensures you always leave facing the ocean.

The primary suite has a spacious closet and a luxurious bathroom with double sinks, soaking tub and walk-in shower. A vanishing window wall opens to a private balcony and stunning ocean views. 

Just across the road is Windansea Beach, a popular and picturesque beach known for its magnificent scenery and surf breaks created by underwater reefs. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Pebble Beach, CA — 4-Bed Villa
description:
With unobstructed ocean views, this 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath home on Monterey Peninsula Country Club is the ultimate Pacific Coast getaway. With warm wood floors, ceiling beams and custom shelving, the sunken living room is an oasis of calm with a sleek, modern fireplace and glass doors leading to the patio. 
 
Step up to an elegant dining room with ocean views and sliding doors to an outdoor dining table. The gourmet kitchen is as lovely as it is efficient, with stainless steel appliances, stone counters, a breakfast bar and a huge pantry. 
 
The spacious main-floor primary suite has doors to its own west-facing deck, an en suite bathroom with soaking tub, tiled shower and vanity with double sinks, and a large closet. Upstairs, three more bedrooms and two bathrooms provide plenty of space for family and friends, and a covered deck is the perfect place to relax before bed. Rodeo is within a five minute drive to world class golf at Pebble Beach, Spyglass, Poppy Hills and Spanish Bay. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Vail, CO — 4-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
Golf Terrace is a mountain contemporary townhome with stunning views of the Gore Range and easy access to biking trails, skiing and golf. 


The recently remodeled corner unit features a main living level with great traffic flow from the kitchen to the dining and living rooms. The living room is anchored by a sleek fireplace and custom shelving. The bright chef’s kitchen has stainless steel appliances, loads of counter space and a striking island with a waterfall edge. In addition to an inviting table, the dining room includes an eating bar and a built-in bar with sink and beverage fridge. Two spacious decks extend the living and entertaining area, offering woodland views. 


With 4 bedrooms and 4.5 bathrooms, the home has plenty of space for guests, while an office provides the privacy needed for working from home. Golf Terrace has plenty of storage, a mud room, ski lockers and a 2-car garage. The home, in the Vail Golf Course neighborhood with access to the free town bus, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Napa, CA — 4-Bed Estate
description:
It’s hard to take your eyes off the stunning Napa Valley views stretching all the way to San Francisco and Sonoma. But this 1.84-acre hillside estate in the coveted Coombsville/Wild Horse AVA (American Viticulture Area) has just as much to offer inside.
 
The vaulted, skylit great room is bright and inviting, perfect for a cozy time around the fireplace or big celebrations. A gourmet kitchen with an eating island makes meal prep a dream. 
 
Easily move the party to the massive deck by sliding open the glass doors in the living and dining space. The terraced back yard leads to a dazzling pool and deck area with an outdoor kitchen, dining and lounging area, and a fire pit. It’s easy to see yourself sipping a glass of wine and watching the sun set in this picture-perfect setting. 
 
The 4-bedroom, 4-bath home includes an expansive primary suite with a dream closet and dressing area, and doors leading to the deck. A junior primary is on the opposite end of the home. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Truckee, CA — 4-Bed Cabin With Hot Tub
description:
Designed for modern living at its best, this 4-bedroom, 4.5-bath home offers bright, airy spaces, clean lines and sweeping woodland and golf course views.
 
The open plan main floor offers stunning contrasts: The crisp white kitchen counters, waterfall island and lower cabinets are balanced by warm wood uppers. Off to the side, the distinct angles of the black floating staircase stand out against the white walls. The great room is a grand gathering space with walls of windows and a double-height ceiling finished in wood, anchored by a sleek, massive black fireplace. A separate media room allows for flexible use of the home’s generous spaces. 
 
Two large bedrooms with en suite baths are tucked away down the hall, offering privacy as well as views. Upstairs, a spacious loft area opens to an expansive deck with outdoor fireplace, and two additional bedrooms with built-in bunks provide plenty of sleeping options for family or guests. 
 
The exterior spaces are just as thoughtfully designed, allowing for indoor-outdoor living year-round. A large covered patio with built-in grill invites al fresco dining, and the cozy fire pit is a perfect gathering spot on cool evenings. Located in Gray’s Crossing, owners enjoy all community amenities, including the private fitness facility, community pool and restaurant, all just a short walk away. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Scottsdale, AZ — 5-Bed Villa
description:
Taking design inspiration from Tulum — a tropical oasis on Mexico’s Yucatan peninsula — this grand Scottsdale home is built for entertaining and relaxing. Tulum Oasis is a refined mix of textures, materials and small pops of color on a neutral base that come together for a distinctive home, from the wooden entry gate and limestone backsplash to the stone vanity sinks and fountain. 
 
The truly grand great room has 17-foot ceilings of imported wood and a stunning two-sided fireplace separating two distinct seating areas. A floor-to-ceiling corner window wall floods the space with natural light and opens to the backyard pool. The backyard has a gas fire pit, large grassy lawn, BBQ grill and dining space — all with stunning mountain views.
 
With its warm limestone backsplash, the kitchen is a usable work of art, with two islands, open wood shelving, and Sub-Zero and Wolf appliances. The adjoining dining room is elegant, with a window wall to a stone patio and fountain. The home includes an open den off the living room and a flex space with a floor-to-ceiling glass corner slider. 
 
Natural elegance and materials extend to the five bedrooms with en suite bathrooms. The primary bedroom has a cozy fireplace, a serene outdoor space and a spacious walk-in closet. The luxurious bathroom features a dual-sink vanity, a large stone tub and open walk-in shower. 
 
The 1-acre property is a 15-minute drive to Old Town and Fashion Square, and 20 minutes to hiking at Camelback Mountain. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated. 

Tulum Oasis has been featured in Forbes.

title: St. Helena, CA — 2-Bed Villa
description:
Nestled next to vineyards near St. Helena, The Poolhouse more than lives up to its name. The 1,295-square-foot home with two bedrooms and two bathrooms doubles in size when you throw open multiple sliding doors to terraced seating and dining areas near the tranquil pool. The compact gourmet kitchen and outdoor barbeque area are sure to inspire culinary creativity. Add a glass of wine from one of the many neighboring wineries within walking distance, and you have Napa Valley living at its finest.

The decor, created by renowned designer Jay Jeffers, is a comfortable mix of rustic-chic and contemporary elements, and includes an indoor fireplace and an outdoor gas fire pit. Sliding doors from both bedrooms open to inviting outdoor spaces perfect for relaxing or working remotely.

The home comes turnkey, fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Homewood, CA — 3-Bed Villa
description: Welcome to the ultimate view home, with a two-story window wall facing Lake Tahoe. Anchored by a carved central post, the great room is wrapped by wood walls and beamed ceiling, and opens to a massive deck. The gated property includes 70’ of lake frontage, rare pier access and two buoys. It’s just steps from bike path and trail access, and a short drive to Tahoe City. On either side of the great room are the spacious primary and a guest suite; both open on to the deck. White tile and six-burner gas stove make cooking a joy. A spacious loft above the great room is perfect for reading or lake gazing. The lower level features a bunk room, bathroom, mudroom and laundry. The home is professionally managed and turnkey ready.

title: Cabo San Lucas, Mexico — 3-Bed Apartment With Pool
description:
Welcome to paradise at Las Ventanas al Paraiso in Los Cabos, Mexico. This stunning condo, managed by The Rosewood, offers an unparalleled luxury living experience. With 3 bedrooms and 3 and a half bathrooms spread across 3,864 square feet, this fully renovated gem is a haven of comfort and style.

Step inside and be greeted by the sleek and modern design, featuring built-in audio and top-of-the-line Sub-Zero appliances. Indulge in the ultimate relaxation on your private terrace, complete with a spa, pool, and meticulously manicured garden that boasts breathtaking ocean views. Immerse yourself in the lap of luxury with access to an array of hotel services, ensuring a truly pampered lifestyle.

As a resident, you’ll enjoy full access to all the remarkable amenities offered by The Rosewood. Indulge your taste buds at the 5+ restaurants, take a dip in the sparkling pools, or bask in the beauty of the expansive beach. Explore the shops, unwind at the spa, stay active at the gym, or perfect your swing at the golf and tennis courts. There’s even a dedicated kids area for little ones to enjoy. Embrace the epitome of coastal living and experience the lavishness of Las Ventanas al Paraiso in Los Cabos.

title: Mountain Village, CO — 4-Bed Villa Ski-in/Ski-out
description:
Just a short walk to the gondola or the grocery store, this 4-bedroom, 4.5-bathroom home offers you the best of the Trails Edge neighborhood. 
 
The bright, open-plan living area has spectacular mountain views and cozy spots for gathering in front of the fireplace and big-screen TV. The adjoining kitchen is ideal for preparing meals for family and friends, with plenty of counter space, high-end appliances and a wine fridge. Dining is easy at the lengthy stone island and an expansive dining room table or on the nearby deck.
 
All four bedrooms are serene escapes with en suite bathrooms. Check out the soaking tub, double vanities and tiled showers. An outdoor hot tub is nestled below the deck and a media room completes the lower level. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Park City, UT — 5-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
Built for year-round fun, Park Avenue is a new construction contemporary in popular Old Town. Just a 5-minute walk from the base of Park City Mountain Resort, the spacious home has a covered deck, a rooftop terrace with hot tub, a theater room and plenty of parking.

The inviting great room is bright and comfortable, with a marble-clad fireplace and glass doors to both a balcony and large covered deck. The sleek kitchen features high-end appliances (including a double oven), a large island and a pantry. The adjoining dining area easily accommodates 10. 

The upper level primary suite is a sanctuary, with its own balcony, a stunning black fireplace and a luxurious en suite bathroom offering two vanities and a tiled wet room with multiple shower heads and a soaking tub. The lower levels have four guest rooms with en suite bathrooms and an office, with an elevator connecting the floors. The rooftop terrace and hot tub feature amazing ski-run views. 

The home, which has a 2-car garage and driveway parking, is close to the shops and restaurants of charming Main Street. Park Avenue comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Napa, CA — 5-Bed Cabin With Fireplace
description:
Close to world-class wineries and iconic golf resorts, Olive Hill is the ultimate Napa Valley retreat. The bright, classic home is the perfect place for enjoying indoor/outdoor living, plus the 1,128-square-foot entertaining barn is outfitted with a pool table, kitchenette, bathroom and loft bedroom. 
 
The one-acre property includes a saltwater pool and spa, a heated covered patio, an outdoor kitchen, a dining pergola with a two-way fireplace, and sports and bocce courts. There’s even an enchanting playhouse and outdoor recreation area for the little ones. 
 
The living room is made for gathering with family and friends in front of the fireplace or on the adjacent covered patio. The white kitchen has rich wood beams and center island, a breakfast bar, stainless steel appliances and a casual dining space with a bay window. A formal dining room has built-in cabinets and a large table. 
 
The spacious primary suite features a garden-view window seat and a relaxing en suite bathroom with a sunken tub, tiled shower and two-sink vanity. The home has an office, laundry room, ample wine storage and a two-car garage. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Newport Beach, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
The best of Newport Beach living is at your doorstep in this 4-bedroom, 5-bathroom home on Balboa Island’s quiet west side. Glass walls in this contemporary Cape Cod open up the first-floor great room to the front patio, perfect for watching passersby – a favorite pastime on this friendly island. 

This home is made for entertaining, thanks to an open-plan main floor with a fireplace, dining area and a gourmet kitchen that opens to a spacious patio with a built-in barbecue. But it’s the third-floor rooftop that takes entertaining to new heights. It includes a covered outdoor kitchen and dining area, and an open patio that features a jacuzzi, fire pit and panoramic views of the bay, island and sunset. 
 
Take the stairs or the custom artisan glass elevator to four bedrooms on the second floor. The spacious primary has sliding doors to a private balcony and luxurious en suite bathroom with soaking tub. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Baja California Sur, Mexico — 4-Bed Home With Pool
description:
Overlooking the Sea of Cortez, this stunning Contemporary offers sweeping views, 4 primary suites, all with ocean views, 2 additional half baths, one inside and one on the terrace, and unparalleled indoor/outdoor living. Wood and stone have been used meticulously throughout to create livable luxury in this Baja paradise. Located in the Puerto Los Cabos community, the home has access to a coveted beach club called The Club Fundadores, just two minutes away on the included golf cart. 
 
A reflecting pool in the grand foyer is a nod to the water views that lay beyond from the great room. With its travertine floors and marble fireplace, this bright room features comfortable couches, a vast dining table and a gourmet kitchen with stainless steel appliances and a sleek island/breakfast bar. The room opens to a spacious patio, covered grilling area, pool and spa that look out to the sea. Steps lead to a rooftop terrace complete with a fire pit. The beautifully appointed bedroom suites open to the patio and offer relaxing spa-like bathrooms. The property is on ¾ of an acre and has 5,000 square feet of air conditioned space

title: San Diego, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Fireplace
description:
Gathering with family and friends is a breeze in Sail Bay, a bright Crown Point contemporary just a block from Sail Bay. Two roomy terraces, a vast rooftop deck and a sunny open concept great room are ideal for indoor-outdoor living. 

The spacious second-floor living/dining/kitchen area features soaring ceilings, 8 skylights, a sleek fireplace and doors to a terrace with bay views.
