The kitchen is chef-ready, with a large waterfall island, stainless steel appliances and tiled backsplash. Beyond the great room is a movie room that opens to a second terrace equipped with a dining table and built-in grill. Take the stairs to the spectacular rooftop deck offering a built-in gas fireplace and bar seating serving up year-round sunset views. 

There are three first-floor bedrooms, including the sophisticated primary suite with an en suite bathroom featuring a soaking tub, tiled shower and dual-sink vanity. The home, walkable to the bay and great restaurants, has a 3-car garage port. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Malibu, CA — 3-Bed Estate
description:
Perched on the sands of Malibu, known for its unmatched oceanfront real estate, this stunning contemporary retreat offers an iconic California coastal experience. With sweeping, unobstructed views of the Pacific and direct access to the sand, this fully renovated residence blends effortless elegance with modern comfort in one of the most sought-after stretches of coastline in the world.

The bright, open-concept layout is designed for seamless indoor-outdoor living, with walls of glass that slide away to reveal a spacious oceanfront deck perfect for sunbathing, dining al fresco, or simply listening to the waves. Inside, you'll find three serene bedrooms, a spa-inspired primary suite, and a chef’s kitchen outfitted with top-tier appliances and finishes. A cozy media room offers a place to unwind, while the private gated entry and secure parking provide peace of mind. Located just minutes from Nobu, Soho House, and the Malibu Country Mart, and within easy reach of Santa Monica and Los Angeles, this home is ideally situated for both relaxation and convenience. 

For swapping owners: The homes and neighborhood surrounding Clubhouse were impacted by the LA fires in January 2025.

title: Tahoma, CA — 3-Bed Cabin With Fireplace
description:
You’ll start to relax as soon as you enter the great room of this 3-bedroom, 2 and a half bath home near Lake Tahoe. The upper level great room is warmed by a central stone fireplace, hickory hardwood floors and vaulted, knotty alder ceilings. The open plan space includes a spacious kitchen with wood cabinets and an island with seating, as well as a formal dining area. An inviting primary bedroom with ensuite completes the main floor. 
 
The lower level includes two guest bedrooms and a family room, complete with wet bar. Outside, a hot tub awaits. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Malibu, CA — 3-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description:
Cool, casual and contemporary, this 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom Malibu retreat offers ocean views and indoor/outdoor living at its best. 
 
Pocketing Fleetwood glass doors connect the living room with a massive deck. Set against an ocean backdrop, the deck features a BBQ area, fireplace, two fire pits and a spa. A few steps down from the deck is a large grassy lawn and garden, with stunning Pacific vistas. 
 
The sleek kitchen has plenty of counter space, high-end appliances and casual island dining. Just steps away is a more formal dining area facing the garden. 
 
Folding glass doors in the generous primary suite lead to the deck and ocean views. The crisp en suite bathroom has a relaxing soaking tub and tiled shower. Two more bedrooms and a bathroom complete the main floor. The lower level consists of a laundry room and a studio suite with a three-quarter bathroom.
 
The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Newport Beach, CA — 5-Bed Villa With Fireplace
description:
Just steps from the sand, this Balboa Peninsula home offers spectacular views of the Pacific and Catalina. Enter through the Dutch front door to an open plan living area featuring a fireplace, an inviting dining area and glass doors to the oceanfront patio. The adjoining kitchen has a peninsula with a breakfast bar, granite countertops, a built-in fridge and loads of storage space. 
 
The spacious primary suite has a balcony perfect for catching the sun setting over the water, plus a fireplace and an en suite bathroom with dual sinks and a tiled shower. Down the hall are four guest bedrooms, and the home is topped by a bonus room and sun deck. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Palm Desert, CA — 4-Bed Villa
description:
Looking for a slice of privacy in Palm Desert? Tucked inside a walled yard on an elevated corner lot, this home is ideal for indoor/outdoor desert living. The open floor plan features 12-foot ceilings in the living room and a large glass door that opens to the pool, spa and views of the nearby mountains. The gourmet kitchen is every cook’s dream, with high-end appliances and lots of counter space. 
 
The spacious primary bedroom is a homeowner oasis, offering an en suite bathroom with an oversized shower and two large closets — and more mountain views. Three guest rooms await family and friends. The home, close to El Paseo shopping and dining, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Teton Village, WY — 3-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
Get ready for epic vistas and mountain adventures in this Granite Ridge townhome, just steps from the Four Seasons and the slopes, with panoramic mountain views. 
 
The great room, which opens to the deck, offers glowing wood ceilings, a grand stone fireplace and a window wall to frame the view. The gourmet kitchen with bar seating has an adjoining dining room flanked by windows. 
 
Wood ceilings and built-ins warm the primary bedroom, which has a private balcony and its own fireplace. The en suite bathroom has a tiled shower and dual-sink vanity. The home includes two guest rooms, a lower-level media room and patio. The home, near Grand Teton National Park, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Marco Island, FL — 4-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
This coastal contemporary residence offers two levels of refined waterfront living with bay views and direct access for time on the water. The open plan great room flows seamlessly to a waterfront patio with pool and spa, creating an easy indoor outdoor lifestyle. Just off the dining area, a covered lanai with fireplace and outdoor kitchen sets the tone for relaxed entertaining.

The bright gourmet kitchen features stainless steel appliances and a central island ideal for casual meals and gathering.

The primary suite opens to a private balcony with water views and includes a spa inspired bath with soaking tub, tiled shower, and dual vanities.

A three car garage with a rear overhead door allows for convenient yacht loading. Offered fully furnished and professionally designed.

title: Park City, UT — 5-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
Enjoy unobstructed views of Iron Mountain from Red Pine, a spacious new construction townhouse with an open plan design. The home’s modern vibe starts with a double-height fireplace and a window wall that opens to the patio and hot tub. The gourmet kitchen features stainless steel appliances and a large island with seating. The adjoining dining area is washed in sunlight and mountain views. A bedroom, bathroom and ski storage area round out the main floor. 
 
Two guest rooms and a luxurious primary suite are upstairs, just past a cozy loft office space. The suite includes a fireplace, walk-in closet and an en suite bathroom with soaking tub, dual vanities and a tile shower. The lower level has a large media room with wet bar and a modern four-bed bunk room. The home, near Park City Mountain slopes, is close to golf and bike trails, plus the shops and restaurants of Canyons Village. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Olympic Valley, CA — 4-Bed Cabin With Fireplace
description:
This 4-bedroom, 4.5-bathroom home is just minutes from the base of Squaw Valley Alpine Meadows Resort and 10 minutes from Lake Tahoe, making it easy to enjoy adventures year-round. 
 
The open floor plan is perfect for entertaining with family and friends. The living room features a sleek fireplace, cozy window seat, and doors to an expansive deck with mountain views, a fire pit and hot tub. The chef’s kitchen includes a waterfall island, wood cabinets and open shelving for a warm but modern look. 
 
A floating staircase leads up to the master suite, which is flooded with light and shadows from the towering pines. The primary bath includes a double vanity and tiled, walk-in shower. All three downstairs bedrooms have their own en suite bathrooms. 
 
The downstairs also features a media room and an oversize mudroom for outdoor gear. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Truckee, CA — 4-Bed Cabin Near Ski Resort
description:
What’s better than a mountain cabin near Lake Tahoe? The laid-back luxury of this fully remodeled 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom retreat with views of the Martis Valley. This fully remodeled, custom-built Northstar home is conveniently located between Truckee and the lake and includes the coveted Northstar HOA amenities; outdoor pools, kids area, tennis courts, and fitness center.
 
Backing to a private green space, this three-level home has a bright, open concept great room with a window wall, a soaring wood ceiling and an inviting stone fireplace. A spacious dining area and large decks are perfect for enjoying meals prepared on the professional-grade range in the sleek gourmet kitchen. 
 
The home includes two relaxing primary suites with spa-like en suite bathrooms, two guest bedrooms and a laundry area. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Lake Arrowhead, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Fireplace
description:
This beautiful lakefront home offers an expansive deck with stunning views of Lake Arrowhead, a gentle and direct walk to the shore, and a slip boat dock. Located on prestigious West Shore Road, the home is close to hiking, bicycling, skiing and fishing in an area known as “the Alps of Southern California.” 
 
The living room features a fireplace, vaulted ceilings and a window wall with doors to the deck and fire pit. Doors open from the dining room and kitchen to the deck shaded by trees. The main-floor primary bedroom has a beamed ceiling and en suite bathroom. 
 
In addition to guest rooms, the lower level has a family/game room with a fireplace, wet bar and doors to a covered patio.

title: Key Colony Beach, FL — 5-Bed Villa
description:
Blue skies and waterways await at Sunset Park. The whole family will love spending time at this Key Colony Beach waterfront retreat and dock, with full access to both the Gulf of Mexico and the Atlantic. Less than an hour from the Key West airport, this beach home away from home checks all the boxes.

Sunset Park is a serene family escape in a gated community, with amenities just minutes away. Take the included bikes out for a cruise to the beach, or to the Pickleball and Tennis courts 5 minutes away from the home.
 
Doors lead from the great room to a large covered outdoor kitchen and dining area, and an east-facing pool and patio. The gourmet kitchen features Thermador appliances, a large island and loads of counter space. An upstairs family room features a wet bar and sliding doors to a balcony with views of the canal. The primary bedroom offers a spa-like en suite bathroom with dual sink vanity, soaking tub and tiled shower. Four more bedrooms and bathrooms can easily accommodate family and friends. The home comes furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Bend, OR — 7-Bed Villa With Fireplace
description:
Welcome to Dancing Rock, a 7-bedroom, 8-bathroom mountain-modern retreat set within Caldera Links in the heart of Central Oregon. With 4,540 square feet of elevated design, the home features vaulted ceilings, expansive windows, a stone fireplace, and a chef’s kitchen that opens to a covered patio with a built-in grill, hot tub, and sweeping views of Mt. Bachelor. Thoughtfully designed for hosting, it includes four main-level suites, three upstairs bedrooms including a bunk room, and a game/media room, all complemented by a three-car garage and central air for year-round comfort.

Ownership at Dancing Rock comes with access to the vibrant Caldera Springs community, where outdoor adventure and laid-back luxury go hand in hand. Enjoy access to Forest House’s pool complex and fitness center, lakefront dining at Lake House and Shore Shack, golf at Caldera Links, and 13+ miles of forested trails. 

You'll also enjoy Forest Park’s pickleball and tennis courts, a sledding hill, climbing features, and a fenced dog park—perfect for active days with the whole family. Discovery Park offers expansive green space, a nature-inspired playground, and scenic spots for picnics or quiet reflection. The Outpost at Lake House makes it easy to gear up for paddling, biking, or trail adventures with complimentary rentals. Wherever the day takes you, Caldera Springs delivers a lifestyle that’s equal parts recreation, relaxation, and connection to nature. Paddle, bike, relax in one of several spas, or explore nearby Mt. Bachelor and Sunriver Resort.

title: Miami Beach, FL — 4-Bed Estate With Hot Tub
description:
Experience the best of coastal luxury at Casa Estrada, a fully renovated estate in Miami Beach’s sought-after Nautilus neighborhood. This elegant two-story home offers over 3,200 square feet of sun-filled living space, featuring a chef’s kitchen with top-tier appliances, custom wine storage, and seamless flow to the resort-style backyard with a saltwater pool, spa, covered summer kitchen, and lush, private landscaping. The spacious upstairs layout includes a serene primary suite with a private terrace, spa-like bath, and generous closet space, while a detached guest suite offers added flexibility for hosting or working from home.

Located just a 15–20 minute walk from the beach and boardwalk, this home offers easy access to oceanfront living and South Beach’s vibrant dining, arts, and entertainment. The rooftop deck is a true highlight—perfect for yoga, sunset cocktails, or entertaining under the stars. With impact-rated windows, a new roof, smart-home features, and white oak floors throughout, this turnkey retreat blends timeless charm with modern convenience in one of Miami’s most iconic coastal communities.

title: Newport Beach, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Fireplace
description:
Breezy days await you at Balboa Promenade, a beautifully designed, charming home perched along Balboa Island’s main walking route. Step out on your patio for epic people-watching and enjoy an easy 1.5-mile loop around the canal, or take a Duffy for a ride out and see the iconic surf spot, The Wedge. Plus, the home is only minutes away from Newport Beach’s pristine coastline, charming boutiques, high-end shops and lively restaurants. 

The charm continues in the home’s great room, with a fireplace, high quality finishes, beamed wood ceilings and multiple doors to the waterfront patio. A dream kitchen, with high-end stainless steel appliances, separates the formal living and dining space from a relaxed family room with doors to a sun-dappled side patio and an outdoor fireplace.

The upstairs primary suite is a private enclave, with a fireplace, French doors to a charming deck, and an en suite bathroom featuring a soaking tub, two-sink vanity and tiled shower.

The home offers easy access on and off the island through the semi-private alley directly from the two-car garage to the Balboa Bridge. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

Balboa Promenade has been featured in Ocean Home.

title: Truckee, CA — 3-Bed Villa Ski-in/Ski-out
description:
With a perfect location near Home Run Trail, ski-in, ski-out access, access to exclusive community amenities, and plenty of space for entertaining, this townhome is a real winner. When the ski boots are off, take the kids ice skating in The Village or stay home and enjoy the hot tub on the porch. During the warmer months, take the summer gondola outside your door to mountain bike or head to the lake just 10 minutes away.

The open floor plan features a bright great room with a sleek gas fireplace, and a gourmet kitchen with stainless steel appliances and a large island that seats six. Doors open to a deck complete with a hot tub, fire pit and mountain views. The home has two primary suites with luxurious bathrooms, a third bedroom upstairs, a fun bonus room with bunk beds and even ski storage.

This home includes an abundance of bonus amenties. Home Run is located in the Mountainside Community, with outfitter and concierge services and access to The Treehouse gathering space with swimming pools, fitness rooms, tennis facility, lounges, and more. Owners will also love the yoga studio and Play Acre play area for kids. Northstar pool, close proximity to the Ritz Carlton, and a mountain shuttle is also included. 

Begin ownership at Home Run with one year of interest-free financing, exclusive to.

title: La Jolla, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description:
Steps from La Jolla’s iconic Windansea Beach, this newly built architectural masterpiece epitomizes Southern California luxury. High ceilings and expansive floor-to-ceiling glass doors fill the home with abundant natural light, creating a seamless flow from indoors to out. With a full outdoor lounge and kitchen, as well as vast yard space, this home is perfect for adults, kids, and dogs to enjoy. Prepare your favorite family recipes in the state-of-the-art chef’s kitchen, and enjoy meals on the rooftop deck as the sun casts a warm glow over the sparkling Pacific Ocean.

Embrace the coastal lifestyle of La Jolla with an abundance of outdoor activities that set the stage for both adventure and sophisticated leisure. Head to the beach to surf, kayak or paddleboard, or relax on the sandy shore soaking up the sun. Stroll through the seaside village and explore the many boutiques and art galleries before heading home to your private backyard and heated pool. Surrounded by graceful palm trees and the sounds of the nearby ocean, this home is not just a sanctuary, but a celebration of luxury, comfort, and the very best that Southern California has to offer.

title: South Lake Tahoe, CA — 4-Bed Cabin With Hot Tub
description:
With Cove East Beach and the Truckee River within walking distance, this mountain contemporary home is the perfect launching spot for adventurous South Lake Tahoe living. The private, wooded backyard backs up to the waterfront community of Tahoe Keys. 
 
Light pours into the spacious great room, which features vaulted ceilings, brushed white oak flooring and a modern gas fireplace. The vast windows frame views of the surrounding forest. Doors open to the upper deck overlooking the land, complete with filtered mountain views. 
 
The kitchen epitomizes modern mountain living, with textured granite and smooth quartz counters, rich alder cabinets, waterfall island and stainless steel appliances, including a commercial style gas range. 
 
The calming primary suite includes two closets and a serene en suite with dual vanity, custom tile shower and freestanding soaking tub. 
 
The lower level includes three guest bedrooms and baths, a family room and access to the backyard. And it’s all just minutes to the lake, local breweries and restaurants. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: San Jose Del Cabo, Mexico — 5-Bed Home With Hot Tub
description:
Solana is a rare modern architectural masterpiece, crafted by renowned modernist Mexican architect Alan Machado. A celebration of modern luxury, Solana brings clean, striking design, expansive space, and the best of indoor-outdoor living.

With its unparalleled location and ocean views, Solana is set on an elevated ½-acre+ lot, with panoramic views of the shimmering Sea of Cortez and Palmilla. This home is designed for family and friends with plenty of space for entertaining, including an expansive deck, fully-equipped outdoor BBQ kitchen and lounge area, pool with a built-in hot tub, and outdoor shower. The 6th bedroom is perfect for additional guests, with extra privacy and a separate kitchenette.

Guest bedrooms are perfectly oriented to showcase stunning pool and sea views, and include walk-in closets and spa-like bathrooms. A surprise rooftop view deck, complete with dining area and lounge, offers an unrivaled vantage point and has its own private bathroom. The home's light-filled interiors with clean lines, soaring ceilings, and walls of glass that blur the boundaries between indoors and out. Exquisite stone and wood flooring add warmth and sophistication. A chef's kitchen offers two islands, a discreet hidden pantry and laundry room. 

Solana isn’t just a home—it’s your anchor on the Baja coast. With space to sleep up to 12 guests, it’s perfectly designed for hosting unforgettable gatherings with your friends and family.

title: Johns Island, SC — 5-Bed Villa With Fireplace
description:
Steps from Kiawah’s pristine beach, Surfsong Road pairs timeless coastal architecture with elevated design and craftsmanship. Behind the home’s private gate, direct access to Boardwalk 32 leads to the Atlantic shoreline, while inside, light-filled rooms and sweeping treetop and ocean views define every level of the residence.

The interiors showcase custom millwork, coffered ceilings, and Brazilian cherry hardwood floors. The chef’s kitchen features Wolf appliances, a six-burner gas cooktop, dual ovens, dual wine fridges, and richly veined granite countertops. Elegant living areas are framed by walls of windows that open to covered balconies, screened porches, and an expansive saltwater pool terrace surrounded by live oaks and palmettos. A private elevator connects each level, from the airy top-floor primary suite—complete with dual walk-in closets, a spa bath, and a soaking tub overlooking the ocean—to the guest suites and office below.

Located within Vanderhorst Beach, the home offers refined luxury, architectural integrity, and one of the island’s most coveted addresses.

title: Breckenridge, CO — 4-Bed Cabin With Mountain Views
description:
Sleek, elegant and spacious, newly built Ski Hill offers breathtaking mountain views and easy access to skiing and downtown Breckenridge. With 4,100 square feet, 4 bedrooms and 6½ bathrooms, this luxurious mountain escape is perfect for entertaining and relaxing. 

Expansive windows and folding glass doors frame the views and seamlessly connect indoor and outdoor spaces. Two spacious heated/snow melt decks have fireplaces, and the rear includes a top-of-the-line outdoor kitchen and 2 gas fire pits. 

A perfect harmony of natural materials and contemporary finishes, the open concept living space features a sleek fireplace wall, glass wine room and a sophisticated dining area. The gourmet kitchen has high-end appliances, custom cabinetry and a large island with waterfall edges. 

Tranquil and serene, the primary suite has a private balcony with panoramic views, a two-sided fireplace and an en suite bathroom with a dual-sink vanity, soaking tub and tiled shower. Each en suite bedroom is generously sized. 

A lower-level bunk room offers 4 queen beds and adjoins a spacious family room, complete with wet bar. Relax in the infra-red sauna right off the gym or the outdoor hot tub. The home comes professionally decorated and furnished.

title: West Palm Beach, FL — 4-Bed Villa
description:
Tucked behind gates and lush landscaping, 309 Greymon is a modern tropical retreat designed for effortless living and relaxed entertaining in one of South Florida’s most vibrant destinations. Located in West Palm Beach’s coveted Southend neighborhood, the home places owners minutes from the waterfront, beaches, Worth Avenue shopping, and the restaurants and culture of downtown Palm Beach.

Built with solid all-concrete construction, the residence offers 3,647 square feet of thoughtfully designed space with four bedrooms and four-and-a-half baths. Inside, soaring 10-foot ceilings, graceful arched doorways, and a gas fireplace create an atmosphere that feels both refined and welcoming. At the center of the home, a custom chef’s kitchen with premium finishes opens to generous living and dining areas designed for gathering.

Expansive bifold doors dissolve the boundary between indoors and out, revealing a private outdoor sanctuary. A heated saltwater pool and spa anchor the backyard, surrounded by lush tropical landscaping that creates a sense of complete seclusion. An outdoor kitchen sets the stage for long evenings of dining and entertaining, while a steam room and outdoor shower bring a spa-like wellness experience home. Upstairs, a large balcony offers an elevated space to relax or host friends while overlooking the serene grounds below.

Modern conveniences add ease to every stay, including a whole-home indoor and outdoor sound system, LED camera security system, and generous parking with a garage and four-car driveway.
Fully furnished and professionally managed, the home is turnkey and ready to enjoy from day one. 

Whether it’s a winter escape, a long weekend by the pool, or a base for exploring Palm Beach’s celebrated coastal lifestyle, this peaceful home offers a seamless way to experience the best of South Florida.

title: San Jose Del Cabo, Mexico — 5-Bed Home Near Beach
description:
Have it all with Marea: breathtaking Sea of Cortez views, private cinema room, wine cellar, beach club access and 5 bedrooms in 6,176 square feet of luxurious space. Set in one of San José del Cabo’s most exclusive communities, this new construction retreat is on the renowned golf course of Puerto Los Cabos. 

Family and friends will love gathering in the sophisticated and spacious great room that opens to a covered sea-facing deck. Prepare meals in the sleek gourmet kitchen and grill in the outdoor barbecue area. Five relaxing bedrooms with spa-like bathrooms await after a day enjoying the shops and restaurants of Fundadores, Puerto Los Cabos. This sleek, modern home offers the ultimate in privacy and security with 24/7 gated access.

title: Heber City, UT — 5-Bed Villa
description: Experience elevated mountain living in SkyRidge Mountain Community at Mayflower Mountain, ideally located just across from Deer Valley Resort East Village and moments from the shores of the Jordanelle. Offered at $6,490,000, this exceptional residence delivers an exhilarating four-season lifestyle surrounded by preserved open space, panoramic water views, and world-class recreation. Set against sweeping vistas of the Jordanelle and the iconic Jordanelle dam, the home showcases dramatic vaulted ceilings, expansive windows, and multiple fireplaces-including in the primary suite and both living rooms-creating a warm, refined mountain ambiance. Designed for effortless entertaining, the open-concept great room flows seamlessly into a chef's kitchen appointed with premium Wolf Sub Zero appliances, an oversized island, and a fully equipped butler's pantry. Thoughtfully designed for hosting and retreat, the home features all ensuite bedrooms, a custom bunk room for guests, a private theatre room, and a dedicated home gym. Aprs-ski evenings and summer gatherings are elevated by generous indoor-outdoor living spaces, while the heated driveway ensures year-round ease and convenience. Offered turnkey-with furnishings negotiable-this residence is ready to be enjoyed from day one. As a SkyRidge owner, you'll enjoy prime access to the community's golf course and clubhouse, equestrian amenities, and the private SkyRidge Clubhouse featuring a pool, hot tub, fitness center, yoga studio, lounge, and luxury indoor golf and game simulators. Miles of hiking, biking, and equestrian trails connect you to the surrounding shoreline and open space, while premier skiing, dining, and shopping are just minutes away. Live where every season brings a new adventure-luxury, recreation, and refined mountain living converge in one of the most exciting emerging resort communities in the West.Square footage figures are provided as a courtesy estimate only and were obtained from building plans. Buyer to verify all.

title: Kiawah Island, SC — 3-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description:
Experience Kiawah Island, South Carolina’s coastal treasure, in this immaculate oceanfront villa. Recently remodeled, this home features luxury wide plank (LVP) flooring throughout, a large, stylish kitchen equipped with stainless steel appliances, an oversized island, quartz countertops, and ample cabinet storage. The open floor plan makes the perfect space for entertaining, and the covered deck offers a serene retreat, perfect for savoring a quiet moment with a refreshing drink while taking in the tranquil views of the sandy shoreline. With direct beach access just steps away, you can easily stroll or cycle the miles of pristine coast or relax with your latest beach read.
 
Spend your days in leisure with access to golf courses, tennis courts and pools at the Governors Club and The Sandcastle, which is available to all 1/8 owners. Or if you’re looking for a quick day trip, explore nearby Charleston to get a true taste of southern charm and hospitality.

title: Hilton Head Island, SC — 6-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description:
With a third-row beachwalk location, this new construction home is all about approachable elegance, starting with the custom curved staircase, classic columns and shiplap walls in the entryway. It continues in the light-filled great room, with box beam ceilings, built-in storage and a traditional fireplace with a modern tile surround. The dining area offers a pool view, and the gorgeous gourmet kitchen has a quartz-topped island and separate breakfast bar, stainless steel appliances and a wet bar. 
 
The primary suite, one of 6 bedrooms, opens to the backyard patio and features a spa-like en suite bathroom with a soaking tub, tiled shower and two vanities. A bonus room, complete with wet bar, is great for games and hanging out. Mature landscaping provides privacy for the backyard pool, overflowing hot tub, and outdoor cooking area. The home, which has 2 laundry rooms and a 4-stop elevator, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Isle Of Palms, SC — 6-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description:
There’s plenty of room for relaxation in this newly renovated, 4-story Isle of Palms home. The spacious retreat has 6 bedrooms, 4.5 bathrooms, an inviting pool and easy beach access. 

The first floor features an exercise room, half-bath, a covered outdoor dining area and ping-pong table, and a sunny pool and spa. The second floor is home to 5 bedrooms, a cozy TV area and a generous screened porch with stairs leading to the pool. 

The bright, open plan third floor is all about entertaining: a comfortable living area with fireplace, a gourmet kitchen with large island and stainless steel appliances, a dining area that seats 10, and a screened porch perfect for catching the sunset. Down the hall is the primary suite with a Juliet balcony, and en suite bathroom with an oversized tub, walk-in shower and double vanity. 

The fourth floor includes a private office and a balcony with ocean views. The home, which has an elevator, is close to restaurants and Sullivan’s Island, and is just 20 minutes from historic downtown Charleston.

title: Heber City, UT — 5-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
High above Deer Valley Resort with sweeping views across Jordanelle Reservoir, Deer Peak is a five-bedroom, seven-bath mountain retreat designed for every season. Perched within the SkyRidge community, the home pairs expansive alpine scenery with thoughtfully designed interiors and resort-style amenities just minutes from the slopes.

At the center of the home, a chef’s kitchen with Wolf and Sub-Zero appliances opens into generous living and dining areas designed for gathering. Large windows frame uninterrupted views of the surrounding mountains and lake, creating a dramatic backdrop from morning coffee through sunset.

Built for hosting and relaxing in equal measure, the home features a private movie theater with seating for eight, along with multiple indoor and outdoor spaces where friends and family can settle in after a day on the mountain. More than 2,000 square feet of heated decks and patios extend the living space outdoors, while an in-ground hot tub and firepit invite evenings under the alpine sky. Modern comforts make every stay seamless. Radiant heat warms the floors, while heated patios and driveway simplify winter living. Smart home technology allows owners to control lighting, climate, and security with ease.

Located within the SkyRidge Resort community, owners are just minutes from skiing at Deer Valley and boating, paddleboarding, and trails around Jordanelle Reservoir. Planned amenities including golf course, an equestrian center, clubhouse, pool, spa, fitness studio, dining, and a private shuttle to the gondola elevate the experience even further.

Fully furnished and professionally managed by, Deer Peak is turnkey and ready to enjoy from day one.

title: San Jose Del Cabo, Mexico — 4-Bed Home With Pool
description:
With an inviting pool and vast covered patio, this private retreat is the ultimate Los Cabos destination for year-round indoor/outdoor living. With nearly 5,000 square feet, Casa Bella is perfect for entertaining, offering 5 bedrooms, 4½ bathrooms and an expansive living room with access to the stunning lounge area, spa and pool. 

The great room includes a full bar, dining space and a gourmet kitchen with stainless steel appliances. The kitchen opens to a covered BBQ area and seating so cooking and serving are easy. The tranquil primary suite opens to a cozy seating area with views of the hills, and offers an en suite bathroom with dual-sink vanity, tiled shower and a makeup table. The home also serves up views of the hills, golf course and bay.

Ownership of this home includes membership to the nearby Palmilla Dunes club with multiple pools, restaurants, fitness center, sporting facilities, theater and more. Just 2 minutes away is a swimmable beach, and just a 7 minute drive to Palmilla shoppes, easily accessible with two brand new golf carts, exclusive to the property for owner use.

title: Jackson Hole, WY — 3-Bed Apartment With Mountain Views
description:
Welcome to West District, a new construction condominium with stunning town and mountain views. Light pours through the expansive floor-to-ceiling windows of this modern 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom home that’s close to everything Jackson has to offer. 

The open plan living area includes a relaxing area for gathering around the fireplace and dining table. The sleek kitchen features Wolf and Sub-Zero appliances and a dine/prep island. Head outside to the private deck to enjoy the hot tub and BBQ area. 

The primary suite is a relaxing retreat, with an en suite bathroom with a double sink vanity and a wetroom with rain shower and soaking tub. In addition to a guest room, the third bedroom is a cozy loft. 

The home, which includes garage parking and enhanced security entry systems, is close to the Center for the Arts as well as many outdoor activities. West District has been professionally decorated, and the home's design has been featured in Forbes and Architectural Digest.

title: Napa, CA — 4-Bed Cabin With Hot Tub
description:
Perched atop a gentle knoll in Napa Valley's coveted Coombsville area, this luxurious 4-bedroom home offers contemporary indoor/outdoor living and multiple epic views of some 800 olive trees on the nearly six-acre estate.

Start in the great room, with its 23-foot ceiling, sleek fireplace wall and sliding glass wall that opens to a patio with a pool, spa and built-in outdoor kitchen. Stretch into the adjoining dining area and gourmet kitchen with its 10-foot-long island and handmade frameless cabinets. Three luxurious bedrooms with en suite bathrooms complete the main level. A fourth flex-room and loft with full bath plus an added bunk room provide plenty of room for guests.

Climb the glass railing stairs to a cozy casual space overlooking the great room, perfect for screens and gaming. Then slide open the glass doors to vast decks, and take in more of the valley’s rolling terrain. On the lower level, you’ll find a wine cellar with tasting space. The home is earthquake and fire-resistant and comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

Located in the heart of Coombsville, the home provides no shortage of things to enjoy. You can take a hot air balloons over the sky, prepare an in-home wine tasting on the deck and watch the sunset over the mountains from the comfort of the heated pool. Drive just down the street to enjoy amazing wineries like Shadybrook Estate (named best winery in California by Yelp) and golfing at the Napa Valley Country Club, or take a day trip to San Francisco just an hour away.

title: Truckee, CA — 4-Bed Villa
description:
A wall of windows frames views of the second fairway and warms the great room of this 4-bedroom, 5-bathroom Mountain Modern home. The bright and airy great room features vaulted ceilings and a cozy fireplace. It flows into a formal dining area and a spacious kitchen with stainless steel appliances. The main floor has two primary suites with well-appointed bathrooms.
 
The upstairs has an expansive loft overlooking the great room, two more bedrooms with en suite bathrooms, and an office. Multiple decks, a hot tub and a fire pit are set amid mature landscaping, making this a tranquil treat close to everything North Tahoe has to offer. 

Homeowners and their guests have access to the Tahoe Mountain Club year round amenities: access to private ski-in/ski-out venues, fitness center, youth club, golfing and tennis. The Tahoe Mountain Club also offers a shuttle to and from Northstar California Ski Resort for members. Unaccompanied guests and home swap owners do not have access to The Tahoe Mountain Club.

The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Truckee, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Fireplace
description:
Like a luxurious mountain lodge, this 4-bedroom, 5-bathroom timber-frame home has a great room with a soaring, beamed ceiling, stone floors and an inviting fireplace. This large, newly renovated home is within Truckee’s Northstar village with access to shuttle and amenities within a 10 minute private path walk to the village - close to world-class skiing and paths for hiking and biking. 
 
The gourmet kitchen features beautiful wood cabinets, a massive island for prep and eating, and stainless steel appliances. Dine in the adjacent formal dining space or cozy breakfast area. Or, open the doors and choose the outdoor kitchen and al fresco dining area with views of the towering trees.
 
The lodge vibe continues upstairs in the primary suite, with a beamed ceiling, private balcony and a generous en suite bathroom with dual-sink vanity. A charming bunk room includes plenty of play space for kids.
 
The lower level has a comfy media room with a fireplace and access to the ground-level patio and hot tub. Two more bedrooms and bathrooms offer plenty of room for visitors. Owners and their guests have access to community amenities including outdoor pools, a children’s play area, tennis courts and a fitness center. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: La Quinta, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
Escape to your own desert oasis at this private La Quinta home. Desert Mirage is a 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom retreat located within walking distance to the Indian Wells Tennis Gardens and just minutes from PGA golf courses and festival grounds.

Desert Mirage’s open concept spaces offer seamless indoor/outdoor living. Large double doors open to a lush, spacious backyard with beautiful floral hedge walls and palm trees for the ultimate privacy. The pool’s tanning shelf, attached spa, and water feature make it easy to unwind. Soak up some sun on the chaise lounge chairs or gather in the 6-person outdoor seating area. The outdoor grill and large dining area make it easy to feast with friends and family under the sun (or stars).

Back inside, bright interiors, vaulted ceilings, spa-like bathrooms and amenities and comfortable bedding provide a calming setting year-round. A fully equipped kitchen supplies everything you need to entertain guests.

The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated. A virtual property manager will onboard owners and answer stay questions. Monthly operating costs are less than traditional shares as cleanings are charged per stay and light check-out tasks are outlined in the home manual.

title: Palm Springs, CA — 4-Bed Cabin With Fireplace
description:
This head-turning 4-bedroom, 5-bath home lies in the heart of Palm Springs’ Historic Tennis Club neighborhood. The sophisticated single-level home offers stunning views of the San Jacinto Mountains and expansive entertaining spaces inside and out.
 
Vast and vaulted, the bright great room features a wall of windows with unobstructed sightlines to the private outdoor space with a distinctive focal point: a sparkling lap pool with six arcing fountains and a spa. The great room also features a striking free-standing fireplace with round stainless steel hood. 
 
The sleek look continues in the kitchen with stainless appliances, modern cabinetry, a massive island and a wall that opens to a covered patio space for dining and relaxing. 
 
The home has four sleek bedroom suites, ensuring there’s plenty of space for everyone to have their own private oasis. 
 
Solar panels on the roof are perfect for sunny Palm Spring days. In addition to being next to the Tennis Club, this property is close to hiking trails and downtown Palm Springs. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Fort Lauderdale, FL — 5-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
Take your pick: Stroll through the front gate and lush courtyard, or moor your boat at the private dock. However you get to this modern waterfront home, you’ll be glad you did. 
 
The light-filled home has 5 bedrooms, 4.5 bathrooms and an open floor plan centered around a window-walled great room opening to a vast covered deck, perfect for dining and relaxing near the pool and spa. 
 
The sleek chef’s kitchen includes high-end appliances, a massive island and a cozy breakfast nook with a work station. The main floor also features the well-appointed primary bedroom with a walk-in closet, en suite spa bathroom and access to the patio. Upstairs is a relaxed sitting area and four welcoming guest suites. 
 
The home, within walking distance to Las Olas shopping and dining, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Napa, CA — 4-Bed Farmhouse With Fireplace
description:
With spectacular views of San Francisco Bay, Mount Tam and the Napa Valley floor, this modern farmhouse offers spacious living inside and out. The 4-bedroom, 5-bathroom home sits on 1.17 acres, just minutes from Napa and Yountville. 
 
The relaxing great room has vaulted, exposed-beam ceilings with clerestory windows and floor-to-ceiling glass walls. The gourmet kitchen includes a large center island with counter seating, Thermador appliances, an adjoining caterer’s kitchen and an informal dining space. The formal dining room shares a double-sided fireplace with a second family room. 
 
Glass doors from the great room and dining room open to a 1,500-square-foot deck showcasing the magnificent views. The deck is also accessed from two en suite bedrooms and the luxurious primary suite, which includes a spa bathroom with soaking tub and separate tiled shower. 
 
The outdoor entertaining space continues around the infinity edge pool with Baja shelf and spa. To make hosting even easier, the attached pool house features a kitchen with counter seating for six and a bathroom/changing room. And to complete the Napa experience, this serene and private property includes a 1,000-plus bottle wine cellar. The home, which includes a 2-car garage and laundry, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Jackson, WY — 3-Bed Cabin
description:
This new construction townhome in the heart of Jackson offers three stories of luxury, easily accessed via an in-home elevator. The open plan ground floor has gracious 12' ceilings with dramatic floor-to-ceiling windows, plank wood floors and a modern fireplace. The gourmet kitchen features custom cabinetry, Wolf and Sub-Zero appliances and a wine bar. 
 
The second floor includes a bright office space, guest bedroom and full bathroom. The third floor has an additional guest room, laundry area, and a primary suite with large walk-in closet, dual-sink vanity, tile-and-glass shower and soaking tub. A rooftop deck offers a hot tub, fire pit and seating area. The lower level leads to the garage and a second laundry room. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Napa, CA — 5-Bed Villa With Fireplace
description:
This 5-bedroom, 5-bath Silverado Trail home is like striking gold. Located on 1.5 acres on a private road at the base of Stag’s Leap near Yountville, this brand-new home maximizes views of vineyards on the valley floor and the Mayacamas Mountains to the west. 
 
Designed with second home living in mind, the home’s indoor living spaces flow easily into outdoor entertaining areas. A highlight is the backyard pool and spa with a covered outdoor kitchen and cozy seating around the fire pit. 
 
Wood ceiling and floors warm the modern great room which features a fireplace wall with built-in storage and plenty of spots for relaxing. The open gourmet kitchen has a spacious island and is just steps from a dining table that seats eight.
 
The elegant primary bedroom offers a massive closet and a relaxing en suite bathroom, complete with double sinks, soaking tub and separate shower. Three guest bedrooms with en suite bathrooms and a laundry room make it easy to accommodate family and friends. 
 
More relaxing can be found in the lower-level game and media room with a full-service wet bar. And there’s no reason to skip a workout thanks to a fully equipped exercise room. There’s also a guest room and bathroom, as well as access to the three-car garage. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Hilton Head Island, SC — 6-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description:
Perfect for a large group of family and friends, this second row ocean home has recently been meticulously renovated and features elegant gathering spaces inside and out. 
 
Come up the broad driveway, bordered by mature landscaping, and enter through double doors to a welcoming foyer. The main-floor sitting area features a tray ceiling and wet bar, and opens to the patio, pool and sun porch. Upstairs, under a soaring wood ceiling, the spacious great room has a fireplace, generous dining space and a gorgeous chef’s kitchen with stainless steel appliances and two islands. 
 
The relaxing primary suite has a curved balcony overlooking the pool and en suite bathroom with tile shower and dual vanities. Among the multiple guest bedrooms is a delightful bunk room. The home, which has two washers and dryers, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Calistoga, CA — 7-Bed Estate
description:
Raise a glass to the ultimate Napa Valley escape. Set on 4 acres just outside Calistoga, this extraordinary estate offers 8,300 square feet of thoughtfully designed living and entertaining space across three distinct structures. With 2.5 acres of producing vineyards and unobstructed views of the Palisades and Mount Saint Helena, the setting is both peaceful and picturesque.

The 4,625-square-foot main residence is tailored for effortless indoor-outdoor living, featuring a dramatic great room with wood-beamed ceilings, a chef’s kitchen with an expansive island, and a glass-enclosed wine room. The main house includes 4 bedrooms with en suite bathrooms, a living room with fireplace, media room, and billiards room.

The 1,000-square-foot guest house offers two additional bedrooms with en suite baths and two outdoor showers. A separate 2,750-square-foot modern barn provides flexible space with a casual lounge, an additional bedroom and two bathrooms, and a recreational zone with table tennis and a roll-up garage door that opens to the outdoors. The grounds feature an outdoor kitchen and bar, a fire pit, a 50-by-20-foot pool and spa, courts for bocce, pickleball and basketball, and a large covered patio.The home, guest house and barn come fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: San Jose Del Cabo, Mexico — 6-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
Miramar is the stuff of dreams: A new-construction, 10,000-square-foot waterfront villa in Puerto Los Cabos. This luxurious home features vast indoor-outdoor living and dining areas, plus an entry reflecting pool, a heated pool and spa, and 1,500 square feet of patio space. 

Modern design mixes with natural materials like the marble floors to create an open, luxurious and livable escape with incredible ocean views. The home has 6 spacious bedrooms, including 2 primary suites with spa-like bathrooms and dual-sink vanities, indoor-outdoor showers and a cozy fire pit.

Miramar, part of a gated community, has 2 golf carts and is close to golf courses and beach clubs.

title: Vail, CO — 4-Bed Villa Near Ski Resort
description:
Tucked along coveted Forest Road, this mountain modern retreat offers a seamless balance of luxury and nature. Four bedrooms and four and a half baths are thoughtfully designed across three levels, with rich stone walls, warm hardwood floors, and soaring ceilings that echo the alpine surroundings. Steps from Gore Creek and moments from Born Free ski run, Vail Village, and Lionshead Village, the home combines privacy with exceptional proximity.

The vaulted great room is anchored by a wall of sliding glass doors that frame sweeping views of Bald Mountain and the creek. A gourmet kitchen with stainless appliances, a generous island, and an adjacent dining area makes hosting effortless. Upstairs, the serene primary suite offers a private balcony, a spa-like bathroom with dual vanities, jetted tub, and steam shower. Three guest suites are situated on the lower level, alongside a media room designed for cozy evenings. Additional amenities include a dedicated office, mudroom and laundry, ample ski storage, and the convenience of an elevator.

Designed for year-round enjoyment, the outdoor living spaces invite relaxation after days on the slopes or trails. Gather on the stone patio beside the fire pit, soak in the hot tub under the stars, or unwind by the creek with the sounds of rushing water as your backdrop. Fully furnished and professionally decorated, this residence delivers an elevated mountain lifestyle in the heart of Vail.

title: Aspen, CO — 4-Bed Villa
description:
Bold, clean, contemporary design makes this 4-bedroom, 6-bathroom home a real show-stopper, with luxurious living spread throughout two floors and outdoor entertaining areas. This house is located on a quiet cul-de-sac and is a short walk to downtown, across a fun little pedestrian bridge over the Roaring Fork River. The home borders Snyder Park, with its ponds, flowing creeks and tranquil spaces.
 
The top floor is all about gathering spaces, with cathedral ceilings and abundant natural light. The open living room offers a modern gas fireplace and dramatic windows framing the view through the tall trees. Doors open to an expansive deck with a grill, dining space and cozy seating around the gas fire pit. Just inside is the formal dining space and the gourmet kitchen with stainless steel appliances and a generous island for prep and casual meals.
 
Downstairs is all about relaxing: Four spacious bedrooms with en suite bathrooms, a large, comfy den/media room, perfect for late night gatherings. The master suite boasts a green space with a sleek patio and another fire pit. Topping off the home: a rooftop deck with a hot tub, offering a 360-degree view of the mountains. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Jackson, WY — 6-Bed Cabin With Mountain Views
description:
This contemporary 6-bedroom, 7-bathroom home is perfectly positioned atop Spring Creek Ridge, offering breathtaking views of Grand Teton and the surrounding landscape. Set on 5 private acres, the property seamlessly blends modern design with its natural surroundings, featuring wood and concrete exteriors, a tranquil water feature, multiple patios, and living roofs that harmonize with the environment.

Expansive windows are thoughtfully placed to frame the scenery, transforming the views into dynamic works of art. The main living spaces provide 360-degree panoramas, anchored by a double-sided fireplace with custom hammered steelwork. The kitchen combines style and function with maple cabinetry, Viking appliances, and a central island for both preparation and casual dining.

The primary suite is a haven of comfort and elegance, featuring stunning views, a cozy sitting area with a fireplace, and access to a private patio. The en suite bathroom invites relaxation with a soaking tub, tiled shower, and towel warmer. Four additional guest bedrooms, each with its own bathroom, ensure plenty of space for visitors.

The lower level is dedicated to wellness and convenience, with a sauna, exercise room, bunk room, and laundry facilities. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

Harvest Ridge has been featured in Elite Traveler.

title: Breckenridge, CO — 5-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
This modern mountain home maximizes its views of the Rocky Mountains' Tenmile Range. The thoroughly renovated 5-bedroom, 4-bathroom home sits on just under a half-acre and faces south. 
 
The bright, open floor plan includes a double-story great room with a massive stone fireplace and doors to a sunny wrap-around deck. The living room flows into a formal dining space, a cozy conversation area and a gourmet kitchen with expansive island for prep and eating.
 
Upstairs, the primary bedroom includes a fireplace, doors to a private balcony and an en suite bathroom with a dual-sink vanity, soaking tub and tiled shower. Two bright, spacious guest bedrooms and baths complete the upper level. The lower level features two more bedrooms, a bathroom and a spacious family room with kitchenette. 
 
The home is just a short walk to the Peak 8 shuttle and the Breckenridge Nordic Center, and an easy stroll to Breckenridge’s charming Main Street. The home, which includes a 2-car garage, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Hilton Head Island, SC — 6-Bed Villa
description:
Located just three rows back from the ocean, this 6-bedroom, 8-bathroom home puts you close to everything Hilton Head Island has to offer. Walk just a few minutes outside your door to sought-after South Beach and explore the area’s best shops and restaurants.

Like its name, Sea Breeze is bright and airy inside and out. Sunlight pours through the home’s tall elegant windows and illuminates the open-plan, coastal-inspired entertaining space. A spacious gourmet kitchen is equipped with modern finishes and high-end, stainless steel appliances. Outside, you’ll find a large covered porch complete with an outdoor kitchen and a fireplace — the perfect place to gather around with family and friends. A waterfall spa also flows into a wrap-around pool.

Sea Breeze’s 6 bedrooms, including a room with two bunk beds, offer plenty of space for everyone in your crew. The home also has a private courtyard and 3-car garage and comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Newport Beach, CA — 3-Bed Villa
description:
Just moments from the beach and the vibrant energy of Balboa Peninsula, Seaboard captures the essence of Southern California luxury living. Designed across three light-filled levels, this modern coastal home blends indoor-outdoor spaces, sophisticated design, and effortless proximity to the Pacific.

The expansive rooftop deck is the home’s crown jewel, offering panoramic ocean views, a built-in fireplace, and a covered loggia for year-round entertaining. Inside, an open-concept main level features folding glass doors that connect the living and dining areas to the fresh ocean air. A sleek black tile fireplace anchors the great room, while the chef’s kitchen showcases quartz countertops, custom cabinetry, a large island, lighted floating shelves, and high-end stainless appliances.

The second-level primary suite opens to a private balcony and includes a spa-inspired bathroom with dual vanities, a walk-in shower, and a generous walk-in closet. Guest suites feature private balconies, while a third-level loft with its own full bath doubles as a flexible retreat or fourth bedroom. Additional amenities include a two-car garage, laundry area, and designer furnishings throughout.

Ideally located in the heart of Newport Beach, this home is steps from sandy shores, oceanfront dining, and the boutiques of Balboa and Lido Marina Village. Seaboard offers a turnkey opportunity to experience California’s coastal lifestyle at its most refined.

title: Park City, UT — 4-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
Just 50 steps from the Town Lift and adjacent to new bike trails, Snowcrest is a luxurious new construction home in sought-after Old Town. The 4-bed, 4.5-bath home includes a spacious lower level family/game room with a ski/mud room right off the Crescent Tram walkway — perfect for snow-loving family and friends. 
 
A sleek fireplace anchors the open plan great room, with doors leading to a deck with mountain views. The adjoining kitchen offers high-end appliances and a central island for prep and eating.
 
The bright primary suite has a beautiful fireplace and en suite bathroom. The home also includes a den, perfect for remote work. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Johns Island, SC — 5-Bed Cabin With Fireplace
description:
This striking coastal contemporary offers three levels of outdoor living spaces, peaceful Lowcountry surroundings and vast views of the ocean and marsh — all in the heart of Ocean Park. Featured in Beautiful Kitchens & Baths and Cottage Living, the home’s crisp interiors are designed for modern lifestyles. 
 
The central living room and kitchen open to outdoor spaces for effortless gatherings. The laid-back living room has a fireplace with custom built-ins and windows that frame the view. The cottage-style kitchen features soaring windows and a partially vaulted ceiling, floating shelves, a waterfall island and stainless steel Wolf and Sub-Zero appliances that include a wine chiller and beverage fridge. Custom cabinets continue into the breakfast room which overlooks the marsh and opens to a screened porch. 
 
The elegant primary suite, also on the main floor, has dual vanities, a soaking tub and a walk-in shower. The home has four guest rooms with en suite bathrooms. The two south-facing suites have access to the top floor outdoor terrace which overlooks the marsh. 
 
A backyard fire pit sits at the marsh edge, and Kiawah’s pristine beach and the famed Ocean Course are just a short bike ride away. Governors Club memberships are available for all shares, customizable by owner preference. In addition, one Kiawah Island Club membership is available to the first owner to come in at 1/4 share or greater. The home — close to hiking trails, the Treehouse and Marsh House — comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Kiawah Island, SC — 4-Bed Villa With Infinity Pool
description:
Take your pick of water activities at this Kiawah Island home: a private saltwater pool or a three minute walk to the beach. Set on a half-acre, Eugenia offers outdoor options galore with multiple decks and a screen porch, plus quick access to championship golf, Night Heron Park and the amenities of West and East Beach Villages. Access to The Sandcastle Clubhouse is included with the home and Governors Club memberships are available for all shares.

The home features an expansive open layout with multiple gathering spaces, including a den, office, and breakfast nook. The chef’s kitchen is equipped with dual dishwashers, a large island, wine storage, and a wet bar, while the adjacent dining area opens to a covered deck with a built-in grill—ideal for outdoor entertaining. A private elevator provides easy access across all floors, and a mudroom and double washer/dryer setup make cleanup a breeze after a day in the surf.

Outdoors, enjoy a heated infinity pool with a fire pit, surrounded by tranquil lagoon views and lush landscaping. The home also includes a 2-car garage with EV charger, and access to Kiawah’s extensive biking trails, championship golf, and resort amenities. Whether you’re hosting family for the holidays or enjoying a quiet coastal weekend, this turnkey retreat makes island living effortless.

title: Newport Beach, CA — 3-Bed Villa With Sauna
description:
Waterfront Newport Island living is made easy in this new construction contemporary Farmhouse with 29 feet of frontage and a private dock. With paneled ceilings, wide-plank floors and great entertaining spaces inside and out, this home is the ultimate in casual chic. The main level offers sweeping water views from the great room with its sleek fireplace and glass doors opening to the private dock. The chef’s kitchen has a waterfall edge island and a walk-in pantry, and is just steps from a bright dining area. 
 
Walk or take the elevator to the second level where three spacious bedrooms and en suite bathrooms await. The luxurious primary suite has a deck, vaulted ceilings, a fireplace and a barn door opening to the spa bathroom with a soaking tub, tiled shower and dual-sink vanity. Luxe extras include a bonus room, a dry sauna and a rooftop deck complete with a bar, spa, fire pit, grill, and Duffy boat. 
 
The home, located close to Lido Marina Village and Fashion Island, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: San Diego, CA — 4-Bed Cabin With Hot Tub
description:
This Mission Beach home is just steps from the sand and designed with entertaining in mind. The 4-bedroom, 3.5 bathroom coastal contemporary offers four levels of relaxed luxury, including nearly 750 square feet of decks. 
 
The great room is bathed in natural light and features polished concrete floors and a built-in bar and media wall with a sleek fireplace. A window wall opens to an enclosed patio space with BBQ grill, stunning water views and access to the bay. 
 
The open-concept kitchen is a chef’s dream, with walnut cabinets, Bosch appliances, quartzite countertops and peninsula seating. At the top of the floating walnut staircase are two guest bedrooms, a hall bathroom and a primary suite with glass sliders leading to one of the home’s three decks. The primary’s en suite bathroom has limestone floors, a floating marble vanity and an automated privacy shade. 
 
Up one more level you’ll find a second primary suite which could be used for guests or as a deluxe home theater. The adjoining bath has basket weave marble floors, an extra-deep soaking tub and an oversized shower. 
 
Topping it all off is a rooftop deck with a gas fire pit and panoramic views that stretch from the bay to the Pacific. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Steamboat Springs, CO — 4-Bed Villa Near Ski Resort
description:
As refreshing as its name, Sparkling Creek offers modern living in a classic mountain setting. With majestic mountain views and the soothing sounds of the nearby Fish Creek, this light-filled townhome is part of the Barn Village community that includes a clubhouse, fitness center pool and hot tub. 

The sleek home has white oak floors, high ceilings and large windows, creating an airy feel and connecting with the pristine scenery. The spacious living room includes a sleek fireplace, loads of cozy seating and beautiful views of Buffalo Pass. The chef’s kitchen has a central island, breakfast bar and high-end stainless steel appliances. The main floor primary bedroom has a large closet and an en suite bathroom featuring a soaking tub, tiled shower and dual-sink vanity. The main floor also has a laundry room and mudroom.

The upper level includes a junior primary bedroom, bunk room, and guest room (all with en suite bathrooms), a loft with a wet bar and a heated balcony overlooking the Steamboat Ski Area. The home comes fully furnished and professionally managed.

title: Olympic Valley, CA — 4-Bed Cabin With Mountain Views
description:
Modern meets mountains in Jasper, just minutes from the base of Palisades Tahoe Resort and 10 minutes from Lake Tahoe. This home offers contemporary design, with comfortable gathering spaces inside and out. 
 
The great room is anchored by a gas fireplace and doors to a covered wood deck with modern metal railings. The gourmet kitchen features custom wood cabinets, an island with waterfall edges, loads of counter space and storage, a stainless steel gas range and a wine fridge. The main floor also has laundry and powder rooms. 
 
Floating wood and metal stairs lead to a cozy sitting area and four bedrooms. The rustic chic primary suite has doors to a second covered deck and features an en suite bathroom with a double-sink vanity, a soaking tub and tiled shower. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Corona Del Mar, CA — 4-Bed Villa
description:
Gracious coastal living awaits along Corona del Mar’s famed Ocean Boulevard. With classic columns and a grand turret, this masterfully crafted 4-bedroom, 5-bath home offers luxurious spaces while feeling intimate and inviting. 
 
The formal living room faces the ocean, with light pouring through doors leading to a front patio. The adjoining dining space is nestled in a window-filled curved alcove. On the other side of the parquet entry are a large family room, casual dining space and a bright cook’s kitchen with a stainless steel gas range. 
 
Climb the grand, curved staircase to four bedroom suites. The relaxing master includes a fireplace, private balcony and a curved sitting room with an ocean view. The spa-like bathroom has a steam shower and soaking tub. The other bedrooms feature private baths, vaulted ceilings and patios. At the back of the home are a laundry room and 3-car garage. 
 
Corona del Mar is close to multiple beaches and restaurants. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Vail, CO — 4-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
This sophisticated 4-bedroom, 4.5-bath contemporary retreat is perfectly positioned on prestigious Forest Road, just 500 feet from the Simba ski run. Grand glass walls capture breathtaking views of the mountains, woodland and Lionshead village. 
 
Craftsmanship and attention to detail are visible throughout this four-level retreat, featuring elements of wood and stone, and clean, modern lines. With stunning views and sun-filled interiors, the open floor plan will masterfully accommodate family and friends. The great room, with a modern fireplace, opens to an outdoor patio for more entertaining space. The sleek kitchen has beautiful Italian cabinetry, state-of-the-art appliances and a large island. 
 
The primary bedroom is designed for ultimate privacy, with a cozy fireplace, en suite bathroom and its own spacious patio surrounded by aspen trees.
 
The location is great for skiers, close to tree skiing and a quick ski down to the Lionshead Gondola. The driveway and all deck surfaces are heated, and the mudroom is outfitted with ski racks, boot dryers and storage. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Mountain Village, CO — 6-Bed Villa
description:
Expect grandeur and grand adventures in this 6-bedroom, 7-bath mountainside home. It’s just a two-minute walk to Telluride Ski Resort’s Mountain Village gondola station and close to year-round amenities in the village. 
 
The gracious home is anchored by the warm great room, with its vaulted wood ceiling, wall of floor-to-ceiling windows, grand staircase and massive wood-burning fireplace. The formal dining table easily seats a dozen, with meals prepared in the gleaming gourmet kitchen. A cozy media space with a wet bar opens to one of the home’s balconies, all with stunning views of Wilson Peak.
 
The lavish master suite has a fireplace, private deck and spa-like bath. Spacious guest bedrooms include a bunk room for the kids. Across the patio, just past the jetted hot tub, is a stand-alone guest cottage with a living room, mini-kitchen and bedroom. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Montecito, CA — 6-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
With classic details like Palladian windows and rounded doorways, this Mediterranean style villa offers modern living in a timeless home. Perched on 1 acre, the home features an inviting pool and hot tub, lushly landscaped entertaining areas and mountain views. 
 
Grand living begins in the living room, with its double-height ceiling, a grand fireplace and glass doors to the patio. The formal dining room is both elegant and intimate, and opens to an outdoor dining space. The chic gourmet kitchen includes stainless steel appliances and a massive island. The main floor also offers a cozy family room with another fireplace and a bedroom suite. 
 
Up the curved staircase are more bedrooms, including the spacious primary and light-filled en suite bathroom with a soaking tub, marble floors and countertops, and dual closets. A guest house has its own entrance and gate, and features another spa with an outdoor shower, and soaking tub. The home, close to the upper village and Montecito beaches, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Carmel By The Sea, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
Bright and beautifully remodeled, this contemporary stucco home epitomizes the casual chic of Carmel. With a 3-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom main home, plus a guest house with a full bath and kitchenette, it’s ideal for hosting family and friends. Located in Carmel-by-the-Sea’s Golden Rectangle, this is a quick walk from the beach or shopping and restaurants in town. 
 
The sophisticated open plan main floor features an all-white gourmet kitchen, a formal dining space and a relaxing living area with two sets of double doors opening to the patio. 
 
Each of the zen-like bedrooms in the main home has its own balcony and en suite bathroom. Cross the patio and pass the fire pit to discover the charms of the log guest house. Its whitewashed interior and modern decor combine to create a welcoming getaway.The home and guest house come fully furnished and professionally decorated.

Directions: From Highway 1, turn W onto Ocean Ave., turn Son Dolores; house is 7 houses SW of 13th. 
X Street: Santa Lucia

title: Indian Wells, CA — 4-Bed Cabin With Mountain Views
description:
Even if you don’t play golf, this Coachella Valley home scores a hole in one. The contemporary masterpiece is located on historic Indian Wells Country Club, the original location of the famous Bob Hope Classic golf tournament. 
 
The open floor plan brings dining and multiple entertaining areas together, all with views of the inviting pool, one of two fireplaces and mountains beyond. A unique, round kitchen features intersecting round islands, gleaming custom cabinetry and curved breakfast bar. Off the kitchen is a more intimate dining space complete with wine fridge. 
 
The home has four en-suite bedrooms, including two tasteful master suites that feel like a five-star resort — one tub wall even has a small gas fireplace to enhance the spa-like experience. 
 
The resort feel continues outside, with the swimming and spa pools surrounded by mature landscaping and hedge, giving the home true privacy from the adjoining golf course. The home also includes an attached casita with its own entrance, a bedroom, bath, kitchen and laundry, making it perfect for guests.

title: Vail, CO — 5-Bed Villa
description:
Prepare to be blown away by this new construction home on the Vail Golf Course. On a quiet cul-de-sac street, this enticing 5-bedroom, 5-bathroom home is comfortable contemporary living at its best.
 
The main floor open living area sets the tone with vaulted ceilings, floor-to ceiling-windows that bring in natural light, and slide-away doors opening to the spacious deck — perfect for entertaining and enjoying the mature, natural landscaping. A gas fireplace is set into a soaring, natural stone wall, creating a warm, relaxing ambiance. The gourmet kitchen is sleek and expansive, with a massive island for cooking, a wet bar with a wine and beverage fridge, and plenty of space for prep and storage.
 
The restful primary suite has a wall of windows that open to a private deck, a spacious closet and a poured concrete tub in the en suite bathroom. There’s plenty of sleeping space for guests, with three en suite secondary bedrooms and a bunk room. 
 
For fun, a downstairs media room features an oversized stuffed sofa and a ping-pong table. For work, there are two office spaces and a full laundry room. Outside, a hot tub awaits after a day on the nearby slopes. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Incline Village, NV — 5-Bed Estate With Hot Tub
description:
Across from the sandy shores of Lake Tahoe is Star Gaze, offering an open floor plan, natural light and plenty of entertaining space indoors and out. The beautifully landscaped estate along Lakeshore Boulevard is gated and fully fenced, with filtered lake and sunset views. 
 
The great room has vaulted wood ceilings, skylights, a stone fireplace and a window wall opening to a deck. The bright dining space and gourmet kitchen share a sleek gas fireplace. 
 
The south-facing primary suite — one of five bedrooms with en suite bathrooms — is a relaxing retreat, with a spa tub, sauna, dual vanities and walk-in shower. The home includes a game room/exercise area and a media room. This home is professionally decorated and fully furnished.

title: Rosemary Beach, FL — 6-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description:
Tucked in the beautiful town of Rosemary Beach, Rosemary Shores is a rare retreat, featuring a 6-bedroom home and a two-story carriage house with a full kitchen and private bedroom. It is a 30A beach property, named for a 20-mile stretch of County Road 30A running along the Florida Panhandle coastline, midway between Destin and Panama City. 

The renovated concrete main home includes two living areas, a spacious gourmet kitchen and expansive porches totaling nearly 1,000 square feet. The first-floor living area showcases French doors that frame views of the heated pool and private courtyard with outdoor kitchen. The space also has an indoor/outdoor half bath and an outdoor shower. 

Mahogany doors open to a beach walk leading directly to the white sand beach and crystal-clear waters that make this place so special. The home is also close to shopping and dining destinations. The property, including the main home and casita with a two-car garage and three more dedicated parking spaces, has been exclusively designed and furnished in partnership with Serena and Lily. Rosemary Shores has been featured in House Beautiful and Veranda.

Disclaimer: The presentation of certain aspects of the property in the photos may vary from its current state, as the layout and specifics are subject to change due to our partnership and photoshoot collaboration with Serena & Lily for this special seaside property.

title: Healdsburg, CA — 5-Bed Villa
description:
Nestled on 3.3 acres in Sonoma’s wine country, this 5-bedroom, 5-bath home embraces sustainable architecture.
 
The H-shaped, single-level floor plan is anchored by a great room positioned under a distinctive butterfly-shaped roof. 
 
The home’s chic design integrates sustainable construction and design elements with functionality. Glass doors open to the beautifully landscaped front and rear terraced decks. Light pours into the great room, kitchen and bedrooms. The primary bedroom and bath have access to private outdoor spaces. 
 
The resort-style pool faces a two-suite guest casita, a pool house with a second full kitchen, a cabana and an outdoor kitchen with a pizza oven. Small vineyards grace the front and back yards. 
 
A private office, full bath and studio is located adjacent to the detached 2-car garage, and are accessed via a separate entrance.
 
The property is on West Dry Creek Road, renowned for biking among vineyards and wineries.

title: Delray Beach, FL — 5-Bed Cabin With Fireplace
description:
Seamless indoor/outdoor living awaits in Seagate, a modern 5-bedroom, 5.5-bathroom home near Atlantic Dunes Park and just a 3-minute walk to the beach. Inspired by the tropics, a private east-facing courtyard features an inviting saltwater pool and spa, plus an irresistible loggia, outdoor kitchen and bar. 
 
Natural light pours through floor-to-ceiling windows into the spacious open plan living space. The dream kitchen features custom cabinets, top-of-the-line appliances, an oversized island and a butler’s pantry.
 
The main floor includes a luxurious primary suite with a spa-like en suite bathroom, spacious closets and doors to the pool and a private outdoor shower. There is plenty of room for family and friends, with a first-floor guest suite and three bright bedrooms on the second floor. The home, which includes a two-car garage comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Truckee, CA — 4-Bed Villa Ski-in/Ski-out
description:
Discover this stunning 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath slopeside retreat in Truckee, where modern design and natural beauty converge. Perched mid-mountain at Northstar, this home offers seamless indoor-outdoor living with breathtaking mountain views and direct access to ski and hiking trails—step out your door and into adventure.

The open-concept design is perfect for entertaining or unwinding in style. A striking fireplace anchors the bright living space, complemented by a spacious dining area, a gourmet kitchen with high-end appliances, and expansive glass doors leading to an inviting deck.

The primary suite is a serene sanctuary with floor-to-ceiling windows wrapping three sides, creating a private escape with awe-inspiring views. Three additional guest rooms also embrace the scenic surroundings, ensuring every guest feels at home. A media room for movie nights, multiple decks featuring a hot tub and fire pit, a dedicated ski room, and a versatile flex space complete this thoughtfully designed mountainside haven.

 The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Hilton Head Island, SC — 6-Bed Villa
description:
Clad in gray shingles and brick, Whistling Swan is a traditional, third-row beach house on the outside. Inside, however, this home is geared for contemporary life. 

A bright, open plan great room is perfect for entertaining, opening to a covered porch with a fireplace, grill and television. The porch overlooks a private pool and spa, with plenty of space for lounging. The elegant chef’s kitchen offers high-end, stainless steel appliances, and an island is ideal for meal prep as well as dining. A formal dining area seats 8 or more.

The primary suite is an oasis of calm, with an en suite featuring a soaking tub, dual-sink vanity, makeup station and tiled walk-in shower. A beachy vibe continues in the five guest bedrooms and en suite bathrooms, including a bunk room that sleeps four. An elevator services the new-construction home’s three levels. The home, a quick walk from beautiful beaches, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Hilton Head Island, SC — 7-Bed Estate
