description:
For Sea Pines living at its finest, look no further than this second-row beachside estate. The home has been fully remodeled to create a dream retreat. The main floor is anchored by a double-height living room with reclaimed barn wood beams and a window wall that captures views of the backyard pool. 
 
The gourmet kitchen has Sub-Zero and Wolf appliances, a massive island and a breakfast nook. The kitchen flows into the elegant dining room, creating a perfect gathering space. A relaxed family room with a wet bar and game table has doors leading to an outdoor dining table and the swimming pool. 
 
The bedroom suites, including primary suites on both the first and second floors, have spa-like bathrooms and an office offers a private space for work. A second floor lounge is a cozy spot for conversations or watching a movie. A third-floor bunk room offers a perfect spot for the kids, with three full-size bunks. For inside fun, a basement room is outfitted with a billiards table. 
 
The home, just steps from the Sea Pines Beach Club, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Encinitas, CA — 5-Bed Cabin With Sea Views
description:
This contemporary cliffside stunner offers unparalleled elegance and endless views of the Pacific. It is protected from coastal erosion by upper and lower engineered sea walls, and features a smart floor plan perfect for entertaining. 
Frameless glass doors seamlessly connect the interior to the limestone-tiled terrace. 

The open plan living space has a sleek fireplace flanked by built-in storage. The gourmet kitchen is warmed by walnut cabinets and underlit quartzite countertops, and features Miele appliances. The adjoining dining room opens to the patio, fire pit and spectacular vistas. 
 
Up a striking circular staircase are spacious dual primary suites that offer more ocean views through glass-railed balconies, plus luxurious en suite bathrooms. 
 
 
The home includes an office, family room, a glass elevator and a garage with an automatic lift to store a vehicle in the finished basement. Close to surfing and lounging at Beacon's Beach, the home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Corona Del Mar, CA — 4-Bed Farmhouse
description:
Get ready for seamless indoor/outdoor living at Pacific Place, a new-construction contemporary farmhouse just blocks from the ocean. The home features an open floor plan with relaxed gathering spaces, a courtyard with a water feature, a custom wine display and a jacuzzi. 
 
The living room has a sleek fireplace and window walls that open to the courtyard. The gourmet kitchen has high-end appliances, a waterfall island and direct access to the courtyard water feature. The main floor includes a dining room, a bedroom with en suite bathroom and a powder room. 
 
The second-floor primary suite is bookended by terraces and features a luxurious en suite bathroom and spacious closet. Down the hall are a loft office, two guest rooms with en suite bathrooms and a laundry room. Up one more flight is the ultimate entertaining space: a bar/lounge with a TV, hot tub and plenty of seating. 
 
The home, which has an elevator and a 3-car garage, is located on one of the city’s alluring Flower Streets.

title: St. Helena, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
This fully renovated three-bedroom, two-bath home (plus ADU with additional bed and bath) is as crisp and refreshing as a chilled glass of Riesling and just minutes from St. Helena’s shopping area.

Savor contemporary, one-level living offering relaxed indoor and outdoor spaces. The sleek great room has a gas fireplace, wet bar and glass doors that open to the pool and private back yard for easy entertaining. The light, bright adjoining dining and kitchen space also have access to the pool and a covered outdoor dining area.

The primary bedroom has a modern vibe, with opaque glass-and-metal barn doors that open to the closet, and an en suite bathroom with soaking tub and tiled shower area and a dual vanity. The main home includes two guest bedrooms and an additional bathroom. 

The ADU is connected to the house via a breezeway and includes a living room/bedroom, a bathroom and a kitchenette. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: St. Helena, CA — 3-Bed Cabin With Hot Tub
description:
This 3-bedroom, 3-bath home in the heart of St. Helena has been completely reimagined and rebuilt inside and out. The result is a modern retreat in the heart of wine country. 

Chevron-patterned wood floors run throughout this welcoming second home. The living room has high ceilings warmed by wood beams and a sleek, modern fireplace. A few steps down, light pours through a glass atrium into the dining room and kitchen. The kitchen is as functional as it is beautiful, with cabinets that echo the chevron floor and a waterfall island with breakfast bar. Both rooms enjoy a view of a second fireplace. 
 
Doors in the atrium open to an expansive brick deck with a new pool, spa and covered lounge area – perfect for relaxing after a day exploring nearby Napa Valley vineyards or the shops along Main Street, just a block away. 
 
And when it’s time to retire for the night, four serene bedrooms await, two with ensuite bathrooms. The master suite opens to the backyard deck, and the master bath features a double vanity, rain shower and soaking tub. 
 
The home’s exterior is clad in stunning stone and features modern black windows. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Olympic Valley, CA — 4-Bed Cabin With Hot Tub
description:
A sophisticated High Sierra retreat, this 4-bedroom, 3 full, 2 half-bathroom home offers welcoming gathering spaces and amazing mountain views. It’s close to the entrance to Olympic Valley and Palisades Tahoe, making it ideal for skiers. 
 
Warm-tone wood brings a glow to the exposed beams, ceiling and floors of the vast great room, and double-height glass doors and windows perfectly frame the forest view. The doors open to an expansive deck, perfect for enjoying a bottle of wine from the home’s cellar. The towering, double-sided fireplace is shared with the gourmet kitchen, which includes a dining/prep island, dark cabinets and plenty of counter space. The adjoining dining room easily accommodates eight, and opens to the deck to make entertaining a snap. A lower level family room leads to a stone patio complete with grill and fire pit.
 
The home includes two bright primary bedrooms, with relaxing en suite bathrooms, and two guest bedrooms. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Palm Desert, CA — 5-Bed Cabin
description:
The all-white exterior of this home makes the skies of south Palm Desert even bluer, the faux turf lawns even greener, the aqua of the pool even more inviting. The sharp, modern lines of this 5-bedroom, 4-bath home are accentuated by black windows and concrete slab walkways. 
 
Privacy walls and a gated entrance ensure security and comfort as you lounge around the pool, with its multiple water features and multi-colored light system. Gather around the poolside fire pit that offers majestic mountain views. 
 
Slide open doors from the front and back yards to reveal the home’s spacious interior. Light pours into the open plan living and dining space, anchored by a sleek fireplace wall. White walls and plank tiled floors run throughout the home, bringing a calm, modern feel. 
 
The zen continues in the all-white kitchen: soft-close cabinetry, quartz counters with a waterfall edge island for prep and eating, marble tile backsplash, a cozy table and a coffee station around the corner. All with a view of the pool and back patio, complete with a built-in barbecue island. 
 
The primary bedroom is located in a private wing, with glass doors opening to the pool and clerestory windows for diffused light and a slice of the blue desert sky. The ensuite offers an innovative soaking tub and double rain showers set behind a double splash panel. 
 
Two guest rooms share a Jack-n-Jill bath and another bedroom includes a private ensuite. A detached casita includes a fifth bedroom and ensuite. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Park City, UT — 5-Bed Villa
description:
The home has been updated and redesigned with new lighting, paint, carpet and modern furnishings to create a fresh, contemporary mountain classic. 
 
Adjacent to Park City Mountain Resort, this 5-bedroom, 6-bath Old Town home is like having your own lodge just steps from the ski run and the popular Park Silly farmers market.
 
After a day of adventures, cozy up in the living room by the floor-to-ceiling stone fireplace, head to the hot tub, or take in a movie in the home theater room, outfitted with 10 leather seats, surround sound and a wet bar. 
 
The kitchen makes it easy to cook up a feast for family and friends. It includes a 6-burner Viking range, griddle pot filler and oversized island. 
 
The top floor features two guest suites. The primary bedroom has a rock fireplace with a built-in TV alcove, walk-in closet and a balcony looking at Home Run ski trail — the perfect spot for catching the sunset. The en suite bath includes an oversized jetted soaking tub and steam shower.
 
The lowest level features three large bedrooms with ensuite bathrooms, a covered patio and access to the fenced yard. The home also has a ski prep room.
 
In addition to the ski resort, the home is close to golfing, mountain biking and hiking destinations, plus shops and restaurants. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Johns Island, SC — 5-Bed Villa
description:
Ocean Forest is a gracious, light-filled home offering stunning views of the marsh, the ocean and Kiawah and Seabrook Islands. Two levels of front porches complement the home’s impressive entrance while more than 3,000 square feet of rear porches offer vast entertaining spaces with ocean views.

The elegant living room features a 60-inch linear gas fireplace and a wall of glass doors leading to an elevated pool, spa and travertine sunning deck. The bright chef’s kitchen has Cambria quartz countertops and stainless steel appliances. The adjoining dining room offers doors to the porch and an outdoor table.

The home has five bedrooms with en suite bathrooms. The spacious primary suite opens to an ocean-view porch and has a spa-like bathroom that includes a tiled wet room with a soaking tub. A 3-stop elevator services the home, which includes a theater room with kitchenette and a rooftop terrace with commanding views.

A community boardwalk leads through the dunes directly to the beach, and owners can purchase membership in the Seabrook Club. The home, which was completely renovated in 2019, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Santa Cruz, CA — 5-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description:
Fresh and modern, this home and ADU are just 3 houses from West Cliff Drive and the water. A minimalist vibe is embodied by polished concrete floors, metal-framed windows and open living spaces. 
 
The bright great room has a sliding window wall for indoor-outdoor living, a spacious dining area, and a chef's kitchen featuring an oversized island for casual dining. 
 
Upstairs is a private primary bedroom that opens to a roof terrace with a fireplace, TV and ocean views. The modern en suite bathroom is perfect for a relaxing soak. In the gated backyard, the 1-bedroom guest house has its own kitchen, living and dining space, laundry and bathroom. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: La Jolla, CA — 3-Bed Villa
description:
Just steps from La Jolla’s iconic Windansea Beach, this coastal retreat combines modern luxury with thoughtful design. Wake up to ocean air, stroll down to the sand in minutes, and return home to relax on your private rooftop deck. Outfitted with a bar, outdoor kitchen, fire pit, hot tub, and spa, the rooftop is designed for both lively entertaining and quiet evenings framed by panoramic sunrise and sunset views.

Inside, bright, open living spaces feature a built-in sound system, wine fridge, sunroom, Peloton, walk-in closet, and a dedicated office for work. Every detail is finished with ’s signature furnishings and décor, making the home move-in ready and perfectly suited for effortless stays.

Practical touches, including an EV charger, security system, and high-speed internet, pair with ’s owner storage and essentials package to make ownership seamless. With the beach at your doorstep and modern comforts throughout, Windansea offers the ultimate La Jolla lifestyle.

title: Tahoe City, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Sauna
description:
Fully remodeled, this 4-bedroom, 4-bath home seamlessly blends contemporary design with Lake Tahoe’s natural beauty, offering filtered lake views and sophisticated living spaces.

Vaulted wood-beamed ceilings, a sleek fireplace, and glass doors in the great room lead to a spacious lake-facing deck, accessible from the dining room, kitchen, and primary suite.

Designed for both style and functionality, the kitchen features stainless steel appliances, a large center island, quartzite countertops, and a cozy breakfast nook, perfect for cooking and entertaining.

Wake up to lake views in the primary suite, complete with deck access and a modern en suite with a walk-in shower, double vanity, and generous storage. Three additional bedrooms provide comfort for guests, and a cedar-lined sauna offers a private retreat.

The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Vail, CO — 5-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
Versant is a new construction mountainside contemporary located just 500 feet from the Simba ski run. Glass walls capture stunning views of the mountains, woodland and Lionshead village. 
 
Stellar craftsmanship and attention to detail are visible throughout this four-level retreat, featuring elements of wood and stone, and clean, modern lines. The open floor plan living space has a modern fireplace and opens to an outdoor patio for more entertaining space. The sleek kitchen has Italian cabinetry, high-end appliances and a large island. 
 
The primary bedroom is designed for ultimate privacy, with a cozy fireplace, en suite bathroom and a spacious private patio.
 
The location, on coveted Forest Road, is great for skiers, close to tree skiing and a quick ski down to the Lionshead Gondola. The driveway and all deck surfaces are heated, and the mudroom is outfitted with ski racks, boot dryers and storage. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Malibu, CA — 3-Bed Cabin
description:
With seemingly endless views, this beautifully updated 3-bedroom, 4-bathroom home is the epitome of Malibu living. The Pacific can be seen from every room and enjoyed from expansive decks. 
 
With a full wall of glass, the living room and kitchen offer sweeping views and access to one of the decks. The living room features a beamed tray ceiling, clerestory windows and a modern wall of floating shelves, cabinets and an EcoSmart fireplace. The kitchen features Miele appliances, white quartz countertops, warm wood cabinets and bar seating. 
 
Each of the three bedrooms offer en suite bathrooms, deck access and more ocean views. One of the two main-level bedrooms includes an outdoor shower and hot tub. 
 
The primary suite is on the upper level, with a private balcony. The en suite includes a basalt and slate bath and shower area with a skylight, and a sleek double vanity. The upper level also offers a sunrise-to-sunset entertaining space: A covered area features a huge skylight, a bar counter with a sink and fridge, and multi-level decks for al fresco dining and lounging while enjoying the views. 

The home, which has a two-car garage, comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Aspen, CO — 3-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
On a quiet street near downtown Aspen sits this historic home with Victorian details like scalloped shingles and front porch corbels. But one step through the front door leaves no doubt that this 3 bedroom, 4.5 bathroom home is contemporary living at its best. 
 
Vaulted, wood-clad ceilings set the tone for the main floor’s bright and welcoming living room. A modern two-sided gas fireplace is set into a tiled wall separating the living room from the formal dining space. The gourmet kitchen is sleek and expansive, with a massive island for cooking, a wet bar with wine fridge, and plenty of prep and storage space. 
 
A wall of windows in the primary suite frame a view of the trees, creating a restful retreat complete with fireplace, massive closet, spa-like en suite bathroom, and a private deck. There’s plenty of sleeping space for guests, with two more bedrooms and built-in bunk beds in the downstairs media room (one queen-size and two twins). In addition, here’s a full laundry room, plus a cozy office space. 
 
Outside, a fire pit and hot tub offer warm relaxation year-round. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Palm Springs, CA — 3-Bed Villa
description:
This remodeled and reimagined ranch has it all. Located in the coveted, historic Mesa neighborhood of south Palm Springs, the 3-bedroom, 3-bath home offers breathtaking views of the San Jacinto Mountains. 
 
The home’s vibe runs from bold to calm, practical to dreamy, with the overall feeling that this is the place to relax. It starts as you enter the gated property and walk through a lush desert garden. It continues inside, with terrazzo-like tile flooring and vaulted beamed ceilings. 
 
The living room, dining room and kitchen are anchored by the fireplace wall, creating connected but distinct living spaces. Walls of glass open to the pool and enclosed courtyard, for an ideal entertaining space. 
 
The white-on-white kitchen includes high-end stainless steel appliances and an induction cooktop. A great view of the pool and mountains is always on the menu through the immense kitchen window. Sliding doors lead to an outdoor dining and lounge area. 
 
The master bedroom offers built-in storage, a calming en suite, walk-in closet and a bright sitting area with access to the pool and spa. Two en suite guest rooms round out the home.
 
The property offers privacy, thanks to its position in the middle of a cul-de-sac, with no neighbors directly behind or in front of the home. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Kiawah Island, SC — 5-Bed Villa
description:
Modern coastal elegance awaits in this 5-bedroom, 4.5-bathroom Kiawah Island retreat that offers multiple indoor and outdoor entertaining areas, a plunge pool, wet bar and elevator. Owners have access to The Sandcastle, an exclusive oceanfront recreation center with pool, outdoor bar and grill, fitness rooms, oceanfront verandas and private beach boardwalk.
 
A covered front porch leads to a bright, open plan living area featuring hardwood floors and high ceilings with crown molding. The adjoining dining area boasts a wet bar alcove with a beverage cooler, ice machine and wine storage. 

The chef’s kitchen includes a center island with a breakfast counter, stainless steel Wolf stove, stone countertops and shaker-style cabinetry. Black-framed French doors and windows create a focal wall that opens to the spacious covered deck, perfect for al fresco dining or relaxing with drinks.

The striking covered deck has a tongue-in-groove ceiling and an open deck features an inset pool surrounded by live oak, pine and palmetto trees.

The primary suite is a sanctuary with a spa-like en-suite bath featuring ceramic-tiled floors, dual sinks in stone countertops, a built-in window seat and a walk-in shower with ceramic tiles and built-in bench.

Upstairs, a family or media room provides additional living space. The first of four guest bedrooms has a vaulted ceiling and sumptuous en suite bath. Floor-to-ceiling glass doors in a sitting room opens to a second-story covered deck. Three more guest bedrooms, each with private baths, and a laundry room complete the upper level. An elevator serves all floors.

The home, just inside the gates to Kiawah Island, is a short walk from the beach, a quick bike ride from Freshfields Village and East Beach Town Market, and close to several boat and kayak launches.

title: South Lake Tahoe, CA — 5-Bed Villa
description:
You can’t help but feel one with nature in this designer-remodeled, three-level home. The exterior facelift uses redwood and slate, IPE and slate decking, redwood railings and a new metal roof. Inside, new oak and mahogany flooring glows throughout.
 
The top level great room offers a light-filled living room with a floor-to-ceiling concrete fireplace and doors leading to a massive slate deck. The adjoining gourmet kitchen, with gleaming quartz countertops, and the dining area have soaring wood ceilings with exposed rafters. 
 
The middle level includes the main entry, a large family/flex room, three spacious bedrooms and two bathrooms. 
 
Two new, bright primary en-suites bedrooms and a laundry room comprise the bottom level. The bathrooms have custom porcelain and marble tilework and heated floors. One primary room has a sliding glass door to a deck and hot tub surrounded, of course, by nature. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: South Lake Tahoe, CA — 5-Bed Cabin Ski-in/Ski-out
description:
With steep rooflines, vast windows, and wood and beamed ceilings, this 5-bedroom, 5-bathroom South Lake Tahoe home embodies modern alpine architecture. The spacious living room soars to a peak, echoing the surrounding Sierra Nevada mountains and opening to a deck with forest and filtered lake views. 
 
The feeling of a true mountain lodge comes through in the three-level home’s rustic elegance and scale: a two-story stone fireplace in the living room; a loft-style game room, and wood floors and natural materials throughout. 
 
The chef’s kitchen is a blend of luxury and practicality, with rich wood cabinets, a professional-grade gas range and double wall ovens. Choose to nosh at the formal table or the massive kitchen island. Either way, you can grab your favorite vintage from the wine room!
 
The primary suite is bright and airy, with a soaring, wood-clad ceiling, deck access and a luxurious en suite bathroom with natural stone. Guest bedrooms and bathrooms offer more of the same, and include a bunk room that sleeps six. 
 
The loft game room is the perfect spot for billiards or watching the sun set, while a lower level family room is ideal for movies and gaming. The back deck offers a jetted hot tub for relaxing in privacy on one end, and BBQ and dining space on the other. The home is serviced by an elevator to allow easy access from top to bottom, and is warmed by radiant in-floor heating. The driveway is also heated. 
 
The property, surrounded by forest parcels, is a two-minute walk to a tram to reach Heavenly, the area’s biggest ski resort. The home comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Kiawah Island, SC — 5-Bed Villa With Hot Tub
description:
Set on over half an acre amidst lush marshlands, Blue Heron is more than a home, but a remarkable escape where you can capture stunning island sunsets and sweeping views from nearly every room of the main house and guest house. 

Relax on one of the decks and admire the surroundings dotted with native live oaks, pines and palmettos, or take the nearby wooden bridge to explore protected conservation areas and nature trails that wind through some of the Island's most spectacular forest and wetlands.

This breathtaking home is both cozy and elegant with abundant natural light from floor-to-ceiling windows and French doors that frame the verdant landscape. Savor slow mornings in the primary suite with wall-to-wall French doors that open to a private covered porch where you can enjoy a quiet breakfast to the sounds of the water and wildlife. 

The spacious and serene outdoor areas make this home an entertainer’s delight, with a covered lounge and large wraparound pool deck with a gazebo overlooking the pond. A double-sided fireplace is strategically placed to ensure year-round enjoyment, so you can take a dip in the lap pool or dine alfresco any time of year. Retreat indoors to enjoy quiet afternoons or lively evenings in the open-concept living room which is centered around a slate-surround fireplace, flanked by custom built-ins. 

Set the stage for intimate dinners or lively soirees in the gourmet kitchen which is as beautiful as it is functional. With ample counter seating, a commercial-grade gas range and a large central island with a prep sink, wine cooler and ice maker, Blue Heron is entertainment-ready, and ideal for friends and family to gather, celebrate, and relax.

title: Kiawah Island, SC — 3-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description:
Wake to the sounds of ocean waves and enjoy the Kiawah Island lifestyle in this top-floor oceanfront condo. Shipwatch is a 3-bedroom, 3-bath home offering expansive Atlantic views from the open-plan living area, deck, sunroom, and primary suite.

The living room features soaring ceilings, classic details, and a fireplace. The bright kitchen includes a large island and stainless steel appliances, and the adjoining dining space is lined with custom cabinetry. The primary suite is a light-filled retreat with an en suite bathroom featuring a dual vanity and tiled shower. The second bedroom includes a king bed and a full en suite bathroom. The third bedroom features four bunk beds, well-suited for additional guests, and also includes a full en suite bathroom.

The Sandcastle, located next door, offers an ocean-view fitness center equipped with Peloton bikes and a full range of workout equipment. Residents also have access to heated pools, including an oceanfront adults-only pool, as well as a poolside restaurant and bar with a seasonal menu.

Ideally located at West Beach, the home is within walking distance to Cougar Point Golf Course and clubhouse, as well as the West Beach resort pool. It is also just minutes from the Treehouse Activity Center, the recreational amenities at Night Heron Park, and Freshfields Village for shopping and dining.

title: Kiawah Island, SC — 5-Bed Villa With Fireplace
description:
Sea Marsh is a brand-new Kiawah Island retreat that blends modern comfort with the natural beauty of the Lowcountry. Sunlight streams through expansive windows, illuminating open living spaces designed for both gathering and relaxing. A chef’s kitchen with a large island makes hosting effortless, while a chic floating-shelf bar and fireplace add warmth and character. Step outside to the private pool and patio, where long afternoons unfold in the sea air.

Every detail has been considered—from designer-curated furnishings to high-end technology—creating a turnkey experience that feels refined yet relaxed. Whether you’re entertaining friends or savoring quiet mornings, the home’s thoughtful layout makes every moment easy.

Beyond your door, Kiawah offers a world of discovery. Stroll or bike to pristine beaches, wander the trails of Night Heron Park, or climb Marsh View Tower to take in sweeping river, marsh, and golf vistas. Indulge in luxury at the five-star, five-diamond Sanctuary, or head to Freshfields Village for dining and shopping. At Sea Marsh, every day brings the chance to make lasting Lowcountry memories.

title: Bahia De Banderas, Mexico — 4-Bed Penthouse With Pool
description:
Set directly on Litibú, one of Mexico's most pristine stretches of coastline, this penthouse residence at UAVI offers four bedrooms, four and a half baths, and more than 5,200 square feet of oceanfront living in Riviera Nayarit. Situated in Tower One of a gated resort community just five minutes from Punta de Mita, the home delivers an effortless blend of elevated design and laid-back coastal living.

Floor-to-ceiling views of the Pacific define every space, from the main living areas through to the private terraces that extend the home outdoors. Interiors are professionally designed with furnishings and finishes selected to complement the natural surroundings: lush gardens, open sky, and over 110 yards of exclusive ocean frontage just steps below.

The residence is built for both gathering and retreat. Four generously proportioned bedroom suites provide privacy for owners and guests alike, while open living and dining areas create a natural flow for entertaining against the backdrop of the sea. Expansive terraces blur the line between indoor and outdoor living, offering the kind of space where long afternoons turn into sunset evenings without ever leaving home.

Beyond the residence, UAVI's resort amenities bring something new to every visit. Owners enjoy exclusive access to the Higuera Golf Club, an 18-hole Greg Norman-designed course steps from the property, along with a beachfront pool, infinity pool and snack bar, beach club, spa and wellness center, fitness center, residents' lounge, sports courts, kids club, water sports center, and dedicated concierge services.

title: Miami, FL — 3-Bed Penthouse
description: Penthouse 3 at Midtown Park by Proper offers elevated Miami living with 3 bedrooms, 4 baths, and expansive indoor-outdoor space high above the city. Floor-to-ceiling glass, soaring ceilings, and refined finishes create a bright, modern retreat, complemented by a chef’s kitchen and spa-inspired baths. Set within a vibrant five-acre, master-planned community, residents enjoy a rooftop level with pool, wellness and fitness amenities, padel and pickleball, chef-driven dining, creative retail, and lush parks. Includes a starter membership to the Beach Club at Shelborne by Proper, with seamless access to Miami Beach. Ideally located between the Design District, Wynwood, and Edgewater.

title: Cabo San Lucas, Mexico — 3-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
Set within the exclusive Solaz Resort Residences in Cabo San Lucas, this private three-bedroom, three-and-a-half-bath villa offers a refined take on coastal living, where contemporary design meets the natural beauty of the Baja coastline. Overlooking the Sea of Cortez, the home captures panoramic water views and a seamless connection to its surroundings, creating a setting that feels both elevated and effortlessly relaxed.

Designed for indoor-outdoor living, the residence opens to expansive terraces that invite ocean breezes and golden light throughout the day. Living and dining spaces flow naturally into a gourmet kitchen, forming a central gathering place for entertaining or unwinding after a day by the water. Thoughtful design details blend modern finishes with subtle Mexican influences, while bespoke furnishings and premium materials bring comfort and sophistication to every room.
The primary suite serves as a private retreat, positioned to take full advantage of the views, while two additional guest suites offer welcoming accommodations for family and friends. Each space is designed with a sense of calm and privacy, making extended stays feel effortless.

Life at Solaz extends well beyond the home. Owners enjoy access to a pristine private beach, resort-style pools, a full-service spa, fitness center, and on-site dining, along with the convenience of hotel services that elevate every stay. From mornings spent along the shoreline to evenings by the fire pit under the stars, the experience is defined by ease, beauty, and connection to the sea.

Fully furnished and professionally managed, the villa is turnkey and ready to enjoy from day one. It is a place to embrace the rhythm of coastal living in one of Cabo’s most sought-after oceanfront communities.

title: Napa, CA — 6-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description: Welcome to the largest Vineyard Home at Stanly Ranch, an Auberge Resorts Collection. This rare opportunity to own within Napa Valley's most refined resort residential community offers convenient access to Napa Airport and San Francisco. Enjoy thoughtfully curated experiences and access to bespoke Auberge amenities in a setting designed for wellness, comfort, entertainment and seamless multigenerational living. Ideally situated within the community, this impeccably furnished and thoughtfully designed 5,805 sq ft +/- residence offers 6 bedrooms and 7.5 bathrooms. The home is centered around an open concept floor plan with seamless indoor/outdoor flow. The expansive great room is anchored by soaring 19 ft vaulted ceilings and transitions effortlessly into the dining area and a chef's kitchen featuring dual islands, a butler's pantry, and premium appliances. A versatile spare room provides flexible space for a media lounge, home office, or playroom. Two luxurious primary suites feature spa-like bathrooms and generous walk-in closets. The main level primary suite also includes a private outdoor shower for a true resort-inspired experience. A separate and generously-sized guest suite with its own entrance, wet bar, and full bath offers exceptional privacy for visitors or extended stays. Two sets of fold-away glass doors connect to approximately 3,278 sq ft +/- of outdoor living space, designed for elevated entertaining and everyday enjoyment. Outdoor amenities include a private infinity edge pool and spa, loggia, and fire pit, all set against the breathtaking natural beauty of Napa Valley. Ownership at Stanly Ranch includes access to the Stanly Ranch Club, an exclusive, members only extension of the Auberge experience. Club members enjoy preferred access to dining, wellness and fitness facilities, and a thoughtfully curated calendar of culinary, social, and seasonal programming. Whether enjoyed as a primary residence, retreat, or income-producing property, Stanly Ranch ownership offers a rare combination of privacy, flexibility, and immersion in a world-class hospitality environment that few residential communities can replicate.

title: Rosemary Beach, FL — 6-Bed Cabin
description:
Welcome to Santimo Beach, where this 5,976 square-foot residence is among 20 exclusive properties inside the gated community. Built by prestigious Benecki Homes with interiors curated by Melanie Turner this spectacular property has it all. The home's three elevator-accessible floors accommodate five bedrooms, a bunk room, five full bathrooms, and a powder bath. A staircase connects the third level to the tower, which offers panoramic views of the Gulf. Two king-size bedrooms, one with an ensuite bathroom, along with a bunk room, separate a guest bathroom, and a laundry room join an oversized two-car garage with a Tesla charging station on the ground floor. The emphasis on indoor-to-outdoor living is evident once you walk upstairs, where an open-concept living area connects to an elevated deck featuring chaise lounges and a heated pool. Accordion windows fully retract at the outdoor bar, creating a pass-through between the pool deck and a casual dining area with a wet bar. Designer cabinets conceal a range of gourmet kitchen appliances, including a Liebherr refrigerator, Thermador freezer, and Asko dishwasher. Luxurious marble accents and a custom vent hood highlight the Wolf range. A waterfall countertop serves as a striking centerpiece on the kitchen island, with bar seating that transitions to an additional dining space.
The nearby scullery neatly contains another Asko dishwasher, beverage center and wet bar. The second floor concludes with the powder bath, a media room and a double queen-size ensuite bedroom. An additional living area on the third floor creates a total of three distinct living spaces for owners and their guests to enjoy. The grande primary suite includes a luxurious bath retreat featuring a walk-in shower and soaking tub plus spacious closet. A separate light-filled room is the perfect spot for an office or yoga studio. An additional king-size ensuite plus the second laundry room complete this level. This residence boasts multiple living areas, a pool deck meticulously designed for entertaining, elegantly appointed bedrooms, and a prime location within one of the most secluded gulf-front enclaves on 30A. Within its vicinity, you can enjoy both grandeur and functionality, conveniently situated just a short distance from the pristine beach. Santimo Beach is a gulf-front community that is surrounded by the vibrant new urbanism communities of Rosemary Beach and Alys Beach. This gated retreat provides its residents with an unparalleled level of privacy amidst the vibrant social scene that permeates the nearby town centers. These town centers offer a diverse array of shops, restaurants, and events, catering to the diverse interests of their residents.

title: San José Del Cabo, Mexico — 5-Bed Villa With Pool
description: A private coastal sanctuary is this newer 2nd row oceanfront villa meticulously maintained for supreme privacy & luxury. Tranquil cul-de-sac, no thru traffic, beach access across street, easy walk to private Beach Club. 5 bedrooms w/ en-suite baths (one serves as office), 2 half baths, big ocean views from nearly every room. Epic outdoor retreat: expansive terraces with large pool and swim-up bar, Jacuzzi, firepit, rooftop terrace offering 360 ocean & mountain views. Large-shaded outdoor living/dining w/fireplace, gourmet outdoor BBQ kitchen. Home features breathtaking Custom Parota wood wine room, premium 4K theater, elegant custom bar w/appliances. Single-story, flooded with natural light via windows & skylights, 29 solar panels, ultra-low bills, on-demand water heaters, and more.

title: Hilton Head Island, SC — 5-Bed Villa
description:
Welcome to this distinctive vacation property managed locally by Island Time Hilton Head.
With beautiful craftsmanship throughout the well-appointed house. The ground level has a newly refinished pine floor and an open-plan design, with the large kitchen overlooking the cozy living room equipped with a comfortable sleeper sofa. There are lots of books to read; there is lots of seating on the sofas; a kitchen bar that seats 4 overlooks the kitchen; and the dining table seats eight. The double oven and wine fridge make this area great for entertaining.

All bedrooms have stranded bamboo floors and their own ensuites. The primary suite is located on the ground floor, with a large closet and a large bathroom with a soaking tub and shower.

Located up the stairs on a half level is the second bedroom with two twin beds, and the ensuite has a full tub and shower combo. Up the next half level are bedrooms 3 and 4, which both house king beds and have access to the balcony that overlooks the pool. There is plenty of space for a morning coffee with the high-top table and chairs, a chaise, and a sofa. The 5th bedroom is located on the same level and has 2 queen beds with plenty of space for games, making it perfect for the children to play. This ensuite has a separate tub and shower.

Watch over the family in the pool and spa from the outdoor patio or the second-floor balcony. There are many doors on the ground level to enjoy the outside, including the primary suite. A full bathroom with a shower is available from the outside entrance and the hallway for all to use.

title: Delray Beach, FL — 3-Bed Villa
description:
Discover a refined take on coastal living in this fully furnished contemporary retreat in East Delray Beach. Built in 2018 and thoughtfully designed for effortless ownership, this 2,500-square-foot residence pairs modern luxury with an unbeatable location—less than a mile from beach access and just 1.5 miles from the energy of Atlantic Avenue and Pineapple Grove.

Inside, clean lines and warm wood flooring set the tone for relaxed sophistication. The open-concept living spaces flow seamlessly, creating an ideal setting for gathering and entertaining. The chef’s kitchen is a standout, appointed with premium Thermador appliances, sleek quartz countertops, and generous space to cook, connect, and unwind.

Three spacious bedrooms each offer a private en suite bath, delivering comfort and privacy for family and guests alike, plus an additional half bath for convenience. Upstairs baths feature elegant tile finishes, complementing the home’s modern aesthetic.

Turn-key and impeccably styled, this East Delray Beach home makes it easy to settle in and start enjoying the best of South Florida living from day one.

title: Miami, FL — 3-Bed Cabin
description:
Located in the heart of Miami’s vibrant Design District area, this 3-bedroom, 3.5-bath residence offers modern design, spacious interiors and easy access to some of the city’s best dining, shopping and cultural destinations. Floor-to-ceiling windows bring in natural light, while the open-concept living and dining spaces create a comfortable setting for relaxing or entertaining.

The contemporary kitchen features sleek cabinetry, premium appliances and generous counter space. Each bedroom includes an en suite bathroom, providing comfort and privacy for residents and guests alike. A powder room adds additional convenience.

Residents enjoy access to building amenities and a prime location just minutes from Miami Beach, Wynwood and downtown.

title: Scottsdale, AZ — 4-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description: Welcome to Calle Camelia, a striking 2021 soft-contemporary masterpiece located in the heart of Arcadia Proper, where Camelback Mountain serves as your daily backdrop. This impeccably designed 3,940 sq ft residence offers 4 bedrooms, 4.5 baths, and an oversized 3-car garage. Step through the custom pivot door into abundant natural light pouring through oversized windows and seamless sliding glass doors that blur indoor-outdoor living. Premium finishes elevate every detail: wide-plank white oak hardwood floors, Dacor appliances, designer lighting, quartz countertops, and a bespoke pantry. The open layout flows effortlessly to a serene backyard oasis - complete with a heated pool and spa, fire pit, built-in BBQ/bar, and a dedicated grassy play area ideal for children or pets. Technologically savvy, the home comes equipped with Lutron shades, Control4 automation, Ring cameras, and an owned alarm system. Perfectly blending low-maintenance luxury with family-friendly prestige in one of Phoenix's most sought-after enclaves - this is modern desert living at its finest. Schedule your private tour today.

title: Vail, CO — 5-Bed Villa
description:
Disc This newly completed & staged home is nestled within the prestigious Vail Golf Course neighborhood. Architecturally designed by Kyle Webb of KH Webb, with interior finishes by Katy Allen of Katy Allen Interior Design and meticulously constructed by Mexamer Construction Group, the home seamlessly blends the outdoors with contemporary elegance, offering an unparalleled retreat for discerning homeowners who love the amenities of Vail Village yet desire the quiet neighborhood feel of the Vail Golf Course area. Walk or bike into Vail or hop on the free Town of Vail bus just steps away, making this location highly desired for access to Vail Village without the hassle of parking. Only a few stops and you are dropped right at the lift in Golden Peak. Whether seeking a full-time residence or seasonal retreat, this is a place where memories are made and cherished for a lifetime. Commanding attention upon arrival, this architectural gem invites refined living, where panoramic views of the Gore Range and White River National Forest captivate the senses. Floor-to-ceiling windows & sliding glass doors open to outdoor living spaces, creating a seamless transition between indoor opulence & the natural splendor beyond, ideal for effortless entertaining or quiet moments in the Rockies. The allure extends beyond impeccable design: the private driveway and all outdoor patios are efficiently heated to avoid the pitfalls of winter, allowing family and friends to enjoy every aspect of the home with ease. Experience the pinnacle of mountain living at 1489 Vail Valley Drive--a sanctuary where luxury meets adventure and every moment is infused with the magic of the Colorado Rockies. This luxurious mountain retreat spans 4,132 square feet on two levels and features five bedrooms and six bathrooms, ensuring ample space for comfort and privacy. With soaring ceilings, natural light fills the interiors, creating an ambiance of serenity and sophistication.
The allure of this residence extends beyond its impeccable design with a private driveway, where all outdoor patios are efficiently heated to avoid the pitfalls of winter. Experience the pinnacle of mountain living at 1487 Vail Valley Drivea sanctuary where luxury meets adventure, and every moment is infused with the magic of the Colorado Rockies.

title: Scottsdale, AZ — 5-Bed Villa
description: This is a very special home created by long time Arcadia builders Mike and Kim Krogh. The lush acre plus lot is one of the best in the neighborhood with exceptional curb appeal and a backyard that is the depth of an actual football field with a new pickle ball court and adjacent shaded ramada to relax under between games. Every surface in the home is brand new, and the modern architecture perfectly combines elegance and comfort with clean lines and fresh finishes at every turn. The neutral palette and perfectly placed splash of color create organic beauty and a truly serene vibe. The double island kitchen is exquisite, the living spaces are exceptional, all the bedrooms and baths are beautiful and the unique designer finishes include wood flooring, artistic tile, marble, quartz, wood

title: Napa, CA — 4-Bed Villa With Fireplace
description: The Vineyard Homes at Stanly Ranch, an Auberge Collection, are Napa Valley's premier destination for resort-style living. This RH-furnished 3,495 SF residence combines modern architecture with relaxed Wine Country living and includes RH indoor/outdoor furniture, art & accessories, window coverings, TV package, and glassware, dishes, etc. provided by Williams Sonoma. The great room features 16-foot vaulted ceilings and a chef's kitchen filled with natural light from clerestory windows. Folding glass walls open to our signature courtyard and 3,066 SF of outdoor living, including a private heated pool and spa, outdoor fireplace, and covered loggias. The primary suite includes a spa-inspired bath, outdoor shower, and walk-in closet. Owners may apply to join the exclusive Stanly Ranch Club, gaining access to farm-driven dining, the Halehouse wellness spa, fitness center, and pools. Just under an hour from San Francisco, this residence offers an unmatched blend of luxury, design, and effortless ownership in the heart of Napa Valley.

title: Miami Beach, FL — 3-Bed Villa
description: Located at the prestigious 29 Indian Creek, Unit 301 is a sophisticated 3BR/2.5BA sanctuary offering a refined blend of contemporary design and timeless elegance. The open-concept layout features 9-foot floor-to-ceiling glass, bathing the interiors in natural light and providing seamless access to a spacious balcony for indoor-outdoor living. A gourmet kitchen is equipped with Miele appliances, custom finishes, and a built-in wine cooler, while a thoughtful split-bedroom floor plan ensures maximum privacy. Residents benefit from 24/7 concierge and valet services, a fitness center with cold plunge and sauna, and a rooftop pool deck with panoramic ocean and skyline views. This boutique residence also includes exclusive access to the Miami Beach EDITION Beach & Pool Club. Estimated completion 2027.

title: Hilton Head Island, SC — 4-Bed Villa
description: Welcome to 2 Willow Oak Road West, an extraordinary and masterfully renovated residence located in the heart of Sea Pines on Hilton Head Island. Thoughtfully redesigned with impeccable attention to detail, this stunning home now offers 4 bedrooms, 4.5 bathrooms, and a seamless blend of modern luxury and Lowcountry sophistication. Every inch of the home has been transformed, featuring top-of-the-line appliances, including a Fulgor Milano Fridge/Freezer ($25,000 value), Perlick Wine Fridge, a brand new Jen Air Gas range/stove with downdraft, new stainless steel microwave, and two Dishwashers for ultimate convenience, PLUS 2-brand new hot water heaters, and brand new roof. An additional bedroom and bathroom were added to enhance both functionality and comfort, creating ideal accommodations for family and guests alike. The open-concept living spaces flow effortlessly to the outdoors, where a brand-new wraparound and extended Trex deck provides the perfect setting for entertaining or relaxing while enjoying breathtaking views of the 16th hole of the Heron Point Golf Course. Situated on a private 1.09 acre lot, the property offers a rare level of privacy and space. The resort-style backyard features a brand new in-ground pool and hot tub, completing this exceptional outdoor oasis. Located within the world-renowned Sea Pines Resort, residents enjoy access to 3 championship golf courses with flexible access, pristine beaches, marina, dining, and endless amenities. Ideally situated in the heart of the community, you're just minutes from Harbour Town, the Sea Pines Beach Club, Lawton Stables, the Forest Preserve, and the miles of scenic bike trails that connect it all. This is a truly exceptional opportunity to own a move-in-ready luxury home in an unparalleled setting.

title: Breckenridge, CO — 5-Bed Chalet With Mountain Views
description:
Located in Breckenridge’s Christie Heights subdivision, 115 Willow Lane is a fully renovated Swiss chalet–inspired mountain home on a 0.45-acre lot directly across from the Breckenridge Nordic Center. Renovated in 2024, this 5-bedroom, 5.5-bathroom home offers 4,074 sq ft across three levels with European-inspired design and designer finishes.

Features include a chef’s kitchen with ILVE Majestic range and two dishwashers, game room with pool table and fireplace, lower-level living area with two

title: Hilton Head Island, SC — 5-Bed Villa
description: Welcome to 5 Bald Eagle - Sea Pines Resort. Gorgeous 4th-Row Ocean Home with Private Pool, Steps from the Beach! Escape to paradise at this recently remodeled 5-bedroom, 5-bathroom home, perfectly located just steps from Hilton Head Island's most beautiful beaches. Nestled in the exclusive Sea Pines Resort, this spacious and luxurious retreat is designed to offer the ultimate balance of comfort, tranquility, and recreation. Primary Main Floor Master Suite with its King bed, flat-screen TV, and a

title: Paris, France — 2-Bed Apartment
description:
Overlooking the Seine from a coveted corner position in Paris’s 6th arrondissement, this stunning residence is a refined two-bedroom, two-bath home that captures the romance and energy of the Left Bank. Set along the historic Quai des Grands Augustins, the home offers uninterrupted views stretching from the river to the city’s storied rooftops, placing you at the center of one of Paris’s most iconic and walkable neighborhoods.

Bathed in natural light, the apartment is wrapped in Juliet balconies on all sides, enhancing its rare corner orientation and creating a seamless connection to the city beyond. Inside, every detail has been thoughtfully reimagined with a modern, elevated approach to Parisian living. The kitchen is anchored by a coveted La Cornue range, blending timeless craftsmanship with contemporary function, while clean-lined interiors and premium finishes bring a sense of understated luxury throughout.

The layout is both efficient and elegant, designed for easy living and effortless entertaining. Living spaces feel open and bright, framed by large windows that capture the changing light of the Seine throughout the day.
Just outside your door, the best of Paris unfolds. Located between Pont Neuf and Saint-Michel, the neighborhood offers immediate access to cafés, galleries, and boutiques, with the Latin Quarter and Saint-Germain-des-Prés just steps away. Cultural landmarks including the Louvre, Notre-Dame, and the Musée d’Orsay are all within walking distance, while nearby metro and RER connections make it easy to navigate the entire city.

Fully furnished and professionally managed, the home is turnkey and ready to enjoy from day one. It is a place to experience Paris not as a visitor, but as a resident, immersed in the beauty, history, and rhythm of life along the Seine.

title: London, England — 3-Bed Villa
description:
Located at 6 Charles Street in the heart of Mayfair, this residence embodies the ease and sophistication of turnkey London living. Fully furnished and professionally managed by, the home offers an effortless way to own in one of the city’s most prestigious postcodes, just moments from Berkeley Square, Mount Street’s designer boutiques, and Hyde Park’s leafy calm.

Inside, classical elegance meets contemporary craftsmanship. Expansive windows fill each room with natural light, setting a timeless tone throughout. The kitchen pairs Gaggenau and Miele appliances with Dornbracht tapware and stone worktops, designed for both function and form. Bathrooms are finished in marble and porcelain with custom vanities, heated towel rails, and under-floor heating, complemented by comfort cooling throughout. Smart home technology, including a Crestron lighting system, Banham security, and video entry, adds modern peace of mind, and a 24-hour concierge delivers five-star service.

From quiet mornings at Berkeley Square to evenings at nearby Michelin-starred restaurants and private members’ clubs, life here blends London’s cultural energy with the calm of a private retreat. With ’s fully managed co-ownership model, this is the simplest and most luxurious way to own a second home in Mayfair - turnkey, secure, and steps from everything that defines London living.

title: London, England — 3-Bed Apartment
description:
Mayfair is perfectly placed for you to make the most of all that London has to offer. A short stroll west will take you to the verdant oasis of Hyde Park. Heading in the other direction, you’ll reach the exclusive boutiques of Bond Street. Mayfair itself is packed with classic squares, high-end retail, innovative restaurants and drinking establishments, ranging from charming local pubs to exclusive private members’ clubs. You’re right next to Soho House’s Little House Mayfair, as well as a short stroll from Annabel’s and all the famous restaurants and nightspots on Berkeley Square.
 
The apartment itself is a gem. Expertly decorated throughout in a cool, contemporary grey palette, the emphasis is on maximising both comfort and style. As it’s located on the uppermost storeys of a period building (fourth and fifth floors), it’s bright and filled with light.
 
Enter on the fourth floor of the building and you’ll find a spacious and well-lit reception room to your right, facing the street. Passing through, you’ll come to an ample kitchen dining area, perfect for relaxing or entertaining. The kitchen is Bulthaup designed with a marble-top central island and equipped with Gaggenau appliances. Both these rooms have beautiful grey-brown parquet flooring — a quiet, elegant theme that is reflected in the rest of the apartment’s décor.
 
Also on this level you’ll find a guest lavatory, as well as the principal bedroom with walk-in wardrobes and an impressive en suite featuring floor-to-ceiling grey-veined white marble, an inviting bathtub, and a luxurious rain shower. There’s also the first of three separate roof terraces and another en suite bedroom with similar marble finishes. This bedroom opens to the terrace, a perfect place to gaze out at the rooftops of the city as you sip your morning coffee.
 
Upstairs, there’s another living area/“morning room”, with three French windows that can be thrown open to flood the space with light and air, and allow you to step out onto a terrace with superb views. There’s a further bedroom towards the back with en suite and a private roof terrace.
 
All in all, a space of consummate elegance and class at the heart of a unique city. The property comes fully furnished and professionally decorated.

title: Paris, France — 2-Bed Apartment
description:
Sunlight pours through floor-to-ceiling windows into this luminous 2-bedroom apartment in the City of Light. The elegant living/reception room is on the bel étage (second floor) of a fine 18th century building in the 7th arrondissement (district), a quintessentially Parisian neighborhood of shops and cafes.

With exposed stone walls, beamed ceilings and a stunning stone fireplace, the expansive living space features a semi-open plan kitchen, dining area and powder room. Upstairs includes a primary suite offering an en suite bathroom with dual vanities and soaking tub, and a guest suite with bathroom. The fully air conditioned home includes a cellar.

title: London, England — 4-Bed Penthouse
description:
From its days as a bohemian hangout toward the end of the 19th century to its role as the epicentre of Swinging London, Chelsea has made its mark as one of the most desirable neighbourhoods in London.
 
Located on a quiet side street in the heart of the district, this splendid four-bedroom house is just a short stroll from the shopping, dining, pubs and galleries of the King’s Road.
 
Behind the charming period façade, the house has been completely rebuilt to provide a spacious, light-filled, contemporary space arranged over five floors. The entrance is on the upper ground floor, where you step into an open plan living area that encompasses the entire floor. Going down one floor, the lower ground contains an open kitchen-dining area, featuring a bespoke Roundhouse kitchen design. Also on this level are a guest lavatory, pantry, and utility room. Sliding doors open onto a secluded rear patio. Below this is a daylight basement with home office, family room, and an en suite bedroom.
 
Heading up to the first floor, there’s a front bedroom with shower en suite and a gorgeous back bedroom with bath, shower and marble floor and wall. The upper floor has a “penthouse suite” of primary bedroom, pink marble bathroom and walk-in wardrobe.The house has top-of-the-range Kef speakers in every room, Heatmiser underfloor heating and Lutron QS Homeworks lighting. 
 
In addition to its indoor entertainment areas, the period home includes a newly built outdoor space — this double-height private sanctuary is accessible from the lower ground floor kitchen, providing an outdoor living area with all the comforts of home. The space is currently being renovated to include new greenery and furnishings. The home is also near St. Luke’s Gardens, a popular leafy park with walking paths and playground.

The property, which comes fully furnished and professionally decorated, is perfectly situated to take advantage of everything the city has to offer, whilst also being a luxurious haven for relaxation. 

Please note: Share Price does not include standard 17% UK Stamp Duty due at closing, equal to £121,146, and non-financeable.

title: Paris, France — 2-Bed Apartment
description:
Natural light streams through expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, illuminating this bright 2-bedroom apartment in the heart of the City of Light. This meticulously renovated 100 square meter apartment boasts an excellent floor plan is on the 3rd floor of a fine mid-19th century building with a lift. The home is fully air conditioned and includes a cellar.

The living room is bathed in sunshine thanks to several wide floor-to-ceiling windows. Juliet also includes an equipped kitchen, two bedroom suites each with a bathroom, water closet and dressing room. The apartment is conveniently located in the 7th arrondissement, a quintessentially Parisian neighborhood filled with boutique shops and cozy cafes.

title: Mayfair, England — 3-Bed Penthouse
description:
Discover unrivaled luxury at Three Kings Yard, in the heart of Mayfair, London. Be one of the first to experience London in this newly constructed penthouse, offering a seamless blend of contemporary design and timeless craftsmanship. Explore the city's most exclusive district, this flat provides easy access to world-class dining, designer boutiques, and cultural landmarks such as Hyde Park and Buckingham Palace. Located on Mayfair's only gated street, the location is private while walkable to countless hot spots.

Step into expansive living spaces adorned with bespoke furnishings and impeccable finishes. The state-of-the-art kitchen is a culinary masterpiece, featuring top-of-the-line appliances, custom cabinetry, and sleek countertops, ideal for gourmet cooking and entertaining. The home includes automation for mood lighting and shading, automated comfort cooling and heating, and full speaker and AV integration. Indulge in spa-like bathrooms throughout the flat, adorned with premium fixtures, marble accents, and meticulous attention to detail. The elegant open space living area opens to a secluded terrace, perfect for gathering.

title: London, England — 3-Bed Cabin
description:
Steps from the charm of Sloane Square and the boutiques of Chelsea, this refined three-bedroom residence blends timeless British sophistication with modern luxury. Located on Ebury Street in the sought-after Belgravia neighborhood, the home offers effortless access to fine dining, elegant shops, and cultural landmarks across central London.

Inside, high ceilings and grand sash windows fill the space with natural light. The kitchen features integrated Miele appliances, Volakas marble surfaces, and bespoke cabinetry, while the open living area invites relaxed entertaining. The primary suite includes a walk-in wardrobe with custom woodwork and an elegant en suite bathroom with marble finishes and a rainfall shower. A second bedroom and bath offer comfort for guests or family, completing this exquisite London pied-à-terre.

From quiet morning strolls through Eaton Square Gardens to evenings at nearby Duke of York Square or the Royal Court Theatre, this home offers an unparalleled Belgravia lifestyle — classic, cosmopolitan, and entirely effortless.

title: Paris, France — 3-Bed Apartment
description:
Set along Boulevard Saint-Germain in Paris’s coveted 7th arrondissement, this beautifully renovated residence captures the timeless character of a classic Haussmannian apartment while offering the comfort of modern design. Positioned on the third floor of an elegant corner building with elevator access, the home enjoys exceptional light and privacy as the only residence on its landing.

The apartment’s corner orientation and 11 Juliet balconies fill the interiors with natural light throughout the day. Tall windows frame views of the surrounding streets, while 3.4-meter ceilings and original crown molding create a sense of grandeur that reflects the architectural heritage of the neighborhood. Southeast and southwest exposures further enhance the airy, sunlit feel of the home.

The layout balances refined entertaining with comfortable everyday living. An inviting entry hall leads to a bright corner living room designed for gathering, while the adjoining dining space connects seamlessly to a thoughtfully designed open kitchen. The primary suite offers a calm retreat with its own bathroom and dressing room, complemented by a second en-suite bedroom and a third bedroom ideal for guests, family, or a home office. An additional shower room and guest powder room complete the layout.

Modern upgrades including air conditioning, underfloor heating, double-glazed windows, and extensive built-in storage bring contemporary comfort to this historic setting.

The location places owners in the center of one of Paris’s most iconic neighborhoods. Just steps from the National Assembly, the Musée d’Orsay, and the future Maybourne Saint-Germain hotel, the apartment is surrounded by cafés, galleries, and boutiques. A nearby metro station offers convenient access to the rest of the city, making it easy to explore everything Paris has to offer.

Fully furnished and professionally managed, the home offers a refined Parisian residence ready to enjoy from day one.

title: Milano, Italy — 3-Bed Apartment
description:
Situated in one of Milan's most prestigious areas, this exquisite apartment, located on the noble floor of a historic building, has recently undergone a meticulous renovation with premium finishes.

The property showcases a seamless blend of elegance and refined design. Modern, versatile spaces are artfully integrated with classical elements, creating a bright, airy atmosphere ideal for those who appreciate exclusive, timeless style. The expansive living room, flooded with natural light, offers a captivating view of Viale Bianca Maria, while the kitchen and sleeping quarters overlook a serene internal courtyard. The property features a spacious and luxurious master bedroom, complete with an en-suite bathroom, which includes a bathtub, shower, and access to a delightful private balcony. The sleeping area is further complemented by two additional bedrooms, each served by elegantly appointed, functional bathrooms. The kitchen, fully furnished with high-end appliances, is enriched by a striking period fireplace, which contrasts harmoniously with a modern designer chandelier. A practical balcony completes the space, making it an ideal setting for those who appreciate cooking in an inviting yet sophisticated environment. The apartment offers an array of exclusive features, including an advanced home automation system, security alarm, independent heating with a state-of-the-art boiler, and ducted air conditioning. Throughout the property, high-quality parquet flooring enhances the overall warmth and refined elegance.

The property also benefits from a spacious private cellar and the convenience of a full-time concierge service, further elevating the living experience.

title: Chamonix-mont-blanc, France — 4-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description: This intimate new residence blends harmoniously into the resort's surroundings. Its beautifully crafted architecture, inspired by the codes of the Chamonix identity and the Art Deco and Art Nouveau movements, reinforces its timeless character. Ideally situated just minutes from both the Brévent Ski Lift and the Aiguille du Midi lift, this sumptuous 1,378 sq. ft. 4-bedroom flat is perched on the 4th and top floor, offering uninterrupted views—including breathtaking panoramas of Mont Blanc. You'll love its two terraces—one facing south, perfect for enjoying the sun throughout the day, and the other facing east. Four spacious en suite bedrooms provide exceptional comfort and privacy for the entire family. The residence also features secure basement parking and bike storage.

description: Situated in central Madrid in the popular Salamanca neighborhood, this fully renovated 3-bedroom, 3.5-bath residence blends modern design with timeless comfort. Light-filled living spaces, a sleek kitchen, and tranquil bedrooms create the perfect backdrop for gatherings or quiet escapes. The prime location of this home offers effortless access to dining, shopping, and cultural landmarks, making it an ideal retreat in one of Europe’s most vibrant cities.

title: Florence, Italy — 2-Bed Apartment
description: Discover the heart of Florence in this newly renovated 2-bedroom, 2.5-bath residence on Via dei Pecori. Just steps from the city’s historic landmarks, luxury boutiques, and vibrant piazzas, this home pairs authentic Italian character with modern comfort. Thoughtful interiors create an inviting retreat after a day of exploring, while generous living spaces make it ideal for both relaxing and entertaining. With its prime location in one of Europe’s most celebrated cities, this condo offers a rare opportunity to own a timeless piece of Florence.

description:
Step into a Parisian paradise in the heart of renowned Saint-Germain-des-Prés, Paris’ intellectual and artistic hub. Set within a beautifully preserved historical building on the famed Rue des Beaux Arts, this exquisite 3-bedroom apartment blends modern comforts with timeless elegance. 

Enjoy new air conditioning, updated appliances, gorgeous chevroned flooring and large windows that flood the space with natural light. Unwind in the spacious living room offering views of nearby art galleries or take a leisurely stroll to iconic landmarks like the Louvre, Notre-Dame and The Seine.

title: Paris, France — 2-Bed Apartment With Fireplace
description:
Set on the iconic Rue Madame in Paris’s 6th arrondissement, this impeccably renovated residence offers a rare opportunity to own a piece of Left Bank elegance. Located just a 5-minute stroll from the Jardin du Luxembourg and moments from the chic boutiques of Boulevard Saint-Germain, the home blends timeless Parisian architecture with refined modern interiors, making it your perfect pied-à-terre for making memories with friends and family in the world’s most romantic city.

The light-filled flat features soaring ceilings, original moldings, and large windows that overlook a quiet courtyard, creating a serene escape from the vibrant energy of the neighborhood. The interiors are thoughtfully curated with high-end finishes, including marble and stone accents in the kitchen and bathrooms, custom cabinetry, radiant heat flooring, and central air conditioning - a rarity in Parisian apartments. Entertain guests around the dining table after a visit to the nearby Bon Marché, or unwind in the stylish living room after an afternoon exploring the Seine’s Left Bank.

This home puts you in the center of everything: enjoy morning croissants at Café de Flore (8-minute walk), browse contemporary art at the Fondation Cartier, or toast the evening with cocktails at Hôtel Lutetia—all just steps from your front door.

Whether you’re celebrating holidays with family, hosting friends for a long weekend, or soaking in the everyday charm of Parisian life, this residence is your effortless home base. Fully furnished, professionally designed, and managed by, Rue Madame is your perfect Parisian escape.

Set in the medieval village of Castiglioncello,

Located in the historic center of the charming and vibrant village of Fayence, Villa Soie still offers complete privacy in a setting where indoor and outdoor living blend seamlessly. This is an opportunity to create your family’s gathering place, where meaningful experiences bring you closer together and memories grow over time. Once upon a time a silk factory, the Villa Soie has been thoughtfully and meticulously renovated, with deep respect for the history embedded in its solid stone walls. The result is a harmonious balance between authentic character and refined contemporary comfort, framed by expansive views that invite you to slow down and breathe. The home feels intimate for a quiet escape with your loved one, yet spacious when generations come together. The open kitchen and adjoining lounge, flowing out towards the garden, form the natural heart of the home. From here, life extends effortlessly outdoors, where the pool, shaded terraces, and relaxed atmosphere invite fun days and lingering evenings. The master suite, complete with its own spa area, offers a serene retreat at the end of the day. In Fayence, Provençal life is lived as it is meant to be, just 50 minutes from Nice Airport. The village offers year-round vibrancy, with markets, boutiques, and a rich selection of restaurants - more than 20 within a short walk from your own provençal dream home. At the same time, the area has evolved into a sought-after destination for a design-conscious, international lifestyle, while preserving its historic soul. Life's best moments should not be postponed: everything is ready for your best life. All you have to do is arrive - and live in the moment, in your family's private retreat in Provence.

description: Mallorca and the Balearic capital Palma invite you to enjoy quality of life all year round - now even more accessible . In this exclusive townhouse over three floors you will enjoy three spacious bedrooms and three bathrooms, luxurious qualities, private swimming pool and parking. The terrace and garden are designed to create life both inside and out, perfect for taking advantage of the inviting Mediterranean climate. Have your friends and family around while you prepare dinner either inside the well-equipped kitchen or outside at the summer kitchen - this home is made experiences together. The area is known for its low brick houses and colorful facades, just a short walk from the trendy nightlife and exclusive restaurants of Santa Catalina. Here you live in one of Palma's most authentic neighborhoods, where the proximity of the prestigious Palma Sport & Tennis Club supports an active and sophisticated lifestyle. With the green expanses of Bellver Park as its closest neighbour and the cathedral in sight, this location offers the perfect balance between private seclusion and Mediterranean urban elegance. The home invites you in with professionally designed interiors, including all furniture and equipment - turnkey and ready for use.

description: In the delightful area of Higuerón on the sunny Costa del Sol, many families have already fulfilled their dream of homeownership This elegant corner apartment on the second floor features 3 spacious bedrooms. Higuerón provides an exclusive and elevated lifestyle just 20 minutes from Málaga’s historic streets and 25 minutes from luxurious Marbella. In the evening, gather your loved ones and savor dinner at one of the many excellent nearby restaurants.

title: Mouans-Sartoux, France — 7-Bed Villa
description: Set between the storied villages of Valbonne and Mougins, Villa Castellaras offers a serene base from which to savour the Côte d’Azur. From this tranquil hillside estate you are within a short drive to top range golf courses, medieval squares and Michelin‑starred restaurants, while the glamour of Cannes and the broader Riviera is just down the road. The region boasts 300 days of sunshine, crystal‑clear waters, small authentic beaches and villages, and countless opportunities for cycling, golf, tennis, padel and water sports. Direct from the villa you access scenic hikes along canals, through pine‑lined hills or up into the mountains towards Grasse. Nice airport is only 25 minutes away, making it effortless to come and go. Beyond its privileged location, Villa Castellaras itself is designed for sharing life’s finest moments. Set on a 5,000 m² lush, gated plot with total privacy and security cameras, the 344 m² néo-provençal villa features seven bedrooms, six bathrooms and several expansive living areas. Two fully equipped kitchens and dining spaces - in the main house and pool level - make it easy for multiple families or couples to share memorable experiences together. Outdoors, the 82 m² heated swimming pool, petanque court and 677 m² of terraces invite al‑fresco living, while a summer kitchen with barbecue and cold storage means meals stretch into lingering evenings. With a car included as well, you are fully set for when the urge for roadside adventures arise. The Villa Castellaras marries French Riviera elegance with modern ease; every space is designed to showcase the panoramic views and sunsets over the Esterel mountains and the Bay of Cannes..

title: Apricale, Italy — 3-Bed Villa With Infinity Pool
description: Liguria and the historic Italian Riviera have a timeless appeal — and the brand new Villa Apricus truly fulfills the dream of the classic ´la dolce vita´ lifestyle. Perfectly positioned between the Italian and French Rivieras, Apricale feels worlds away yet wonderfully connected: just 15 minutes to the Mediterranean coast, 25 minutes to elegant Bordighera, 40 minutes to San Remo and Monaco, and an easy one-hour drive to Nice International Airport. With its classic stone façade, meticulously landscaped gardens on the 4,200 m2 plot, and large, infinity pool with a view that takes your breath away, the villa offers a serene escape, ready to enjoy from the moment you arrive. Inside the high quality 180 m2 villa, the home is defined by natural materials - terracotta tile floors, exposed beams and vaulted ceilings, and bespoke artisan details - paired with comforts like underfloor heating, AC throughout, gas stove in the spacious kitchen, and solar electrical power with 5,5 kW battery pack for sustainable and low cost living. Each of the three bedrooms has an elegant bathroom with marble sink tops, spacious showers, and the master comes with a bathtub to soak up in, perhaps zipping to a glass of local wine. Outdoors, the villa is made for both relaxed and active living: enjoy the summer kitchen with pizza oven, sunbeds with enviable views across the lush hills, ample seating under the pergola for those long, warm evening, a boule court to play, and an elegant garden rich with citrus and olive trees - a space as beautiful as it is effortless. Just a quick stroll away, the village square of Apricale awaits with activities and life year round, with several restaurants and bars where you immediately become part of the locals. When you have explored the hills with its vast network of trails binding together the neighboring villages, the full Riviera glamour welcomes you just a short ride away.

With its classic stone façade, landscaped gardens on the 14,300 m 2 plot, and large saltwater pool with a waterfall, the villa offers a serene escape, ready to enjoy from the moment you arrive. Inside the 300 m 2 villa, the home is defined by natural materials - oak parquet, marble floors, and artisan details - paired with comforts like underfloor heating, Miele appliances, Sonos sound system, and solar powered water heating. In addition, the four-bedroom layout comes with a 50 m 2 separate guest house where we will also add gym equipment, perfect for hosting friends and family in style. Outdoors, the villa is made for relaxed living: enjoy sun-drenched terraces, a poolside summer kitchen, and an elegant garden with cypresses, palm and olive trees - a space as beautiful as it is effortless. Just minutes away, the beaches of Caló del Moro , Cala Llombards, and Cala Mondragó await with turquoise waters and golden sunsets. Nearby Santanyí charms with its market and restaurants, while Cala d’Or marina and Vall d’Or golf add a touch of Mediterranean glamour.

title: Higueron, Spain — 3-Bed Penthouse With Sea Views
description: Welcome to the exclusive Higuerón area on the Costa del Sol, where several families are already owning their dream home The elegant Seaview Penthouse offers spectacular, uninterrupted views over the Mediterranean Sea and the coastline of southern Spain. Before handover to its owners, the residence will be fully furnished with professionally curated interiors and thoughtfully equipped throughout – turnkey and ready to enjoy from day one. Just a short walk away, the beach awaits – whether you are looking for sun-soaked relaxation or time at one of the local beach clubs. The nearby train station connects you seamlessly to the airport, Málaga’s historic center, and charming coastal towns along the way. Spend your days by the pool, strolling to the beach, or exploring the best the Costa del Sol has to offer. As the sun sets, gather your loved ones and enjoy a long, leisurely dinner at one of the many exceptional restaurants nearby – the perfect close to a perfect day.

Located in an exclusive gated community, this traditional Spanish cortijo-style home combines exclusivity and nature, just 20 minutes from Marbella. Spanning 255 m² on a single floor, the villa features an expansive living and dining area, a fully equipped kitchen, and immense windows that bring the outdoors in. Nearby San Pedro Alcántara and Puerto Banús offer elegant shopping and dining options..
