title: Ibiza, Spain — 3-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
Our Home Cala Tarida is located on one of the iconic western beaches of Ibiza, offering you the perfect retreat with its white sand, turquoise waters, and breathtaking sunsets. This spacious home features 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and 186 m² of living space. From its prime location on the mountain, you can enjoy stunning sea views directly from your room. Our home boasts a private pool, a luxury not available in all homes within the development, and a communal pool just a 30-second walk away, providing privacy by being discreetly located. A short 5-minute walk will take you to the beautiful beach, making our home the best in the complex as others are 10 minutes away. Conveniently situated, it is only a 15-minute drive from Sant Josep and 20 minutes from San Antoni.
Additionally, our home includes a private basement, a feature not available in all homes, and we will provide secure lockers for each owner to store their belongings safely. Experience the best of Ibiza from the comfort and luxury of our Home Cala Tarida.

title: Menorca, Spain — 4-Bed Villa With Pool
description: Sa Llosa Homes is a private and exclusive residential complex surrounded by pine forests that overlooks the Mediterranean horizon in a spectacular natural environment. It’s an unbeatable opportunity to enjoy a unique residential complex for those who value exclusivity and privacy. It is composed by composed 50 chalets of 3 and 4 bedrooms, with a modern, functional and innovative design that integrates into its beautiful natural environment built with local island materials. Son Parc homes has 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, high end kitchen, private pool, garden and terrace.

title: Cantabria, Spain — 4-Bed Villa With Garden
description:
Set on the eastern edge of a small Cantabrian village, this Casa stands as the gateway to an extraordinary holiday project—one that reimagines rural life with purpose, beauty, and belonging.
This 4-bedroom, 4-bathroom home with an additional guest toilet spans 215 m² on a 1,005 m² plot. Its design blends contemporary comfort with a deep respect for place. Built using local materials—Cantabrian stone, reclaimed terracotta tiles, and native chestnut wood—the house feels both rooted and renewed. It’s the first of five unique homes, each inspired by regional typologies.
Inside, life flows naturally. The heart of the home is an open kitchen, dining, and living space that extends into the garden through a light-filled gallery. A ground-floor bedroom adds versatility, while upstairs, each of the four bedrooms comes with its own en-suite bathroom. Also on the first floor, a terrace offers the perfect spot for stargazing, reading, or simply pausing.
Beyond the home, the setting is pure magic. Lamadrid, in the municipality of Valdáliga, lies between the Cantabrian Sea and the Sierra del Escudo. Just minutes from the surf beaches of Oyambre and Gerra, the charming towns of Comillas and San Vicente de la Barquera, and the wild trails of the Picos de Europa, it’s a place to disconnect deeply and reconnect fully. Only 40 minutes from Santander and its airport—and just 90 minutes from Bilbao—Lamadrid feels both remote and accessible. This is a space that invites you to slow down—and truly belong.
Designed for connection and built for the family stories still to come.

title: Madrid, Spain — 3-Bed Apartment With Terrace
description:
This penthouse with a 16-square-meter private terrace and storage unit, set within a beautifully restored classical building in Madrid’s coveted Salamanca neighborhood.
Perched on the sixth and top floor of Calle Hermosilla, this 175-square-meter residence has been fully reimagined by the renowned architecture studio of Mónica Diago. The result is a luminous, one-of-a-kind home where historic charm meets contemporary design.
The social heart of the home centers around a generous living room with a decorative fireplace, an elegant dining space with a balcony overlooking the street, and a separate kitchen. Framed by an artisan-crafted iron and glass door, the kitchen features custom oak cabinetry, a bespoke stone countertop, and premium Porcelanosa fittings—perfectly balancing style and everyday function.
Designed to accommodate both privacy and comfort, the home offers three bedrooms, two with en-suite bathrooms, all facing a spacious interior courtyard bathed in southern light. The primary suite is notably spacious, with a serene, spa-like bathroom featuring marble floors and a custom vanity. Secondary bathrooms include glass mosaic tiles and Porcelanosa fixtures, echoing the home’s refined aesthetic.
This newly renovated residence showcases a meticulous attention to detail: herringbone oak floors, restored original radiators, black Marquina marble accents, decorative plaster moldings, and handcrafted wooden doors that faithfully reflect the building’s original character. Custom-designed elements—like the living room’s center tables and the main bathroom sink—add a personal, signature touch.
Whether hosting guests, enjoying quiet moments, or creating lasting memories with loved ones, this home offers a rare balance of elegance, warmth, and thoughtful design. A penthouse with a terrace in Salamanca is not just a property—it’s a rare opportunity. And this one is a true signature home, crafted with intention from beginning to end.

title: Costa de la Luz, Spain — 4-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
In the heart of the exclusive Roche community (Conil de la Frontera), this private villa invites you to live surrounded by nature, serenity, and the unmistakable charm of the Costa de la Luz. Set beside the Atlantic Ocean, nestled between untouched sandy beaches.
Designed with a sustainable architectural approach, the villa blends seamlessly into its natural surroundings. Spread across two floors, it features 4 bedrooms, 3 full bathrooms, 1 guest toilet, a spacious open-plan living and dining area with integrated kitchen, entrance hall, storage room, outdoor utility area, and a porch ideal for relaxing outdoors. Every room is filled with natural light. Outside, a private swimming pool with solarium and parking space for two vehicles complete this unique residential experience.
Its privileged location places you just minutes from Conil’s marina and fishing port, as well as some of the finest golf courses in the region: Golf Novo Sancti Petri, Sancti Petri Hills, Golf La Estancia, and Golf Campano.

title: Cantabria, Spain — 4-Bed Villa With Garden
description:
Casa Abaña is a property that redefines the concept of a country home, where contemporary design merges with the essence of traditional Cantabrian architecture. Located in Abaño, part of San Vicente de la Barquera, just a few kilometers from Comillas and the impressive Oyambre Natural Park, this detached house, built in 2020, is a true sanctuary of light and calm. With 349 m² built on a 526 m² landscaped plot, every detail has been carefully selected to offer an unparalleled living experience, standing out for its top-quality finishes and impeccable state of preservation.
\*It's important to note that the furniture shown is not the final or included furniture of the property. Layout
The layout of Casa Abaña has been designed to maximize comfort and connection with the surroundings. The main floor is the heart of the house, housing a spacious living room with a cozy fireplace, a large dining room, and an ample kitchen with an office area, which opens directly onto a spectacular terrace, perfect for enjoying the outdoors. This floor is completed with a guest toilet, a practical independent laundry room, and a bedroom with an en-suite bathroom. Upstairs, you'll find a large master bedroom with an en-suite bathroom and an additional living room, ideal for relaxing moments. In the attic, the property is completed with two more bedrooms, each with its own en-suite bathroom, ensuring privacy and comfort for the entire family. All rooms enjoy abundant natural light, creating warm and vibrant atmospheres. Additionally, the house features a garage and a private garden. Beyond
Casa Abaña is situated in a privileged enclave: Abaño, a picturesque town in the Cantabrian municipality of San Vicente de la Barquera. This setting is an authentic natural paradise, strategically located between Comillas and the fascinating beaches of the area, just a few meters from the sea. The region's ornithological and landscape richness is astonishing, with estuaries, beaches, marshes, dunes, cliffs, and extensive forests that invite family exploration and outdoor enjoyment. The area is known for its diverse leisure activities such as surfing, golf, and hiking, making it a very attractive area for nature lovers. Abaño is also a place with history, preserving a property included in the General Inventory of Cantabria: the Romanesque chapel of Lazareto, dating from the 13th century, which has a single nave and a square apse. The slightly pointed door and the chapel with its ribbed vault stand out as one of the first manifestations of Gothic art preserved in the region. On the inner face of the chapel walls, there are remains of symbolic and figurative paintings, made in red paint on white lime, such as a checkerboard frieze, rosettes, and a large cross above the altar. Being an owner of Casa Abaña means immersing yourself in the beauty and tranquility of the Cantabrian coast, with all the comforts of a designer home and the cultural richness of its surroundings.

title: Ibiza, Spain — 3-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
Discover Casa Waves Poolside, an exquisite 93 m² residence located in the heart of Santa Eulalia del Río. This exceptionally designed home invites you to a lifestyle where exclusivity meets Mediterranean serenity. With its direct sea views and top-quality finishes, Casa Waves I is the perfect retreat for those seeking exclusivity and comfort in one of the island's most coveted destinations. Layout
Casa Waves Poolside offers a design conceived for enjoyment and privacy. With three bright bedrooms, the layout includes a master double bedroom with its own en-suite bathroom, a single bedroom, and another double bedroom sharing a common bathroom. The spacious common areas seamlessly connect with the 23 m² terrace, creating an open-plan and inviting space, ideal for socializing or relaxing. The true highlight of this home is the private jacuzzi located on the terrace, an exclusive spot from which you can delight in breathtaking views of the Mediterranean, feeling the sea breeze. This property is situated in a privileged location and also includes a practical garage. Beyond
Being an owner in this exclusive complex means immersing yourself in an "Oasis-like" lifestyle. Here, you'll have access to a high-level Club House, which includes a bar and a social lounge perfect for private events or relaxed gatherings, as well as a play area. For your well-being, the complex features a fitness and wellness area managed by Aguas de Ibiza, guaranteeing top-tier services.
Santa Eulalia del Río is one of the island's most peaceful and well-connected areas, renowned for its established charm. Its marina, the old town around Puig de Missa hill, and its picturesque promenade invite exploration. It's a top-tier gastronomic destination and offers unbeatable connections to the best restaurants, agrotourism farms, and white sand beaches with turquoise waters throughout the island, such as the nearby and family-friendly Santa Eulalia beach.
This exclusive lifestyle is complemented by a range of premium on-demand services from the complex:
Concierge and Private Boat: Concierge service available to organize exclusive plans, private boat rental, management of boats and moorings in the marina.
Private Chef & Catering: At-home chef service and catering teams for banquets or private events.
Porter and Security: Reception, management, and organization of all correspondence and packages.
Pet Care: Pet walking and care services, as well as at-home veterinary attention.
Child Care: Babysitter hiring approved by the Aguas de Ibiza Kid's Club.
Ample Event Space: An open-plan space within the residential complex for private events by reservation, with event planner services.
Wellness and Beauty: Therapeutic massages, aesthetic treatments, and at-home hairdressing.

title: Cantabria, Spain — 4-Bed Villa With Garden
description:
Located in Lamadrid, on a landscaped 521 m² plot, stands a 156 m² semi-detached residence where rural serenity meets contemporary elegance. Its architecture celebrates local materials — Cantabrian stone, chestnut wood, ceramic tiles, and lime renders that age with quiet beauty — creating a home deeply connected to its surroundings.
The ground floor is designed for flow and comfort: a living room with a fireplace opening onto the garden, and an integrated kitchen that becomes the natural gathering point of the house. A flexible bedroom completes this level.
Upstairs, three luminous bedrooms each open onto a private terrace with views of the green landscape. The primary suite is a highlight: a gallery and en-suite bathroom form a serene private retreat.
The home sits within a harmoniously designed community, where landscaped gardens create a calm, cohesive environment that elevates life outdoors.

title: Baqueira, Spain — 3-Bed Chalet
description:
Located in the highly sought-after Val de Ruda, Casa Gessóla is a 97 m² apartment thoughtfully designed to combine comfort, natural light, and effortless functionality — the kind that makes mountain living feel easy.
The spacious and light-filled living and dining area opens onto a private balcony, perfect for unwinding after a day on the slopes. From here, the space flows naturally into a fully equipped kitchen, visually connected to the living area and designed to make sharing time together simple and relaxed.
The night area features three well-planned bedrooms. The main bedroom includes an en-suite bathroom, offering privacy and calm. Two additional bedrooms — one with bunk beds and a single bed, and another with two single beds — share a full bathroom, making the apartment ideal for families and guests.
Casa Gessóla also includes a generous private parking space, an independent storage room, and a ski locker located directly under the gondola. This allows for a seamless ski-in, ski-out lifestyle, ensuring comfort and direct access to the slopes from one of the most desirable developments in Baqueira.
A home designed for winter days that start on the mountain and end together.

title: Baqueira, Spain — 4-Bed Chalet With Fireplace
description:
Casa Ostau is a newly built home where furniture and design become the final layer that ties architecture, landscape and emotion together. Inspired by contemporary Alpine style, it blends noble woods, stone, linen and soft neutral tones to create a warm, functional and honest atmosphere.
Lighting pieces from Santa & Cole, Kave Home and Pilma bring balance and character, mixing mountain tradition with a subtle Mediterranean sensibility.
After a long day in Baqueira, coming back here feels like another level. This isn’t just après-ski, this is the plan.
The fireplace lights up the living room, the valley appears through the windows, and the open kitchen makes everything flow. One person opens the wine, another prepares something on the counter, gloves dry by the fire and stories from the slopes overlap with laughter.
A home designed to be shared, where time slows down, conversations stretch naturally, and every winter becomes a memory you want to keep.

title: Costa de la Luz, Spain — 4-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description:
A bright Atlantic-facing duplex in Atlanterra, where dunes, pine forests and small coves shape a calm, natural coastal setting, close to beaches like Cabo de Plata and Los Alemanes. Spanning approximately 220 m² across two levels, the home is arranged to balance privacy and shared living.
This home brings together four bedrooms and three bathrooms, including a primary bedroom with an en-suite. It also includes the indoor living room and dining space, both opening to a terrace that extends daily life outdoors and fills the interiors with natural light.
Upstairs, the atmosphere becomes more open and social. A day area unfolds as a continuous space with an open kitchen, living and dining zones, connected to a generous rooftop terrace designed for long outdoor meals, lounging and quiet time with the Atlantic breeze. Inside, white lime finishes, sandstone accents, light woods and natural textiles echo the local architecture in a serene palette of soft blues, warm sands and muted terracotta.

title: Asturias, Spain — 4-Bed Villa With Pool
description: In the heart of Tezangos, near Ribadesella, this home offers a well-balanced combination of comfort, natural light, and connection to its surroundings. Its design prioritizes spacious, well-proportioned interiors, thoughtfully conceived to be enjoyed both for short stays and extended periods. The layout is practical and fluid, ensuring a comfortable and natural living experience from day one. The common areas invite gathering and relaxation, featuring bright spaces with a seamless connection to the outdoors. The bedrooms provide a sense of calm and privacy, creating a welcoming and functional environment for rest. A versatile, easy-to-live-in home with great potential both as a primary residence and as a second home on the Asturian coast. A place designed to disconnect, unwind, and return to time and again.

title: Asturias, Spain — 4-Bed Villa With Garden
description: In Llanes, within the charming setting of La Galguera, this newly built detached villa presents a solid and versatile residential offering, designed for those who wish to experience the Asturian coast with comfort and style. The interior finishes are designed to deliver a high level of comfort from the outset, with a fully fitted kitchen and bathrooms, built-in wardrobes, and underfloor heating throughout, ensuring thermal efficiency and year-round well-being. An address that brings together coastal quality of life with high residential standards.

title: Baqueira, Spain — 3-Bed Chalet With Terrace

description: Introducing Casa Coves, a stunning new built home in Menorca that seamlessly blends high-quality craftsmanship with local style, offering breathtaking sea views. This family residence spans 203 m2, featuring 5 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, and an additional 44 m2 in the basement. Situated on an expansive 883 m2 plot, the property boasts a private pool, inviting porch, spacious terrace, and a meticulously landscaped garden. Adding to its allure is the inclusion of a pergola/chill-out project on the roof, providing panoramic views of the sea. Nestled within the exclusive Coves Noves community, this residence is just a 5-minute drive from the pristine beaches of Arenal and Port Addaia. Casa Coves is definitely where modern luxury meets the tranquility of Menorca's coastal beauty.

title: Baqueira, Spain — 3-Bed Chalet With Terrace
description:
Casa Neret boasts 98 m² of built space, distributed across 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms (one en suite), along with a balcony with views and a rear terrace to enjoy the fresh Pyrenean air. It also includes a parking space, storage room, and a tourist license. Studio is developing a renovation project to transform it into a Casa , enhancing its charm and functionality.
Located in Bagergue, the highest and most characterful village in the Val d’Aran, this home is the perfect base to enjoy Baqueira just minutes away, breathtaking hiking trails, and the true essence of Aranese culture in every corner.

title: Menorca, Spain — 4-Bed Villa With Pool
description: Sa Llosa Homes is a private and exclusive residential complex surrounded by pine forests that overlooks the Mediterranean horizon in a spectacular natural environment. It’s an unbeatable opportunity to enjoy a unique residential complex for those who value exclusivity and privacy. It is composed by composed 50 chalets of 3 and 4 bedrooms, with a modern, functional and innovative design that integrates into its beautiful natural environment built with local island materials. Son Parc homes has 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, high end kitchen, private pool, garden and terrace.

title: Ibiza, Spain — 3-Bed Villa With Pool
description: Casa Tarida is located on one of the iconic western beaches of Ibiza, offering you the perfect retreat with its white sand, turquoise waters, and breathtaking sunsets. This spacious home features 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and 100 m² of living space. From its prime location on the mountain, you can enjoy stunning sea views directly from your room. Our home boasts a communal pool just a 30-second walk away, providing privacy by being discreetly located. A short 5-minute walk will take you to the beautiful beach, making our home the best in the complex as others are 10 minutes away. Conveniently situated, it is only a 15-minute drive from Sant Josep and 20 minutes from San Antoni. Experience the best of Ibiza from the comfort and excellence of our Casa Tarida.

title: Baqueira, Spain — 3-Bed Chalet With Terrace
description:
Located in the exclusive Pleta de Nheu at 1700 meters above sea level, this 125 m² home features 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, a living-dining area with an open kitchen, and a southwest-facing balcony with stunning views of the Baqueira Beret slopes and the Aran Valley. The property includes a laundry room, private parking space, and a tourist license.
The community offers a shuttle service to the Esquirò chairlift in Tanau, ensuring easy access to the slopes during peak ski season.

title: Ibiza, Spain — 4-Bed Villa With Pool
description: Ribes is a 284 square meter south-facing apartment with breathtaking sea views. Additionally, it features over 100 square meters of terrace space. Its filled with natural light, has high ceilings and four spacious bedrooms, four brand new bathrooms, and an amazing terrace with a private pool to invite friends over, have family quality time, or even enjoy by yourself with your favorite book. It also has underfloor heating and an underground parking. The property's architecture is relaxing and energizing, built with natural materials, high-end brand kitchen, luxurious appliances, and top-quality furniture specially designed for each space. Likewise, the new construction development has a large community pool in the common area. As the building is only a few meters from the sea, you will be able to reach the beach by a path in a minute.

title: Baqueira, Spain — 4-Bed Chalet With Fireplace
description:
Located in the heart of Vielha, in the charming "Cap dera Vila," is this unparalleled house that embodies the essence of the Aran Valley. With a traditional Aranese architecture and an elegance and modernity decoration, this home offers a perfect retreat for those looking to enjoy the sky season and the beauty of the Pyrenees. Just steps away from local amenities and with views of the majestic mountain landscapes.
On the main floor, you first find a spacious living-dining room with a cozy fireplace and floor-to-ceiling windows that flood the space with natural light. This is the perfect place to relax and create unforgettable moments. There is also a fully equipped open kitchen.
On the second floor is the master bedroom, an incomparable resting space with an en-suite bathroom, offering privacy. Additionally, this floor has three spacious double bedrooms, each designed to provide maximum comfort. Two additional bathrooms complete this floor.
The house includes a private garage with ample space for your vehicle. During ski season, you'll also have a dedicated parking space at the Ruda ski station, offering added convenience. Additionally, the house comes with a tourist license.

title: Ses Salines, Spain — 3-Bed Townhouse With Pool
description:
This new-build townhouse in Ses Salines embodies the Mediterranean lifestyle in its most beautiful form – quietly located in the authentic south of Mallorca.

The centrepiece is the quiet courtyard with inviting terraces and a heated saltwater pool – perfect for relaxing, sunbathing and spending time together in the open air.

In just 15 minutes by car, you can get to the beautiful Es Trenc beach with its fine sand and turquoise waters. You will also enjoy a short distance to the lively Santanyí – with a variety of restaurants, cafés, weekly markets and small shops. The nearby Mondragó Nature Park offers numerous trails through unspoilt nature for a day trip, and one of Europe's largest botanical gardens is also closeby.

For golf enthusiasts, the Vall d'Or Golf Club is about 30 minutes away – a scenic course with views of the coast.
amenities: Es Trenc dream beach 15 minutes away by car
Mondragó Nature Reserve, 25 minutes by car
One of Europe's largest botanical gardens (50,000 m²) just 5 minutes away by e-bike
Restaurants and shops within walking distance in just a few minutes

title: Torri del Benaco, Italy — 2-Bed Apartment With Pool
description:
In an exclusive location in the first line on the shores of Lake Garda, this new-build terrace apartment near Torri del Benaco has impressive panoramic views of the lake and the surrounding mountains.

The sunny terrace has everything you need to relax: a lounge area for sunbathing and space for al fresco dining in the open air. Thanks to its west-facing orientation, you can enjoy particularly colourful sunsets here. 
A private sauna is available for relaxing moments after an active day. Another highlight is the shared roof terrace with pool, from which you can enjoy the full beauty of Lake Garda.

The terraced apartment is located right next to the large hiking area around Monte Luppia and the lively town centre of Torri del Benaco with its restaurants, shops and harbour is just a few minutes away by car.
amenities: In the first water line on Lake Garda
Roof terrace with lounge and pool - shared
Directly at the lake shore with bathing spots
Next to the hiking area Monte Luppia
Town centre of Torri del Benacco in 5 minutes by car

title: Port d'Andratx, Spain — 2-Bed Penthouse With Pool
description:
Your own penthouse in the first sea line - in a highly popular location in Port d'Andratx. Here you can enjoy panoramic views of the sea and the surrounding coastal landscape.

The south-facing balcony ensures many hours of sunshine, while the shared pool is perfect for cooling off. One highlight is the direct access to the sea - perfect for a refreshing swim or a spontaneous SUP tour. The fireplace creates a Mediterranean cosy atmosphere for relaxing hours, also on chilly evenings.

The beautiful Cala Fonoll bay, the golf course and the exclusive harbour of Port d'Andratx with its restaurants, boutiques and yachts are just a few minutes away. A rare opportunity to combine a seaside location and Mallorcan lifestyle.
amenities: Exclusive location in first sea line
Cala Fonoll is just a few minutes away
Golf course is just 10 minutes away

title: Hollersbach, Austria — 3-Bed Chalet With Mountain Views
description:
This luxury chalet in alpine chic style is situated on a slightly elevated, sunny south-facing slope with fantastic views of the surrounding mountain panorama. 

The living area with exposed roof trusses and fireplace is the heart of the chalet, creating a warm, inviting atmosphere. Sun-kissed balconies invite you to spend time with family and friends, accompanied by views of the mountains. Relaxation is guaranteed in the private wellness and fitness area with sauna and outdoor hot tub – perfect for unwinding after a day of skiing or hiking. The private ski room and the KitzSki ski area, which is just a few minutes away, complete the experience.

The imposing peaks of the Hohe Tauern National Park and the gentle grassy hills of the Kitzbühel Alps offer a wide range of leisure and outdoor activities all year round. Restaurants and shops are also just a few minutes away by car.

In addition, the chalet has a rare and highly sought-after leisure residence in Austria.
amenities: New build chalet in alpine style
Exclusive location in the Kitzbühel Alps
On a sunny slope with southern exposure
Large, wrap-around balcony with mountain views
Hot tub in the outdoor area
Access to the KitzSki ski area just a few minutes away by car
Hollersbach bathing lake just a few minutes away by car

title: Ses Salines, Spain — 5-Bed Finca With Pool
description:
This luxurious new-build finca in Mediterranean style combines holiday comfort, nature and tranquillity at the highest level. 

With beautiful panoramic views over the Ses Salines landscape, the property ensures complete privacy and combines traditional Mediterranean-style architecture with modern design.

Sunny outdoor areas, a spacious south-facing terrace and a heated saltwater pool create the perfect place for relaxing hours outdoors. Enjoy meals together under the covered terrace, a barbecue or a get-together with family and friends - always accompanied by the view of the surrounding natural scenery.

Inside, the finca impresses with light-flooded rooms over two floors. The open-plan living area and natural materials such as natural stone create a warm and inviting atmosphere. A private fitness and wellness area with sauna provides perfect space for active moments and regeneration.

Just 15 minutes from the dream beach of Es Trenc, you can also enjoy the close location to the old town of Ses Salines and lively Santanyí - with a variety of restaurants, cafés and small shops. An exceptional retreat for anyone who appreciates the south of Mallorca and is looking for an elegant lifestyle.
amenities: 2 hectares of land with lots of privacy
Several sunny and shady terrace areas
Dream beach Es Trenc in 15 minutes by car
Santanyi town centre 12 minutes away by car

title: Grimaud, France — 3-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
This exclusive garden villa is situated in the peaceful, green surroundings of Grimaud, not far from Saint-Tropez, and combines Mediterranean charm, privacy and proximity to the beach. The view stretches across the green countryside to the historic Château de Grimaud, which sits picturesquely above the village.

The highlight of the outdoor area is the lovingly designed garden with a sunny south-west-facing terrace and private pool. Sunbathing and relaxing, cooling off in the water, or dining al fresco together – here you can enjoy the mild climate to the full. Shaded retreats and a fitness/wellness area with a sauna provide additional comfort.

Grimaud’s sandy beach is just a five-minute drive away and delights with fine sand, shallow waters and ideal conditions for swimming and water sports. Port Grimaud, the ‘Venice of Provence’, with its canals, restaurants and boat hire, is also within easy reach – perfect for a day by the sea or a trip to the charming coastal village.

Golf clubs such as Beauvallon and Saint-Tropez are just a few minutes’ drive away. The green hinterland is ideal for hiking and cycling, and the lively town of Saint-Tropez is around 15 minutes away.
amenities: Exclusive location in Grimaud near Saint-Tropez
View of the countryside and the Château de Grimaud
Grimaud beach, 5 minute drive away a fine sandy beach with shallow water
Port Grimaud, the ‘Venice of Provence’ with water sports, boat hire and fine dining
Beauvallon Golf Club 5 min. drive away Saint-Tropez Golf Club 10 min. drive away

title: Santa Ponsa, Spain — 2-Bed Apartment With Pool
description:
This Mediterranean terrace apartment in the exclusive Green Park residential complex in Santa Ponsa is the perfect retreat in a prime location in the south-west of Mallorca.

The sunny, covered south-west facing terrace with views of the countryside and a small sea view invites you to enjoy the Mediterranean climate to the fullest. Surrounded by a spacious shared garden with a pool and sunbathing lawn, nestled among pine trees, you can refresh yourself and sunbathe.

The location couldn't be better: the beach is only a few minutes away by e-bike, and the marina of Port Adriano with its restaurants and shops is also within easy reach. There are first-class golf courses closeby, and the famous Mallorca Country Club offering tennis and padel facilities is just a 10 minute drive away.
amenities: View of greenery and small sea view
Spacious garden with pool and lawn for sunbathing – shared
Beach in a few minutes by e-bike
Port Adriano marina with restaurants and shops just a few minutes away by e-bike
Several golf courses within a 10-minute drive
Mallorca Country Club – tennis and padel within a 10-minute drive

title: Stuben, Austria — 2-Bed Apartment With Mountain Views
description:
This exclusive new-build apartment on a hillside is the perfect retreat for nature lovers and sports enthusiasts, with its impressive mountain panorama and sunny south-west facing balcony – right in the heart of one of Austria's most prestigious ski regions.

Floor-to-ceiling windows flood the living areas with natural light and open up a beautiful view of the valley and the mountains of Klosterley. The living area with fireplace invites you to spend cosy hours, while the private sauna ensures pure relaxation after an active day in the mountains.

The ski lift is just a few minutes' walk away (shared use of the Hotel Hubertus lift) and takes you directly to Austria's largest ski region with 305 kilometres of slopes. A new cable car directly in the village of Stuben expands the range of leisure activities. Just a few minutes away, cosy restaurants and traditional wine cellars invite you to discover the culinary specialities of the region.

Thanks to the commercial accommodation business, the property is intended for legal rental to alternating guests – with professional operation and flexible occupancy.
amenities: Exclusive hillside location on the Arlberg
Ski lift within walking distance (shared use of the Hotel Hubertus lift)
Arlberg – Austria's largest interconnected ski region

title: Port d'Alcúdia, Spain — 2-Bed Townhouse With Pool
description:
This newly built townhouse is situated in a very unique location, between the peaceful inland lake Es Llac Gran and the turquoise-coloured Mediterranean Sea. It combines modern comfort with a Mediterranean holiday feeling and is close to the beach. Just a few minutes' walk from the fine sandy beach of Alcúdia, you can enjoy an environment defined by water, nature and lightness.

The sunny outdoor areas provide a variety of retreats: a private roof terrace with lounge for relaxing under the evening sky, further west-facing terraces for enjoying sunsets and a private garden that extends the living experience to the outdoors. The shared pool with sun deck invites you to enjoy refreshing moments on warm days.

Tennis and padel courts are within easy walking distance and the renowned Alcanada golf course is just a 10-minute drive away. The harbour promenade, restaurants, cafés and shops are just a few minutes away by e-bike or car.
amenities: Exclusive location between the inland lake Es Llac Gran and the sea
View of the lake and greenery
Private roof terrace and additional  west-facing terraces
Tennis and paddle court within walking distance
Golf course Alcanada in 10 minutes by car

title: Cornwall, United Kingdom — 3-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description:
This new-build beach house is situated in a unique location right on Sennen Beach in Cornwall, one of the regions most beautiful and famous surfing beaches. From here, you can enjoy magnificent views of the sea and the surrounding green coastal landscape. The covered west-facing balcony with sea views is the perfect spot to enjoy the fresh Atlantic air and spectacular sunsets. The private garden offers plenty of space to relax outdoors, whilst a fitness area with a sauna provides soothing relaxation after an active day by the sea.

The wide sandy beach of Sennen Beach, one of Cornwalls best surf spots, is right on your doorstep and invites you to enjoy surfing sessions, walks along the coast or relaxing hours by the water. Just a few minutes away is Cape Cornwall, a quieter nature reserve with historic mine ruins and impressive views over the rugged coastline. The famous Lands End, the westernmost point of England, with its spectacular cliffs and sweeping views across the Atlantic, is also just a 10-minute drive away. Restaurants, small shops and shopping facilities are just a few minutes away, rounding off the special holiday atmosphere on this unique stretch of Cornwalls coast.
amenities: Right next to Sennen surf beach in Cornwall
View of the sea and the countryside
Covered west-facing balcony with sea views
Sennen Beach - a wide sandy beach and one of Cornwalls best surf spots
Land's End, with its cliffs and sweeping views across the Atlantic, just a 10 min. drive away
Penzance, with its harbour, restaurants and cultural attractions, just a 15 min. drive away
Supermarket just a few minutes away by car or e-bike

title: Torri del Benaco, Italy — 2-Bed Apartment With Pool
description:
This modern new-build garden apartment in the charming Albisano, above Torri del Benaco, features a wrap-around terrace and a private garden with lounge that invites you to relax and enjoy the open air.

The shared roof terrace offers an impressive panoramic view over Lake Garda, complemented by a pool area with sunbathing lawn. The small town of Albisano is just a 5-minute walk away. In addition to a charming market square, there are several restaurants and a cosy café. The next largest town, Torri del Benaco, is just a few minutes' drive away and has a range of restaurants and shops. The lake and its surrounding mountains are perfect for numerous outdoor activities: Mountain biking, golf, tennis, hiking, mountaineering, surfing and much more.
amenities: View of Lake Garda and the mountains
Roof terrace with panoramic lake view - shared
Lake shore in a few minutes by car
Town centre of Torri del Benaco in a few minutes by car or e-bike
Golf course in a few minutes by car

title: Portocolom, Spain — 2-Bed Penthouse With Pool
description:
This exclusive new-build penthouse offers fantastic panoramic views of the sea and the hills of the Llevant mountain range. From your sunny south-west-facing terrace, you can enjoy this view until late in the evening - perfect for relaxed al fresco dining. 

A special highlight is the spacious roof terrace with lounge, hot tub and outdoor kitchen, which makes Mediterranean inside-out living a pleasure. After an eventful day by the sea, this is the perfect place to round off the evening with a sundowner in the hot tub. There is a shared pool for cooling off and the Cala Marcal bay and promenade are just a few steps away. 

Portocolom, Mallorca's largest natural harbor, also invites you to take scenic walks and bike rides along the marina - a paradise for water sports enthusiasts and gourmets who appreciate the fresh fish and seafood specialties in the local restaurants.
amenities: Panoramic views of the sea and mountains
Outdoor kitchen for Al Fresco Dining

title: Laigueglia, Italy — 3-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
This new-build villa is located on a quiet hillside, surrounded by greenery and enjoying impressive panoramic views of the sea and coastline.

You can enjoy the panorama while dining al fresco on the terrace or sunbathing and relaxing in the garden. A small heated pool provides refreshment on warm days, while the orientation towards the morning sun guarantees undisturbed sunrises – the perfect start of the day.

The location combines Mediterranean landscape and coastal flair: the long sandy beach on the Ligurian coast near Alassio is only five minutes away by e-bike, and water sports facilities and boat rentals are also closeby. Golf and tennis enthusiasts can reach the Garlenda Golf Club in 15 minutes and the Laigueglia Tennis Club in just 10 minutes by car.

Numerous hiking trails lead through the green surroundings. The old town of Laigueglia is just a stone's throw away, and the charming town of Alassio is just 10 minutes by car.
amenities: Exclusive green hillside location in Liguria
Panoramic view of the sea and the coast
Long sandy beach 5 minutes away by e-bike
Garlenda Golf Club, 15 minutes away by car
Laigueglia Tennis Club in 10 minutes by car
Old town of Laigueglia closeby Alassio 10 minutes away by car
Restaurants and shops 5-10 minutes by car/e-bike

title: Marbella, Spain — 2-Bed Apartment With Pool
description:
This elegant new-build terrace apartment with views of the sea and the coast of the Costa del Sol blends harmoniously into the Andalusian natural landscape and is located just a few minutes from the lively heart of Marbella.
Enjoy the sun and fantastic sea views from your south-east-facing terrace from early in the morning. Sun loungers and a lounge and dining area provide perfect conditions for experiencing Mediterranean outdoor living. The open-plan living and dining area with floor-to-ceiling windows also allows you to enjoy this view to the fullest.

The exclusive resort features numerous amenities for an all-round relaxing stay, including a Mediterranean garden with BBQ area, indoor and outdoor pools and a first-class wellness and fitness area with sauna.

In just 10 minutes you can be at the beautiful beaches of Marbella and in the charming old town, where you can fully savour the Mediterranean lifestyle. Experience exquisite restaurants, a wide selection of shops and relax with a glass of wine at the marina.
amenities: Exclusive location in the hills near Marbella
Views to the sea and the coast
Mediterranean garden and BBQ area - shared
Beach is 10 minutes away by car
Marbella old town is 10 minutes away by car

title: Bürserberg, Austria — 2-Bed Apartment With Mountain Views
description:
This exclusive new-build terrace apartment, idyllically situated in the hills of Vorarlberg, enjoys unparalleled panoramic views of the surrounding mountains and the Brandnertal valley. On your sunny, wraparound south-west facing terrace, breakfast together becomes a special treat, accompanied by the refreshing mountain air. Large panoramic windows open up the view of nature and bring the mountain landscape to life from inside. After an active day in the Alps, a private sauna invites you to relax and rounds off the feel-good experience. 

The close distanced to the ski lifts allows you to get to the Brandnertal ski area in just a few minutes, which has 64 kilometres of varied slopes. For even more variety, Montafon is just 25 minutes away, where over 200 kilometres of slopes welcome winter sports enthusiasts.

In summer, the region offers a variety of activities for nature lovers: hikes to beautiful mountain lakes, varied mountain bike trails through unspoilt landscapes and other acitivities that allow you to experience the beauty of the Alps up close.

Just 15 minutes away, the old town of Bludenz invites you to relax with its cosy cafés and first-class shops. Enjoy the best of both worlds: a quiet retreat surrounded by nature while being close to the region's exciting outdoor activities.
amenities: Panoramic view of the  mountains and valley
Access to the Brandnertal ski area in 5 minutes
Brandnertal: Bürserberg, Tschengla and Brand with around 64 km of slopes
Ski resorts in Montafon 25 minutes away  by car; over 200 kilometres of slopes
Brand Golf Club 15 minutes away by car
Restaurants and shops in 10 minutes by car in Bludenz

title: Dénia, Spain — 1-Bed Apartment With Pool
description:
This new-build garden apartment on the seafront combines modern holiday comfort close to the beach and offers beautiful sea views. Direct access from the resort means you can reach the fine sandy beach in just a few steps.

The private garden, complete with a terrace and heated pool, creates a secluded retreat for relaxing outdoors. A private sauna provides additional moments of well-being, whilst a shared outdoor pool with sun loungers and a modern fitness and wellness area round off the facilities.

The lively centre of Dénia, with its restaurants, boutiques and the historic Castell de Dénia, is just 10 minutes by e-bike. The elegant marina, with its bars, lounges and excursion boats, is also nearby.

Golf enthusiasts can enjoy the 27-hole La Sella golf course, the largest on the Costa Blanca, with fine dining and first-class wellness facilities. Nature lovers can reach the Montgó Nature Park, with its diverse network of hiking trails, in around 15 minutes by car. Snorkelling and diving enthusiasts will be captivated by the Cabo de San Antonio Marine Reserve and its fascinating underwater world.
amenities: First line to the sea in Dénia
Direct beach access from the resort
Private garden with a terrace and heated pool
Shared outdoor pool and fitness/wellness area
Dénia's lively town centre and harbour, just 10 minutes away by e-bike
27-hole golf course with a spa 15 minute drive away
Montgó hiking area is a 15 minute drive away
Cabo de San Antonio Marine Reserve: A paradise for kayaking and snorkelling
Restaurants and shops within walking distance

title: Port d’Andratx, Spain — 3-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
Set in the peaceful, green surroundings of Port d’Andratx, this luxurious semi-detached house forms part of the exclusive New Folies complex in south-west Mallorca. The sunny south-west-facing terrace, the well-kept garden with a pool and an inviting lounge area form the heart of the outdoor space and are perfect for relaxing in the open air.

The complex itself boasts a shared fitness area as well as a wellness area with a sauna and indoor and outdoor pool. Residents also enjoy access to the exclusive Gran Folies Beach Club, which delights with its stunning location right by the sea.

The harbour of Port d’Andratx, with its lively promenade, first-class restaurants and small boutiques, is just a few minutes’ drive away. Several renowned golf courses are also within easy reach – a location that perfectly combines nature, tranquillity and an elegant Mediterranean lifestyle.
amenities: Quiet location in Port d’Andratx, part of the exclusive New Folies complex
Garden with a pool and an outdoor shower
Private lounge area and optional sauna
Access to the Gran Folies Beach Club
Port d'Andratx harbour, a 5-minute drive away
Top-class golf clubs just a 5-minute drive away

title: Heringsdorf, Germany — 1-Bed Apartment With Lake Views
description:
In a prime location in Heringsdorf on Usedom, just a few steps from the fine sandy Baltic Sea beach, this new-build garden apartment in the stylish Villa Fontana delights with its modern seaside resort style.

The exclusive waterfront location, right on the promenade, combines proximity to the sea with idyllic surroundings of lush greenery, woods and lakes. The sunny south-west facing terrace and private garden invite you to spend relaxing hours outdoors – accompanied by fresh sea air and a soothing view of the greenery. A private sauna ensures relaxing moments after a day at the beach, whilst the fireplace creates a particularly cosy atmosphere on cooler evenings.

Heringsdorf offers numerous leisure activities – from water sports to long bike rides along the coast. Restaurants, charming cafés and the famous pier make every walk an unique experience.
amenities: First line to the sea in Usedom
South-west facing terrace and private garden
Usedom Thermal Spa a 10-minute drive away

title: Santa Ponsa, Spain — 3-Bed Penthouse With Pool
description:
This Mediterranean penthouse in the first sea line in Santa Ponsa has incomparable views of the sea, the coast and the striking Malgrats Islands – a beautiful retreat that combines the best of the Mediterranean lifestyle.

The private roof terrace with outdoor kitchen is the perfect place for cosy evenings under 
the open sky, while the partially covered south-facing terrace promises sunny hours with panoramic sea views. Inside, a fireplace ensures cosy moments on cooler days.

The offer is rounded off by a lovingly designed pool area, which creates a real holiday atmosphere with Mediterranean palm trees and a direct view of the turquoise water.

Direct access to the small bathing bay allows for spontaneous swimming in the sea, while the fine sandy beach of Santa Ponsa is only a few minutes away. There are also several golf courses and tennis and padel courts nearby. For families, the jungle and water parks ensure additional amusement– all in one of the most desired locations in Mallorca.
amenities: In the first sea line in Santa Ponsa
Panoramic view of the sea and the coast
Private roof terrace with lounge and outdoor kitchen
Direct access to the sea for swimming
Sandy beach 5 minutes away by car or accessible by e-bike
Golf courses, tennis courts and paddle tennis courts just a few minutes away
Jungle and water park for children within walking distance

title: Tegernsee, Germany — 2-Bed Chalet With Mountain Views
description:
This modern chalet-style penthouse is located in a quiet area on Lake Tegernsee and combines alpine charm with contemporary living comfort. From the balconies, you can enjoy beautiful views of the lake and the surrounding mountain landscape – a place where you can experience peace and nature in a special way.

Inside, a wood-burning fireplace creates a warm, cosy atmosphere, whilst the private sauna offers soothing relaxation after an active day by the lake or in the mountains.

The lakeside, with its bathing area and jetty, is just a few steps away. The lovely lakeside promenade in Bad Wiessee and the golf course are only a few minutes away by e-bike. In winter, the nearby Spitzingsee ski resort offers a variety of slopes, around 35 minutes away by car.

The region around Lake Tegernsee is one of the most sought-after locations in Bavaria: nestled between mountains and water, it offers a wide range of leisure activities – from sailing and hiking to cycling and boat trips. At the same time, restaurants, cafés and shops are within easy reach, and the proximity to Munich makes this location particularly attractive.
amenities: View of the lake and the mountains
The lakeside with a bathing area, is just a few steps away
Lakeside promenade in Bad Wiessee is just 5 minutes away by e-bike
Bad Wiessee Golf Course is just 10 minutes away by e-bike
Hirschberglifte ski resort: 10 minutes by car; Spitzingsee ski resort: 35 minutes by car

title: Campos, Spain — 3-Bed Finca With Pool
description:
This new-build Mediterranean-style finca impresses with its well-connected location just outside Campos, its large plot with panoramic views, plenty of privacy and first-class amenities for complete relaxation.

Here you can experience inside-out living at the highest level. The well-tended garden invites you to rest, while the large, partially covered terrace allows for relaxing hours outdoors – perfect for sunbathing, unwinding and al fresco dining with family and friends. Here you can enjoy the sun from early morning until late afternoon, while a large pool offers refreshing break on hot summer days.

Inside, the spacious interior design with high ceilings and plenty of natural light is impressive, with stone and wood elements rounding off the Mediterranean style. For additional relaxation, a fitness area and sauna can be available as options.

The charming centre of Campos with its numerous shops and restaurants can be reached in a few minutes by car or bicycle. The dream beach of Es Trenc is only 15 minutes away by car.
amenities: Quiet location just outside of Campos
Campos town centre 5 minutes away by car
Numerous hiking and cycling trails through almond groves, olive trees and vineyards
Es Trenc dream beach is 15 minutes away by car
Restaurants and shops in 5 minutes by car

title: Puig de Ros, Spain — 3-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
Situated in the exclusive area of Puig de Ros, just 20 minutes from Palma, this modern, new-build semi-detached house offers a relaxing oasis. The private roof terrace, with a small view of the sea, is a real highlight – the perfect spot for relaxing in the open air. The property is further enhanced by a sunny west-facing terrace and a balcony, which invite you to enjoy relaxing afternoons and atmospheric sunsets. The private garden with a heated pool provides a secluded retreat, whilst a private fitness and wellness area with a sauna ensures relaxation and active downtime.

The popular Mhares Sea Club, with its own beach access, is just a few minutes ride away by e-bike. A sandy beach and the harbour with boat hire are also only about a ten-minute drive away. A golf course and tennis club are within walking distance or a few minutes ride by e-bike – ideal for an active holiday. Families also benefit from the nearby Aqualand El Arenal, which offers a wide range of leisure activities.

Thanks to its proximity to the airport and quick links to Palma, this location perfectly combines tranquillity, quality of life and urban diversity – perfect for anyone who wants to enjoy a relaxing break whilst remaining close to the island's vibrant lifestyle.

title: Petersberg, Italy — 2-Bed Villa With Mountain Views
description:
This new-build villa in the Eggental valley, in the heart of the Dolomites, combines modern holiday comfort with a prime location not far from Bolzano. Surrounded by lush greenery, you can enjoy magnificent views of the surrounding countryside.

The sunny south-west-facing terrace with a private garden is the perfect spot for sunbathing, relaxing together and enjoying the fresh mountain air. Generous floor-to-ceiling panoramic windows flood the interior with natural light, whilst a fireplace provides cosy warmth and comfort on cooler days. A fitness area is available for an active start to the day, and the outdoor sauna offers relaxing moments after an active day in the mountains.

The location offers both tranquillity and alpine diversity: the Petersberg Panoramic Lift, featuring a practice lift and a 600-metre blue run, is just 2 minutes away, whilst the Obereggen ski area, connected to Dolomiti Superski (1,200 km of slopes), can be reached in 20 minutes. For golf enthusiasts, the Petersberg Golf Club is right on the doorstep and can be reached in less than five minutes by car. The lively town of Bolzano, with its restaurants, cafés and shops, is around 30 minutes away.

title: Palma, Spain — 2-Bed Townhouse With Pool
description:
This new-build townhouse with a private roof terrace and small pool awaits you in the heart of Palma. Enjoy the Mallorcan sun, refresh yourself in your pool and end the evening overlooking the rooftops of Palma. The townhouse offers space for family and friends on two floors, and floor-to-ceiling windows provide the rooms with plenty of natural light. 

The renowned Palma Sport & Tennis Club is just a few minutes' walk away. Here you can enjoy the complex's extensive fitness and wellness facilities, from a modern gym and sauna to an outdoor pool, bistro café and terrace. 

Just a few steps away, you will find the marina of Palma, the famous shopping street Passeig del Born and the Paseo Marítimo with numerous restaurants and bars. The neighbourhood is known for its charming alleys, trendy boutiques and lively gastronomic scene.

title: Ericeira, Portugal — 2-Bed Apartment With Pool
description:
This modern new-build terrace apartment in Ericeira combines relaxed coastal living with a fantastic location right by the beach. Here you can enjoy relaxing moments on your sunny south-east facing terrace with sea views.

A special highlight is the spacious shared roof terrace with infinity pool. From here, the view stretches far across the Atlantic – a wonderful retreat for sunny hours and a refreshing dip in the pool.

Just a few minutes' walk away is the famous Praia de Ribeira d'Ilhas surf beach, one of Portugal's best-known surfing spots. The beautiful coastal landscape, perfect waves and impressive sunsets make this place a paradise for nature and sea lovers.

Ericeira itself is one of Portugal's most charming coastal towns and can be easily reached in 10 minutes by car. With its traditional white and blue houses, lively alleys and excellent fish restaurants, the town enjoys an authentic maritime flair – a location that perfectly combines joie de vivre and nature.

This idyllic garden apartment impresses with its exclusive location directly on Lake Tegernsee and offers a beautiful view of the lake and the surrounding mountains. Enjoy sunny hours and the view on your south-west-facing terrace or relax in your lovingly landscaped garden with idyllic stream. Your own fitness and wellness area with sauna in the basement rounds off your holiday experience. The lakeshore is just a few minutes' walk away.

The sought-after location between the mountains and the proximity to Munich make the region around Lake Tegernsee particularly attractive. The lakeside promenade invites you to take relaxing walks, while the lake offers numerous leisure activities such as sailing, surfing, boat tours, hiking and cycling. Shopping facilities, cafés and restaurants are also in the immediate vicinity.

description:
This cosy chalet boasts panoramic views of the surrounding mountains and an idyllic location in one of Austria's most beautiful regions.
Spanning two levels, the chalet offers plenty of space for family and friends. In the open living area with large windows and an adjoining south-facing balcony, you can enjoy the stunning views and many hours of sunshine. Additionally, the fitness/wellness area with a sauna provides relaxing moments after an adventurous day in nature.

The three premier ski resorts of Wildkogel Arena, KitzSki, and Zillertal Arena are nearby, offering variety for every winter sports enthusiast. The Hohe Tauern National Park is one of the most impressive nature reserves in Europe, offering a wide range of alpine activities for the whole family during the warmer months.

description:
This new-build garden apartment in a calm location has a sunny west-facing terrace with a lovingly landscaped private garden. Here you can enjoy the sun until the evening hours – whether dining al fresco, relaxing in the greenery or sunbathing. A small lake view and scenic, colourful sunsets give this retreat a very special atmosphere.

The complex's shared pool provides additional refreshment on warm summer days, while the nearby lake shore with swimming area is only a few minutes' walk away.

The lively promenade and the charming old town of Lazise with its diverse restaurants and cafés are within easy walking distance. Whether water sports, cycling through the vineyards or a round of golf – the surrounding area offers a wide range of leisure activities. Families can also reach the popular Gardaland and other amusement parks in just ten minutes by car.

This new-build terrace apartment in a sought-after location in the south of Tenerife offers wide panoramic views of the Atlantic Ocean, a sunny south-west facing terrace and a private saltwater infinity pool. Enjoy relaxing hours in the sun, stylish al fresco dining and refreshing moments in the pool, accompanied by views of the deep blue sea.

Playa de Ajabo and the Sueño Azul beach club are within walking distance or a few minutes away by e-bike. Golf courses, tennis courts and extensive hiking areas in the impressive hills on the island are only about ten minutes away by car.

Here you can enjoy life on the island of eternal spring to the fullest: sun, sea and nature combine to create an incomparable holiday feeling.

description:
This exclusive new-build terrace apartment on the Costa del Sol, not far from Málaga, enjoys beautiful sea views and a quiet location, just a few minutes' walk from the beach.

The sunny south-west facing terrace is perfect for relaxing and sunbathing, while the shared outdoor pool with pool bar promises refreshing moments and a Mediterranean lifestyle. For cooler days, there is a heated indoor pool, complemented by a modern fitness and wellness area with sauna, hammam and massage services. Owners also benefit from a one-year membership to the Reserva del Higuerón Sports Club with access to fitness, wellness and spa areas as well as tennis and padel courts.

For golf enthusiasts, the nearest golf club is only a 12-minute drive away, and Málaga, with its charming old town and lively beach promenade, is only a 20-minute drive away. Carvajal station is only a few minutes away and has a direct train connection to Málaga Airport in about 30 minutes.

With wide views over the sparkling Lake Como and the impressive mountains, this elegant new-build terrace apartment is in an especially attractive elevated location. The green surroundings and open views create a peaceful holiday atmosphere with a high level of relaxation.

The sunny south-facing terrace will quickly become your favourite outdoor spot: here you can enjoy relaxing hours in the sun, cosy meals under the open sky and atmospheric evenings with panoramic views. The spacious shared pool in the well-maintained complex provides additional refreshment.

In just around five minutes by car, you can reach the lake shore and the lively old town of Domaso. The long beach is known for its excellent swimming and water sports facilities, while the nearby ferry terminal allows for convenient trips along Lake Como — perfect for anyone who wants to combine nature, activity, and Italian flair.

Located in an attractive area between Antibes and Cannes, this new-build terrace apartment is an excellent retreat on the Côte d'Azur. 

The sunny west-facing terrace with idyllic green views creates a wonderful ambience for relaxed outdoor living — from morning coffee to atmospheric dinners as the sun sets. A shared pool with garden and pool house offers relaxation and refreshment on warm days. 

The beach at Antibes is just a 10-minute walk or a few minutes by e-bike away. The nearby marina at Golfe-Juan offers water sports and boat rentals, while golf enthusiasts will enjoy the Cannes Mougins golf course, just a 10-minute drive away. The panorama of this dream villa is one of the most beautiful we know of on the west coast of Mallorca - a view that mesmerises you every day.

 Located directly in the first sea line, the luxurious villa combines absolute privacy with one of the most exclusive locations in Mallorca with panoramic views of the bay of Palma. Thanks to its west-facing orientation, you can enjoy stunning sunsets here every day.

Experience Mediterranean inside-out living to perfection: sunbathing, refreshing moments in the pool and cosy hours in an unique atmosphere.

Start the day in the exclusive fitness and wellness area and spend unforgettable evenings in your own home cinema, perfect for spending time with family and friends.

 The nearby Playa Maioris swimming spot with the famous ‘Mhares Sea Club’ is just a few minutes away. Golf enthusiasts benefit from the nearby first-class 18-hole golf course “Maioris”, while Palma and the airport are within easy and convenient reach.

An exclusive retreat for relaxation, surrounded by one of the most beautiful landscapes Mallorca has to offer.

This new-build penthouse in the south of Tenerife offers breathtaking panoramic views across the Atlantic Ocean to the island of La Gomera. The highlight is the south-west facing terrace with infinity pool – perfect for lounging, dining or cooling off, always with views of the sea and impressive sunsets.

Floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding doors create a light-flooded space with a harmonious transition between indoors and outdoors. The elegant complex is surrounded by greenery and offers peace, privacy and direct proximity to the sea.

Playa de Ajabo and the Sueño Azul beach club are within walking distance or can be reached by e-bike. Restaurants, shops, golf and tennis courts, and extensive hiking areas in the hills are just a few minutes away.

description:
This Mediterranean terrace apartment is located in one of the most sought-after areas of Nova Santa Ponsa – quiet and slightly elevated in the middle of the iconic Ensaïmada. As soon as you enter, you are greeted by an impressive view of the sparkling sea and the Malgrats Islands.

The covered south-west facing terrace offers plenty of privacy and invites you to enjoy the sunset with the sea in the background. Thanks to sliding glass doors, the terrace can also be used as a conservatory in the cooler months. The spacious living and dining area with exposed beams and a wood-burning fireplace create a cosy, inviting atmosphere.

A well-kept shared pool with a spacious sun terrace completes the offer and invites you to take a refreshing break on warm days.

The spacious Platja de Santa Ponça and the quieter Caló d'en Pellicer bay are a 5-minute drive away. Golf courses, tennis and padel courts and the Jungle Parc are closeby. The marina is only five minutes away by e-bike and offers a wide range of water sports, from diving to sailing trips along the coast. Surrounded by gentle hills and pine forests, the area is also excellent for long walks and bike rides.

description:
This new-build villa combines tranquillity, panoramic views and modern holiday comfort in the green hills above Bardolino. Experience impressive panoramic views over Lake Garda, Mediterranean inside-out living, plenty of space and privacy.

The sunny south-west facing outdoor areas enjoy light and warmth throughout the day and provide the perfect scenery for colourful sunsets over the lake in the evening. The spacious heated infinity pool invites you to sunbathe and cool off, while stylish al fresco dining on the terraces completes the Italian lifestyle.

The private fitness/wellness area with sauna and a hobby room with sofa bed and home cinema in the lower floor provide space for relaxation, games and entertainment.

Cavaion Veronese, with its elegant restaurants and shops, is only a few minutes away, while Bardolino, with its marina, promenade and historic old town, is around ten minutes away. The close location to Verona also offers you a unique cultural, culinary and shopping experience at the highest level. Golf, tennis and a wide range of water sports complement the first-class location.

This exclusive new-build terrace apartment on the first line to the sea in Villeneuve-Loubet near Antibes combines Mediterranean elegance with an incomparable panoramic sea view – right on the beach between Cannes and Nice.

The sunny south-east facing terrace forms the heart of the apartment: a place to sunbathe, relax and enjoy meals together in the open air, always accompanied by sweeping views of the Mediterranean Sea. A shared roof terrace with a pool and sun loungers complements the exclusive ambience and offers additional refreshment on warm summer days.

Right on the doorstep is the long pebble beach of Plage de Fontonne Est with its coastal promenade, which invites you to take long walks. The Baie des Anges marina is within easy walking distance and is considered one of the most legendary harbours on the Côte d'Azur. The 18-hole Golf de Biot golf course is only a five-minute drive away.

Located only about 15 minutes from Nice Airport, this location combines excellent accessibility with authentic charm. The region also offers water sports, tennis, padel, horse riding, golf and walks in the Rives du Loup nature park.

This new-build terrace apartment in an elevated location in Èze on the Côte d'Azur combines tranquillity, stylish elegance and impressive panoramic views of the sea and the scenic town of Èze. The covered south-east facing terrace invites you to enjoy the sun in the early morning hours and offers a beautiful view along the coast.

The well-kept complex is set in lovingly designed Mediterranean gardens and features a shared pool with stunning views of the sea and the historic village – an extraordinary backdrop between Monaco and Nice.

The medieval village of Èze, with its narrow streets and renowned Jardin Exotique, is within easy walking distance. Here, art galleries and small cafés invite you to linger. The beaches of Plage d'Èze and Plage Mala are about a 15-minute drive away. Monaco, the epitome of exclusivity on the Côte d'Azur with its marina, fine dining and international flair, is also only about 10 minutes away.

Sports enthusiasts can reach the Tennis Club d'Èze in just five minutes on foot, while the renowned Monte-Carlo Golf Club is about 15 minutes away by car.

The lively centre of Dénia with its restaurants, boutiques and the historic Castell de Dénia is just five minutes away by e-bike. The elegant marina with bars, lounge spots and excursion boats is also nearby.

Golf enthusiasts can enjoy the 27-hole La Sella golf course, the largest on the Costa Blanca, with fine dining and first-class wellness facilities. Nature lovers can reach the Montgó Nature Park with its diverse hiking trails in around 15 minutes by car. Snorkelling and diving enthusiasts will be thrilled by the Cabo de San Antonio marine reserve and its fascinating underwater world.

This new-build villa combines modern architecture, sunny outdoor spaces and a Mediterranean lifestyle – set in a quiet, green setting in the Algarve. The south-facing terrace is perfect for sunbathing, while the east-facing terrace is excellent for enjoying your morning coffee in the sun. There is also another terrace on the upper floor.

This new-build terrace apartment is located in the exclusive Zenity Índigo Resort in Estepona on the Costa del Sol. The covered south-east facing terrace offers unobstructable panoramic views of the sea and invites you to start the day completely relaxed – accompanied by the first light of the morning sun and the gentle sound of the sea.

The exclusive amenities of the Zenity Índigo Resort fulfill everything you can wish for: an outdoor pool with a children's pool and a modern gym offer comfort and relaxation in a unique setting. The resort is only a 10-minute walk from the beach, giving you quick access to the Mediterranean lifestyle.

This modern luxury villa is located on a slightly elevated location in Sainte-Maxime and enjoys panoramic views of the sea and the Bay of Saint-Tropez. Surrounded by greenery and nestled in a quiet, well-kept environment, you can enjoy maximum privacy, sunshine and Mediterranean ease – while still being within walking distance of the beach.

Large, partly covered south-facing terraces, a sunny garden and the heated infinity pool blend harmoniously with each other and create ideal conditions for generous inside-out living. Large panoramic windows flood the rooms with light and offer sea views from almost all rooms. An elegant fireplace adds a cosy atmosphere to the living area, while the private fitness area and outdoor sauna offer space for regeneration and relaxation.

Plage des Éléphants is within walking distance and the popular Plage de la Nartelle is only a few minutes away by car. The harbour, boat rental and ferry connections are about ten minutes away, as is the renowned Bluegreen golf course with its magnificent views.

In the heart of Morzine, in a lovingly renovated former chalet-style hotel, this modern apartment has sweeping views of the surrounding mountains and Le Pléney ski slopes. The sunny south-west facing balcony invites you to enjoy the sun, eat outdoors and admire the alpine landscape.

The ski lift is just a few minutes' walk away, providing direct access to the renowned Les Portes du Soleil ski area with over 600 kilometres of perfectly groomed slopes. At the same time, the lively centre of Morzine is within easy walking distance, with charming cafés, restaurants, traditional chalets and après-ski activities.

This exclusive garden apartment combines modern comfort with the beauty of Lake Como. Located on a sunny hillside on the western shore, it has impressive panoramic views of the lake and the surrounding mountain landscape.

A wraparound terrace and private garden create the perfect setting to enjoy the idyllic scenery and Mediterranean lifestyle to the fullest.

Large windows flood the living rooms with light and allow the interior and exterior areas to blend harmoniously. The private sauna and fitness area provide soothing relaxation, while the shared pool with sun terrace invites you to enjoy refreshing moments.

A covered terrace with lake views invites you to end the evening with atmospheric sunsets, while the south-east facing balcony offers sunny moments outdoors in the early hours of the morning. The shared pool is an excellent addition and provides welcome refreshment on warm days.
