The private terrace has a wide view over the sea and the surrounding coastline - the perfect place to relax and enjoy al fresco dining. The shared pool with sun loungers and sea views is a great place to cool off.

The charming town centre of Palau is within easy walking distance. Here, restaurants, small boutiques, the lively harbour promenade and the marina are perfect for taking a walk. Boat trips to the La Maddalena archipelago - one of the most impressive natural paradises in the Mediterranean - depart daily.
Those looking for an active holiday will also enjoy the variety of water sports here - from kayak and SUP tours to diving and sailing experiences. Other beautiful bays and beaches are only a few minutes' drive away, and the next airport in Olbia is only around 45 minutes away.
amenities: Popular location on Sardinia's north-east coast
Other beautiful beaches just a few minutes away by car
Boat trips to the La Maddalena archipelago from Palau marina
Palau town centre within walking distance
Olbia airport 45 minutes away by car

title: Sa Rapita, Spain — 3-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
This new-build villa in the small coastal town of Sa Ràpita embodies the Mediterranean lifestyle in its most beautiful form. The harmonious blend of modern design and warm, cosy character creates the perfect conditions for a relaxing retreat.

The private garden with heated pool invites you to unwind under the open sky. The sunny south-west facing terrace with outdoor sauna is the perfect place to relax indoors and outdoors until the evening hours.

The coastal village of Sa Ràpita is particularly popular with property owners and thus retains a pleasantly quiet, authentic atmosphere far away from the large tourist crowds. Restaurants, small shops and the harbour are only a few minutes away. 
One of Mallorca's most beautiful beaches, the natural Es Trenc with its turquoise waters, is about a 15-minute drive away – a paradise for sun lovers and water sports enthusiasts.
amenities: Harbour and beach only a few minutes away by car
Dream beach Es Trenc in 15 minutes by car

title: Muro, Spain — 4-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
This high-quality Mediterranean-style country house is picturesquely situated on a 1.7-hectare property with plenty of privacy. The fantastic panoramic view extends over the surrounding landscape all the way to the Bay of Alcúdia. 

The country house offers a lot of space for family and friends on 240m² of living space. Several spacious terrace areas surrounded by a green outdoor area ensure perfect inside-out living. Four bedrooms - all with en suite bathrooms - and a large living and dining area with an open kitchen offer comprehensive living comfort. A highlight is the large infinity pool, which offers fun and cooling off. 

It takes about 15 minutes to drive to the dream beach of Muro. Various shops and restaurants can be reached in just 5 minutes by car. The country house has one of the sought-after rental licenses.

In addition, this vacation home impresses with the following highlights:
amenities: High-quality construction in a Mediterranean style
15 minutes to the dream beach of Playa del Muro

title: Sa Rapita, Spain — 3-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
Just a few steps from the turquoise waters of Playa Sa Ràpita, this modern new-build villa is situated in a peaceful coastal location with magnificent panoramic views of the wide sea.

On your sunny south-west-facing terrace with pool, you can experience the Mediterranean lifestyle in its most beautiful form: relaxing in the sun, taking a dip in the cool water or al fresco dining. Another highlight is the roof terrace with outdoor kitchen - where the beautiful landscape and enjoyment blend together: relaxed evenings, dreamlike sunsets and the view over the sea create unforgettable moments.

The supermarket and restaurants are within walking distance and the surrounding area has fantastic beaches within walking distance as well as various activities for young and old. The nearby marina also has access to a wide range of water sports.

title: Kukci, Croatia — 3-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
This high-quality new-build villa in an exclusive location on the popular Istrian peninsula offers all the desirable amenities for an all-round relaxing holiday. 
Here you can experience inside-out living at the highest level. A spacious terrace is accessible from the open-plan living and dining area. Here you will find a lounge area with a fireplace, sun loungers, a dining area for al fresco dining and a pool for refreshment.

The villa also has a roof terrace with an outdoor bar and whirlpool, accompanied by a distant sea view. Soak up the sun, enjoy a drink and relax in the whirlpool - everything is possible here. The bedrooms on the upper floor also offer direct access to the terrace with sea views. Another highlight is the fitness and wellness area for active and relaxing moments, as well as a home cinema for evenings together. 

The beach can be reached within a few minutes by car, and the town of Poreč with its harbour is also just a few minutes away by car. Enjoy this summer in this dream villa with all the comforts of a holiday home.
amenities: Popular location on the Istrian peninsula
Roof terrace with distant sea views and hot tub
Inside-out living with outdoor kitchen, bar and fire pit
Home cinema for the whole family

title: Laveno, Italy — 1-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
This newly built garden apartment in Laveno not only has a modern design, but also enjoys beautiful views of Lake Maggiore and the surrounding greenery.

A sunny south-facing terrace and a private garden with pool perfectly complement the Mediterranean lifestyle. Here you can enjoy the day with a view of the lake - whether having breakfast on the terrace or relaxing in your own garden.
Another highlight: the harbour and the lakeside promenade are just a few minutes' walk away, as is the ferry to the western shore of the lake, which allows you to easily travel to other beautiful destinations around Lake Maggiore. The mountain railway also takes you to Monte Sasso del Ferro, from where you can enjoy breathtaking panoramic views of the lake and mountains.

Laveno itself is a charming little town that embodies the Italian lifestyle with its numerous restaurants, cafés and shops right on the lakeshore.
A retreat that perfectly combines modernity, nature and Italian flair - for anyone looking for peace and pleasure in a prime location.
amenities: Views of the lake and over Laveno
Harbour and lakeside promenade within walking distance
Mountain cable car to Monte Sasso del Ferro with panoramic views
Ferry to the western shore within walking distance

title: Timmendorfer Strand, Germany — 2-Bed Penthouse With Sea Views
description:
Just a few steps from the white sandy beach, in one of the most desired locations on Timmendorfer Strand, this modern penthouse awaits you with panoramic views of the countryside and the Baltic Sea. 

The spacious, wraparound roof terrace and the light-filled conservatory create the perfect setting for relaxed inside-out living – perfect for breakfast together under the open sky or cosy BBQ evenings. Thanks to the excellent orientation, the evening sun shines through the wraparound glass walls into the living and dining area, flooding the rooms with warm, golden light at sunset. A private sauna offers additional relaxation after an active day at the sea.

The fine sandy beach is almost right on your doorstep. The pier, Niendorf harbour and numerous restaurants, cafés and boutiques are also just a few minutes away. Whether it's a walk along the coast, an espresso with a sea view or a trip to the green countryside – thanks to the excellent location, all this is easy to do on foot or by e-bike. 

Sports enthusiasts will also find a spacious 36-hole golf course just a few minutes' drive away, surrounded by wide open nature and fresh Baltic Sea air.
amenities: View of the greenery and the Baltic Sea
Beach promenade and pier within walking distance
36-hole golf resort Strandgrün 10 minutes away by car
Ostsee thermal spa 7 minutes away by car
Restaurants and shops within walking distance

title: Sa Ràpita, Spain — 3-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
This newly built villa in the small coastal village of Sa Ràpita epitomises the Mediterranean lifestyle in its most beautiful form. With a successful mix of modern design and cosy feel-good charm, it offers everything you need for a relaxing holiday. 

The private garden and refreshing pool invite you to relax, while the sun-drenched south-west-facing terrace with an outdoor sauna promises inside-out living well into the evening.The beach of Sa Ràpita with its turquoise waters, restaurants and shops are just a few minutes away by car.
amenities: Beach only a few minutes away by car

title: Palau, Italy — 2-Bed Apartment With Pool
description:
This new-build garden apartment is located on the picturesque north-east coast of Sardinia - nestled in a quiet, green residential residence in Palau, just a few minutes' walk to the beautiful Spiaggia dell'Isolotto beach and the marina.

You can enjoy an inside-out living experience here: from your private garden with covered terrace as well as from the additional terrace on the upper floor, the view opens up over the sea and the surrounding coastal landscape - the perfect backdrop for relaxing hours and sociable al fresco dining.

You can walk to the charming town center of Palau. Here, restaurants, small boutiques, the lively harbor promenade and the marina are the perfect place for a stroll. There are daily boat trips to the La Maddalena archipelago - one of the most impressive natural paradises in the Mediterranean.

Active vacationers will also find a variety of water sports activities - from kayak and SUP tours to diving and sailing experiences. Other beautiful bays and beaches can be reached in just a few minutes by car, and the nearest airport in Olbia is only around 45 minutes away.
amenities: Boat trips to the La Maddalena archipelago
Center of Palau within walking distance
Olbia airport 45 minutes away by car

title: Prora, Germany — 2-Bed Penthouse With Pool
description:
This light-flooded penthouse combines modern holiday comfort with a first-class location on the Baltic Sea. 
Two east-facing balconies let you start the day with breakfast in the morning sun, while the private roof terrace with lounge enjoys a beautiful panoramic view of the Baltic Sea and the surrounding pine forest. Whether sunbathing, lounging or relaxed evenings under the open sky - here you can enjoy inside-out living at its best.

The private sauna with a view creates a place to relax after an active day in the great outdoors. The shared, heated outdoor pool ensures additional relaxation. 

The beach is right on your doorstep and is perfect for spending a relaxing time by the sea. Restaurants and cafés are also close by, while the centre of Binz with its first-class boutiques and culinary highlights is just five minutes away by car.
amenities: Exclusive location in the first sea line
View of the sea and pine forest
Restaurant, bakery and bike rental within walking distance

title: Torri del Benaco, Italy — 2-Bed Apartment With Pool
description:
From this newly built terrace apartment, you can enjoy a fantastic view of Lake Garda and the surrounding mountains. Centrally located in the heart of Torri del Benaco, the property impresses with sunny outdoor areas facing south and west, which are perfect for relaxing and capturing the Alpine-Mediterranean atmosphere. On warm days, the shared pool is a great place to cool off.

Thanks to the excellent location, you can easily reach the lakeshore and harbour on foot, while the nearby ferry connection to Toscolano-Maderno gives you direct access to the opposite lakeshore. A special highlight is the historic old town centre of Torri del Benaco, with its imposing Scaliger castle, narrow alleys and charming cafés and restaurants. Golf enthusiasts will find a first-class golf course just a few minutes away, perfect for both regenration and exercise.

Whether as a retreat for relaxing hours or as a starting point for excursions - this terraced apartment combines comfort, Italian flair and an outstanding location on Lake Garda.
amenities: Central location in Torri del Benaco
View of the lake and the mountains
Sunny outdoor areas with south and west orientation
Lake shore and harbour within walking distance
Golf course 10 minutes away by car

title: Domaso, Italy — 2-Bed Penthouse With Pool
description:
This exclusive newly built penthouse is situated in a quiet location in Domaso on the northern shore of Lake Como. 

Enjoy the fantastic panoramic view of the lake and the surrounding mountains from your sunny south-east-facing terrace. The large, floor-to-ceiling windows bring the beautiful view right into the light-filled living and dining area – with the option of adding a fireplace to provide extra cosiness on cooler days.
Another highlight is the shared infinity pool with sun loungers and lake views, which invites you to enjoy refreshing moments on warm days.

The lakeshore, the old town and the harbour of Domaso can be reached in just a few minutes by car. The lively harbour offers numerous water sports facilities and is an ideal starting point for boat trips on Lake Como. In the winter season, we recommend a trip to the St. Moritz ski area, which can be reached in just 1.5 hours by car.
amenities: Exclusive location in Domaso on Lake Como
Infinity pool with panoramic view - shared
Lakeshore just a few minutes away by car
Old town of Domaso just a few minutes away by car
Domso beach offers very good bathing, surfing, kiting and sailing condition
Ferry for excursions just a few minutes away by car

title: Brixen, Austria — 2-Bed Apartment With Garden
description:
This modern garden apartment is located in a quiet yet central location on the sunny slopes of Brixen im Thale - in the midst of the Kitzbühel Alps and only a 10-minute drive from Kitzbühel. The entrance to the Wilder Kaiser ski area is only a few minutes away.
The heart of the apartment is the spacious living and dining area with open kitchen. Floor-to-ceiling windows provide plenty of natural light, and the adjoining terrace with large garden is perfect for relaxing and al-fresco dining on warmer days. Two bedrooms - each with private terrace access - and 1.5 bathrooms provide ample space for family and friends. A highlight is the private outdoor sauna in the garden for additional relaxation.
amenities: Idyllic location on the sunny slope
Access to Wilder Kaiser ski area only 3 minutes away

title: Sellin, Germany — 2-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
It is one of the best properties in all of Sellin! Exclusively on the first line of the sea, centrally yet quietly located, with the forest behind you and the Sellin pier at your feet, this superb apartment is in a charming spa-style villa. With a beautiful view of the Baltic Sea, three balconies, your sauna and a fireplace, every relaxation wish is left unfulfilled. Another highlight is the shared outdoor pool and the other wellness area with a sauna and steam bath. 

The famous pier, the popular Wilhelmstrasse and the beautiful beach can be reached on foot in just a few minutes.

* Current interior - before the upgrade
amenities: Exclusive location on the first line of the sea
Quiet location with lots of privacy
Walking distance to the beach and the Sellin pier

Enjoy the fantastic panoramic view of the lake and the surrounding mountains from your sunny south-east-facing terrace. title: Prora, Germany — 2-Bed Villa With Pool
description: This beautiful maisonette apartment is located directly on the Baltic Sea beach and extends over the ground and upper floors. The centre of the apartment is the spacious living and dining area with an open kitchen. You have a beautiful view of the sea and pine forest from the adjacent balcony. This view can also be enjoyed from the bedroom with its small terrace. Another room offers additional sleeping space for guests or can be used as an office. The direct beach access combined with a heated outdoor pool and private sauna guarantees a holiday atmosphere at any time of the year. A covered parking space is also part of the property.

title: Playa d'en Bossa, Spain — 1-Bed Apartment With Pool
description:
A special gem - our new-build apartment with wellness & sea view in the exclusive Hippiements Resort. The high-end furnishings, pool, gym and wellness area promise pure luxury and relaxation. The first-class location in the second sea line on Playa d'en Bossa allows you to reach the beauty of the old town and the port of Ibiza in just a few minutes. You can experience pure Ibiza flair here!

The new build apartment offers a light-flooded living and dining area with an open-plan high-end kitchen with Gaggenau appliances. Floor-to-ceiling windows and an adjoining south-east-facing balcony offer sea views and plenty of sunshine. The beautiful natural stone wall in the sleeping area is a particular eye-catcher. The sleeping and living areas can be conveniently separated with a modern wooden sliding wall. 
The en suite bathroom is fitted with fine ceramics and a double washbasin, while a walk-in rain shower rounds off the living comfort. 

The apartment is in a quiet yet central location - just a short walk from the beach. Restaurants and shops are within easy walking distance. The airport is only ten minutes away by car.
amenities: In the second row on Playa d'en Bossa
Within walking distance to the beach
Pool, fitness, and wellness areas in the building

title: Glowe, Germany — 3-Bed Apartment With Sea Views
description:
This spacious garden apartment impresses with its amazing location next to the beach and unobstructed views of the sea all the way to Cape Arkona.

The light-filled living and dining area with floor-to-ceiling windows brings the Baltic Sea right inside and creates an open, spacious living area. From here, you can access the adjoining terrace with a private garden – the perfect place to start the day with breakfast accompanied by the sound of the sea.

Additional highlights are the private fitness and wellness area with sauna and a home cinema with surround sound system for movie nights with friends and family. Shops, restaurants and cafés are just a few minutes' walk away. For nature lovers, Jasmund National Park with its famous chalk cliffs and extensive hiking trails is only about a 15-minute drive away.

This beach apartment offers relaxation, activity and entertainment for the whole family in every season!
amenities: Exclusive location in first sea line
Private garden with direct access to the white Baltic Sea beach
Modern home cinema with surround sound system
Jasmund national park in 15 minutes by car

title: Ljusterö, Sweden — 4-Bed Villa With Pool
description:
This impressive architect-designed villa is located on the idyllic island of Ljusterö in the Stockholm archipelago, combining modern elegance with the tranquillity of nature. From here, you can enjoy wide views of the water and the surrounding nature.

Large panoramic windows flood the interior with natural light and create flowing transitions to the spacious south-east facing terraces. The extensive plot include a garden and a heated pool with sunbathing areas for relaxing hours and fun for the whole family. 

Additional relaxation is ensured by the private sauna house next to the water – here you can jump into the cool water afterwards or cool off in the snow in winter. Start your day by using your private fitness area in the lower floor of the villa all year round. 

Another highlight is the private jetty, which provides direct access to the water, making spontaneous boat trips and relaxing hours on the water a daily pleasure. The offer is rounded off with a separate guest house, providing additional space for family and friends. 

In just a few minutes by car, you can reach a beautiful swimming spot with a sandy beach and the 18-hole golf course at Ljusterö. The lively capital city of Stockholm, with its numerous gastronomic and cultural highlights, is just 45 minutes away.
amenities: In first water line in Ljusterö
Views of the water and nature
Sauna house, fitness area and additional guest house
Bathing area with sandy beach 5 minutes away by car
18-hole golf course 5 minutes away by car
Restaurants and shops just 10 minutes away by car

title: Neukirchen, Austria — 2-Bed Apartment With Mountain Views
description:
This modern terrace apartment in Neukirchen am Großvenediger offers impressive panoramic views of the surrounding mountains and a sunny south-facing terrace. Enjoy the clear, fresh mountain air and the view over the peaks while spending relaxing moments with family or friends.

The ski lift is only a three-minute walk away and opens up direct access to the Wildkogel Arena, a family-friendly ski area with 75 kilometers of slopes.
The larger Zillertal Arena ski area can be reached in around 15 minutes by car. 

Numerous hiking trails start in the immediate vicinity, and additional recreation and sports opportunities are offered by the Hohe Tauern National Park Golf Club, a 15-minute drive away, and the Kristallbad Wald in Königsleiten, which can be reached in just ten minutes.

Thanks to its tourist license, the property is intended for legal rental to changing guests – with professional operation and flexible occupancy.
amenities: Beloved location in Neukirchen am Großvenediger
Ski lift within three minute walking distance
Hohe Tauern National Park Golf Club 15 minutes by car
Kristallbad Wald Königsleiten 10 minutes by car
Restaurants and shopping within walking distance in just a few minutes

title: See by Ischgl, Austria — 2-Bed Apartment With Mountain Views
description:
Welcome to the heart of the Tyrolean mountains in the beautiful Paznaun Valley, between the renowned towns of St. Anton and Ischgl. This high-quality new-built apartment in hillside location impresses with its high-quality alpine-chic interior as well as the fantastic panoramic view of the impressive Silvretta mountain range. Enjoy the majestic mountain views early in the morning from your bedroom as well as from your open-plan living and dining area, which thanks to floor-to-ceiling sliding doors leads seamlessly onto your southwest-facing balcony.

The ski lift of the See ski area is just a 2-minute drive away and offers access to around 42 kilometers of perfectly groomed slopes. In addition, you can reach the entrances to the first-class ski areas of St. Anton and the Silvretta Arena in Ischgl in just 20 minutes each. After an active day on the slopes, you can cozy up in front of the fireplace or enjoy the evening in lively Ischgl.

Thanks to its tourist license, the property is intended for rental to alternating guests — with professional management and flexible occupancy.
amenities: Exclusive location in the lively Paznaun valley near St. Anton
Ski lift See is 2 minutes away by car
Ski lift St. Anton is 20 minutes away by car
Ski lift Ischgl is 20 minutes away by car

title: Brickell, Miami, FL — Studio With City Views
description:
Own a piece of Miami's most dynamic neighbourhood with this fully furnished studio apartment (more like a one-bedroom apartment with its separate living room area) in the heart of Brickell. Known as the "Manhattan of the South," Brickell has transformed into Miami's premier financial and residential district, featuring gleaming skyscrapers, world-class dining, and an unmatched urban lifestyle. Located in Miami's thriving financial district, the residence comes fully furnished with Italian kitchen appliances, washer/dryer, rain shower with glass enclosure, and a private balcony offering stunning city views. The price includes a parking unit + valet parking.

The studio maximises space efficiency with thoughtfully designed furniture and floor-to-ceiling sliding glass doors that flood the unit with natural light. Every detail is managed through an integrated concierge app that controls temperature, lighting, and home functions directly from your smartphone. Residents enjoy resort-style living with premium amenities, including two rooftop pools, a state-of-the-art gym, spa and wellness facilities, a rooftop garden and lounge, a sky bar and restaurant, and a party room for entertaining. The LEED-certified building emphasises sustainable luxury and energy efficiency.

This fractional ownership model provides flexible usage rights with potential for 10% guaranteed annual returns through the optional rental program when you're not using the property.

Brickell fractional ownership offers unparalleled urban convenience with walkable access to world-class dining, nightlife, shopping, and Miami's financial district. The location offers easy access to major expressways and thoroughfares, putting you minutes from Miami International Airport, South Beach, and Coconut Grove. Brickell continues to attract international investors and luxury buyers seeking the perfect blend of metropolitan sophistication and tropical lifestyle. As Miami's population and economic influence grow, Brickell stands at the centre of this transformation – a vertical city where Latin American business culture meets North American infrastructure, creating a truly global neighbourhood unlike anywhere else in the United States.
